# Delivery Context Switch Log v1

## Usage

Use this log to guarantee stable resume points across long-running delivery iterations.

Each entry must include:
- timestamp
- blocker key
- layer target/module/reason
- completed step
- active commit
- next step (single executable action)

---

## Entries

- 2026-04-24: workspace home homepage factual closure. Browser proof showed `/` rendered the home skeleton with fallback zeros because `system.init(with=["workspace_home"])` returned `workspace_home_ref.loaded=true` without the actual `workspace_home` payload. Fixed `SystemInitPayloadBuilder` so `with=["workspace_home"]` returns `workspace_home`, added unit coverage, restarted backend, and verified via Playwright that the logged-in homepage now renders populated workspace sections instead of the `0 / 0` fallback.
- 2026-04-24: homepage unified renderer closure. Playwright showed the logged-in `/` route was still using the legacy `HomeView` template because `page_contracts.home.page_orchestration_v1` was a skeletal shell (`zones=[]`) while the real orchestration lived under `workspace_home.page_orchestration_v1`. Updated `HomeView` to treat page orchestration as usable only when it has zones and to accept `contract_version=page_orchestration_v1` for unified rendering. Verified live with `PageRenderer` active, 4 rendered zones, 1 progress block, 1 entry grid, and visible `ops.summary`.
- 2026-04-24: My Work chain closure step 1. Playwright showed `redirect=/my-work` login still landed on `/` because `LoginView` ignored valid page redirects whenever `workspaceHome` was absent. Updated login redirect resolution to preserve normalized page redirects and only fall back for unbound native action routes. After that, `/my-work` rendered through the unified page renderer but still showed generic contract copy. Patched `page_contracts_builder` with `my_work`-specific zone titles, descriptions, block titles, and corrected `open_list`/`open_failed` action targets. Live browser proof now lands on `/my-work` and shows `工作概览 / 待办处理 / 事项动态 / 失败与重试`.
- 2026-04-24T20:18:00+08:00 executor: branch `codex/sidebar-nav-de-scene-20260424` at `b2cf23ab`; Layer Target `Backend Contract/Data Fact Layer`; Module `smart_construction_seed demo my-work facts`; Reason `My Work` route, contract, and renderer were already correct, but live probes proved `demo_full` in `sc_demo` had zero project/task/activity/mention/follower bindings, so `my.work.summary` legitimately returned `NO_WORK_ITEMS`. Added seed step `z_demo_full_my_work` to attach `demo_full` to demo projects, tasks, activities, followers, and mentions; wired the step into the seed profile and added a focused `demo_full my_work` guard inside `demo_90_verify`. Live post-seed verification now shows `demo_full` counts `doc_manager=6 task_user_ids=24 activity_user=6 mentions=36 followers=30`, and `my.work.summary` returns `READY/OK` with non-empty items. Full `demo_90_verify` still fails on older showroom completeness debt unrelated to this closure.

## 2026-04-24 20:18 CST

- Context: user reported `项目列表` scene route still wrong even after list header consumer fixes; action route `/a/452` already correct.
- Facts:
  - `/s/projects.list` and `/s/projects.ledger` were resolving to stale numeric targets from scene payload.
  - Registry source `scene_registry_content.py` already pointed to correct xmlid targets.
  - Drift root cause was `smart_construction_scene.scene_registry.load_scene_configs_with_timings()` merging DB scene payload with registry fallback without replacing stale numeric `action_id/menu_id`.
- Action:
  - Added target identity upgrade in `addons/smart_construction_scene/scene_registry.py` to prefer fallback `action_xmlid/menu_xmlid` and clear stale numeric ids during DB/fallback merge.
  - Added regression in `addons/smart_construction_scene/tests/test_scene_registry_yaml_asset_merge.py`.
- Verification:
  - `python3 -m unittest addons.smart_construction_scene.tests.test_scene_registry_yaml_asset_merge` PASS
  - `pnpm -C frontend/apps/web typecheck:strict` PASS
  - `make restart` PASS
## 2026-04-24 20:36 CST

- Context: user continued reporting `/s/projects.list` still showed wrong raw headers; browser and live `system.init` probes confirmed the issue had moved from frontend list rendering to scene runtime asset drift.

  - live `ui_base_contract_source.source_ref` was still `action:519`
  - this proved stale base-contract binding inside scene runtime, not a list header consumer fallback
- Action:
  - updated `addons/smart_core/core/scene_provider.py` to upgrade critical scene target identity from provider `primary_action/fallback_strategy`
  - updated `addons/smart_core/core/ui_base_contract_asset_repository.py` so action-backed scenes treat mismatched `source_ref=action:*` assets as stale
  - added regressions:
    - `addons/smart_core/tests/test_scene_provider_target_identity_merge.py`
    - `addons/smart_core/tests/test_ui_base_contract_asset_repository.py`
- Verification:
  - `python3 addons/smart_core/tests/test_scene_provider_target_identity_merge.py` PASS
  - `python3 addons/smart_core/tests/test_ui_base_contract_asset_repository.py` PASS
  - live `system.init` now returns:
    - `projects.list.meta.target.action_id = 452`
    - `projects.list.meta.target.menu_id = 265`
    - `projects.list.meta.ui_base_contract_source.source_ref = action:452`
## 2026-04-24 Batch-Nav-DualTrack-Freeze

- 冻结导航双轨语义：`action/menu` 与 `scene` 允许并存，但不得互相伪装。
- 明确 owner signal：
  - `scene_key` 不是 owner signal
  - `meta.scene_source=scene_contract` / `meta.action_type=scene.contract` 才是 scene owner signal
- 定稿口径：
  - `action = native source of truth`
  - `scene = compiled delivery surface`
- 约束：
  - 只允许“选中的 canonical action/menu”被编译为 scene
  - 不允许把所有 native action 全量 scene 化
- 已钉住当前混线样本：
  - canonical 项目列表：`projects.list -> /s/projects.list -> action 452`
  - 旧 demo showcase：`menu 343 / action 536 / 项目列表（演示）`
- 结论：`343/536` 属于旧 action/menu 轨，不得再被前端改名或改跳成 canonical `projects.list`
- 产物：
  - `docs/architecture/navigation_dual_track_contract_v1.md`

- 从 `smart_construction_core.core_extension` 与 `smart_construction_scene.core_extension` 中移除：
  - `smart_construction_demo.menu_sc_project_list_showcase -> projects.list`
  - `smart_construction_demo.action_sc_project_list_showcase -> projects.list`
- 目的：拆开旧 demo showcase `343/536` 与 canonical `projects.list/452` 的 scene 身份混线。
- 回归：
  - `addons.smart_construction_scene.tests.test_action_only_scene_semantic_supply`
  - 新断言：showcase xmlid 不再进入 `menu_scene_map / action_xmlid_scene_map`

## 2026-04-24 Batch-History-Continuity-D

- branch: `codex/sidebar-nav-de-scene-20260424`
- short_sha: `31c62372`
- Layer Target: `Migration Alignment Layer`
- Module: `Group B business fact continuity feasibility`
- Reason: 继续把 23 包从 anchor 扩到业务头/行事实，但必须先验证父锚点和运行态模型是否成立，避免把后续包硬灌进不完整 runtime。
- 本批实现：
  - 新增 adapters：
    - `fresh_db_contract_line_replay_adapter.py`
    - `fresh_db_supplier_contract_replay_adapter.py`
    - `fresh_db_supplier_contract_line_replay_adapter.py`
  - 新增 writers：
    - `fresh_db_contract_line_replay_write.py`
    - `fresh_db_supplier_contract_replay_write.py`
    - `fresh_db_supplier_contract_line_replay_write.py`

    - `contract_summary_lines`
    - `supplier_contract_headers`
    - `supplier_contract_lines`
- 验证：
  - adapters 全部 PASS：
    - `contract_line = 1441`
    - `supplier_contract = 5301`
    - `supplier_contract_line = 5065`
  - 真实 replay 结果：
    - `contract_line` FAIL
      - blocker: parent contract header missing in current `sc_demo`
      - representative `legacy_contract_id = 002cc1eac1a54e889f7c28531ab6553f`
      - this id exists in `contract_header_v1.xml` but is absent from current replayed `construction.contract`
    - `supplier_contract` FAIL
      - blocker: required `legacy_partner_sc_*` anchor missing in current `sc_demo`
      - representative `legacy_partner_id = a4d55ad0464b43dab4f89d8ed06b5bed`
      - exact id absent from current loaded partner/core/counterparty payloads
    - `supplier_contract_line` FAIL
      - blocked by parent supplier contract not loaded
  - continuity probe still PASS on previous baseline
- 结论：
  - Group B 不是“writer 还没写好”，而是已经暴露出两个上游事实缺口：
    1. `contract_sc_v1` 当前在 `sc_demo` 不是 full coverage，仍缺 parent contract headers
    2. supplier contracts 依赖的通用 partner anchors 不在当前 `sc_demo`
  - 下一批不该继续冲 `outflow_request / actual_outflow`，而应先补：
    - contract core gap recovery
    - supplier/general partner anchor recovery

- Module: `history upstream rebuild recovery`
- Reason: 用户明确要求不能按当前缺口点修，必须回到原始重建过程本身判断。为此先冻结 upstream recovery plan，再决定后续恢复批次。
- 复盘结论：
  - 原始重建流程固定为：
    - `source probe -> asset generate/verify -> adapter -> replay precheck -> bounded replay -> carrier/promote -> business usable`
  - `Group B` 当前阻断不是单个 writer 问题，而是 upstream chain 未闭合：
    - `contract_line_sc_v1` 被 `contract_sc_v1` coverage gap 卡住
    - `supplier_contract_sc_v1` 被 general/supplier partner anchor gap 卡住
- 新增产物：
  - `docs/migration_alignment/history_upstream_recovery_plan_v1.md`
- 下步冻结：
  - `Batch-UR-A`: contract core coverage recovery
  - `Batch-UR-B`: general/supplier partner recovery
  - `Batch-UR-C`: 仅在 A/B 通过后恢复 Group B downstream replay

- branch: `codex/sidebar-nav-de-scene-20260424`
- short_sha: `31c62372`
- Layer Target: `Migration Contract Layer`
- Module: `contract_sc_v1 upstream coverage audit`
- Reason: `Group B` 被父合同头缺口阻断后，先回到原 bounded replay 过程，确认 `contract_sc_v1` 是只执行了 `1332` 主包，还是原设计里本来就还有未纳入的 slice/retry/recovery。
- 本批实现：
  - 新增只读审计脚本：
    - `scripts/migration/history_contract_core_gap_audit.py`
  - 新增 Make 入口：
    - `make history.contract.core.gap.audit`
  - 新增产物：
    - `artifacts/migration/history_contract_core_gap_audit_v1.json`
    - `artifacts/migration/ur_a_contract_unreached_asset_rows_v1.csv`
    - `docs/migration_alignment/history_contract_core_gap_report_v1.md`
  - 同步修正：
    - `docs/migration_alignment/history_upstream_recovery_plan_v1.md`
    - `docs/migration_alignment/history_continuity_full_package_matrix_v1.md`
- 事实结论：
  - `contract_sc_v1` 资产总量是 `1492`
  - 历史 bounded payload 七段合计 `1332`
  - 特殊 `12-row` payload 另有 `12`
  - bounded payload 并集共 `1344`
  - `57 retry` 单独存在且不与 bounded 并集重叠
  - bounded + retry 总覆盖 `1401`
  - 仍有 `91` 条合同头资产从未进入任何 replay payload
  - live `sc_demo` probe 结果：
    - bounded rows present = `1332 / 1344`
    - retry57 present = `0 / 57`
- 冻结决策：
  - `UR-A` 不再笼统表述为 “contract core gap”
  - 现在拆成 3 个明确子缺口：
    1. `special_slice_gap_12`
    2. `retry_lane_gap_57`
    3. `never_reached_asset_gap_91`
  - `Group B` 继续保持阻断，直到这 3 条按顺序决定恢复路径

- Reason: `UR-A.2` 后剩余 `35` 条 blocked contract headers 不能再整体视为一个“partner gap”；需要先区分哪些是当前资产内可恢复的 anchor 覆盖缺口，哪些是当前 23 包内根本无源的 source gap，避免继续误写 downstream replay。
- 本批实现：
  - 新增只读审计脚本：
    - `scripts/migration/history_contract_partner_gap_audit.py`
  - 新增 Make 入口：

  - blocked rows = `35`
  - partner source buckets：

    - `no_asset_source_in_current_packages = 31`
  - direction buckets：
    - `both_blank = 3`
    - `both_non_own = 3`
    - `fbf_only_non_own = 5`

    - `成都市龙泉驿区第六中学`（1）
    已在 `partner_master_v1` 中存在来源
- 冻结决策：

    1. `UR-B.1 partner_master_replay_gap_4`
    2. `UR-B.2 source_probe_gap_31`
  - `direction_defer` 继续保持独立 blocker family，不并入 partner replay lane

- 本批目标：
  - 新增只读 `history.business.usable.probe`
  - 将结果拆成 `runtime visible / actionable surface / ownership-link` 三类 gap
  - 形成 `history_continuity_promotion_execution_plan_v1.md`
- 不做：
  - 不直接改业务运行态
  - 不提升 carrier ownership
  - 不改前端消费链

  - `decision = history_business_usable_visible_but_promotion_gaps`
  - `gap_count = 1`

    - `payment_request_no_pending_runtime_states = true`
  - 关键事实：
    - `project_runtime_records = 755`
    - `project_records_with_owner_link = 755`
    - `contract_runtime_records = 6793`
    - `contract_records_with_partner_link = 6793`
    - `payment_request_runtime_records = 27802`
    - `payment_request_state_distribution = {"draft": 27802}`
    - `mail_activity_total = 26`
    - `legacy_workflow_audit_facts = 79702`
- 结论：
  - 用户可见 runtime surface 已成立
  - 第一批 promotion 不应泛化，必须只打 `payment.request` 的 state activation / approval continuity

- short_sha: `5dbd2342`
- Layer Target: `Domain Layer / Migration Replay-Promotion Layer`
- Module: `payment.request historical done-state continuity`
- Reason: user accepted business-fact-first restoration; historical paid truth may be restored directly into new-system `done` without reconstructing old settlement runtime
- 实施边界：

  - promoted rows: `12194`
  - outflow runtime state distribution:

    - `approved = 7`
    - `submit = 46`
    - `draft = 37`

## 2026-04-25 Batch-History-Capability-Promotion-Matrix

- branch: `codex/sidebar-nav-de-scene-20260424`
- short_sha: `5dbd2342`
- Layer Target: `Domain Layer / Page Orchestration Layer / Frontend Delivery Boundary`
- Module: `legacy fact carriers -> formal capability promotion matrix`

  - `ops-visible internal`: receipt income / expense deposit / invoice tax / financing loan / fund daily snapshot
  - `formal user capability`: payment request / payment ledger / treasury ledger / runtime line facts

    - `收款申请` -> `payment.request(type=receive)`
  - added `收款台账` -> `sc.treasury.ledger(direction=in)`
  - kept `收款发票明细` as the detailed receipt invoice capability page under finance
- live validation (`sc_demo`):
  - `smart_construction_core.action_payment_request_pay = 付款申请`
  - `smart_construction_core.action_payment_request_receive = 收款申请`
  - `smart_construction_core.menu_payment_request = 付款申请`
  - `smart_construction_core.menu_payment_request_receive = 收款申请`
  - `smart_construction_core.action_sc_treasury_ledger_income = 收款台账`
  - `smart_construction_core.menu_sc_treasury_ledger_income = 收款台账`

## 2026-04-28 Batch-Frontend-ActionView-Route-Reload-Fix

- branch: `codex/dev-env-run`
- short_sha: `85cf640f`
- Layer Target: `Frontend contract consumer`
- Module: `frontend/apps/web`
- Reason: `用户反馈自定义前端列表首次进入时数据不全，进入详情页再返回列表后数据恢复；排查发现 ActionView 在同组件路由复用时只在筛选/分组状态变化时重新加载，actionId 变化但 route preset 未变化时不会请求新列表数据。`
- completed_step: `ActionView 的 route.fullPath watcher 调整为：路由变化时先同步 route preset，再始终触发 requestLoadPage；避免从一个列表 action 切换到另一个列表 action 时复用旧列表数据或缺失数据。`
- verification:
  - `npm --prefix frontend/apps/web run typecheck`
  - `ENV=test ENV_FILE=.env.prod.sim COMPOSE_PROJECT_NAME=sc-backend-odoo-prod-sim PROJECT=sc-backend-odoo-prod-sim DB_NAME=sc_prod_sim CODEX_MODE=fast COMPOSE_FILES="-f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod-sim.yml" FRONTEND_PROFILE=daily make frontend.restart`
- result: `PASS; 前端已重启，ActionView 路由变化会重新加载当前 action 列表数据。`
- risk: `P2; 某些筛选交互可能触发一次额外列表请求，但可换取列表数据正确性；后续可引入请求序号/去重机制进一步优化。`
- rollback: `回退本批次提交即可恢复原 watcher 行为。`
- next_step: `用浏览器在多个业务列表之间直接切换，确认首次进入列表、详情返回列表、菜单切换列表三种路径的数据一致。`

## 2026-04-28 Batch-Frontend-List-Total-Pagination

- branch: `codex/dev-env-run`
- short_sha: `83721618`
- Layer Target: `Frontend contract consumer`
- Module: `frontend/apps/web`
- Reason: `自定义前端普通列表已经通过后端契约请求 need_total/limit/offset，但页面没有展示总条数，也没有提供普通列表分页交互，用户无法判断列表完整性和继续翻页。`
- completed_step: `ActionView 增加普通列表 offset 状态并接入 api.data list 请求；搜索、排序、筛选和 action 路由切换时重置普通列表页码；ListPage 增加总条数、当前范围、页码、上一页/下一页和跳转控件，并按实际返回记录数校准分页步长，避免契约默认 limit 与后端实际返回条数不一致时跳页。`
- verification:
  - `npm --prefix frontend/apps/web run typecheck`
  - `git diff --check`
  - `make frontend.restart`
  - `Playwright browser: admin/admin 登录 sc_demo，进入 /a/546?menu_id=352，切换列表视图，确认显示 共 771 条/当前 1-40 条/第 1 / 20 页；点击 下一页 后 api.data 请求 offset=40、limit=40、need_total=true，页面显示 当前 41-80 条/第 2 / 20 页。`
- result: `PASS; 自定义普通列表页已具备总条数展示和分页办理能力，翻页请求与后端 offset/limit 契约一致。`
- risk: `P2; 当前页码不写入 URL，详情返回后的页码保持后续可作为独立增强项处理。`
- rollback: `回退本批次提交即可移除普通列表分页控件并恢复原单页列表行为。`
- next_step: `继续用真实业务用户验证高频列表页，确认列表分页、详情进入/返回和办理入口组合路径没有使用级缺口。`

  - `python3 -m py_compile addons/smart_core/app_config_engine/models/app_search_config.py`

- result: `PASS; 自定义前端列表页的搜索分类结构已由业务事实层 search view 驱动，项目合同、结算单、一般合同、项目台账验证通过。`

  - `ENV=test ENV_FILE=.env.prod.sim ... make odoo.recreate` + `FRONTEND_PROFILE=prod-sim make frontend.restart` -> `backend/frontend restarted; frontend ready http://127.0.0.1:5174/`
  - `Playwright browser: wutao/123456 登录 sc_prod_sim；/a/489 搜索菜单包含中文“添加自定义筛选 / 添加自定义分组 / 保存当前搜索”，无 Add Custom/Save Current 英文残留。`

  - `Playwright browser: /a/489 自定义分组选择 partner_id 后 api.data request group_by=partner_id/context group_by=partner_id；当前工具条 facet 文案未展示该自定义分组名，需后续收口 route/toolbar 显示同步。`

- short_sha: `pending`
- Layer Target: `frontend shared search state`
- Module: `frontend/apps/web`
- Reason: `继续完整收口上轮自定义分组：自定义分组请求已经生效，但工具条未展示当前分组 facet；同时验证发现直接从 URL 恢复 group_by 会触发现有 grouped load 链持续加载，因此本轮只收口当前交互态显示，不扩大到 URL 恢复执行层。`
- completed_step: `ActionSurfaceToolbar 增加 activeGroupLabel 兜底显示；ActionView 在执行分组时从契约候选中记录业务显示名，并在 route 同步清掉 activeGroupByField 后继续展示当前分组 facet；保持 group_by 不写入常规 route sync，避免触发 grouped load 持续加载。`
- verification:
  - `corepack pnpm -C frontend/apps/web typecheck` -> `PASS`
  - `rm -rf /tmp/sc-web-build-check && corepack pnpm -C frontend/apps/web exec vite build --outDir /tmp/sc-web-build-check --emptyOutDir true` -> `PASS`
  - `FRONTEND_PROFILE=prod-sim make frontend.restart` -> `frontend ready http://127.0.0.1:5174/`
  - `Playwright browser: wutao/123456 登录 sc_prod_sim；/a/489 选择自定义分组 partner_id 后 api.data request 包含 group_by=partner_id，页面退出加载态，搜索框 facet=按合同方 ×。`
- result: `PASS; 自定义分组当前交互态已可见且不破坏列表可用性。`
- risk: `P2; URL 中 group_wid 能记录分组窗口身份，但当前不从 URL 恢复执行 group_by，因为现有 grouped load 链在直接恢复 group_by 时会持续加载；该能力需后续单独治理。P3; 默认 build 仍受 dist root:root 历史产物权限影响，本轮使用临时 outDir 完成构建验证。`
- rollback: `回退本批次提交并重启前端，即恢复自定义分组不展示 facet 的状态。`
- next_step: `单独治理 grouped route 恢复链路，使 group_by 可安全进入 URL 状态同步。`

- completed_step: `将旧 root 权限 dist 移出静态目录后重新构建 frontend/apps/web/dist；使用 prod-sim overlay 重建 nginx，使 /usr/share/nginx/html 挂载到最新 dist；default.prod-sim.conf 增加 /assets/ 精确资产目录、HTML no-store 响应头和旧资产 404 规则，避免旧 JS/CSS 请求回退到 index.html。`
- verification:

- short_sha: `74555103`
- Layer Target: `Domain Runtime Surface / Migration Promotion`

- Reason: `9 个承载历史业务数据的 runtime surface 未在重建总流程中投影，会直接影响真实用户继续使用业务模型。`
- completed_step: `将 settlement_adjustment、expense_claim、treasury_reconciliation、receipt_income、payment_execution、invoice_registration、financing_loan、general_contract、construction_diary projection 纳入 history_continuity_oneclick，并串联对应 runtime probes；当前 sc_prod_sim 已补跑 projection。`

  - `history.*.runtime.probe` -> `PASS; 9 个 runtime surface gap_count=0`
  - `history.business.usable.probe` -> `PASS; decision=history_business_usable_ready gap_count=0`
  - `verify.portal.envelope_smoke.container` -> `PASS`
  - `verify.portal.ar_ap_company_summary_smoke.container` -> `PASS; rows=771 receivable=657 negative=37`
  - `verify.portal.ar_ap_project_summary_smoke.container` -> `PASS; project_balance_rows=56 tax_rate_rows=7467`
  - `bash -n`, `node --check`, `python3 -m py_compile`, `git diff --check` -> `PASS`
- result: `PASS; runtime surface projection 缺口已关闭，新库业务可用性从 visible_but_promotion_gaps 收口为 ready。`
- risk: `P1; 当前库已补跑投影，后续完整重建需以更新后的 history_continuity_oneclick 为准；AR/AP 基线已更新为完整 runtime projection 后的确定口径。`
- rollback: `回退本批 history_continuity_oneclick projection/probe 串联与 AR/AP smoke 基线改动；如需清理当前库，按各 projection 的 legacy_source_model/source_origin 条件删除对应 runtime rows 后重跑。`
- next_step: `继续跑完整重建验收时，应从 replay 总流程覆盖这些 projection，不再手工补跑。`
- archive_conclusion: `本轮问题不是一次性手工修复。根因是官方重建流程缺少承载历史事实到正式 runtime 业务模型的 projection 步骤；已将 projection 与 runtime probe 纳入 history_continuity_oneclick。因此后续新库重建只要走官方 replay 主流程，不应再因同一原因出现 9 个 runtime surface gaps。若绕过主流程仅跑 carrier/fact replay，问题仍可能复现。`
- future_model_upgrade_rule: `后续若将承载模型升级为系统业务模型，必须同步评估并更新历史重建影响面：projection SQL/ORM 写入目标、唯一键与幂等规则、legacy_source_model/source_origin 映射、菜单/权限/record rule、AR/AP 与业务 smoke 基线、history.business.usable.probe 判据、回滚清理条件。未完成这些评估和验证，不允许声称模型升级对历史重建无影响。`

- verification_update: `wutao/chenshuai shell contract 均含 11 个项目原生页签；chatter.enabled=true；header_buttons 含 共享只读/分享可编辑的内容/提交立项/预算/合同/邀请合作者。`
- browser_precision_acceptance: `real browser wutao project.project/771 custom vs native: custom visible expected tabs=11/11, customMissingExpectedTabs=[], customHiddenExpectedTabs=[], customHeaderChatter=共享只读/分享可编辑的内容/提交立项/发送消息/记录备注/活动, presentDiff={}; artifact=artifacts/browser-real-user-form-structure/project_precision_compare_final_20260429173843/summary.json。`
- complex_interaction_update: `后端 parser 已为 form layout 内 button 节点补齐 action 契约；前端 NativeFormTreeRenderer 只按 native-action 契约触发 runAction，不推断按钮语义；工程量清单页签内 6 个复杂按钮真实浏览器可见，安全导航按钮 工程量清单分析 点击进入 /a/523?action_id=523。`
- native_backfill_correction: `project.project 原生 layout 已有字段时，不再从 visible_fields 回填 补充业务信息，避免污染 native page hierarchy；真实浏览器 hasBackfill=false。`
- language_context_correction: `ui.contract 与 load_view/load_contract 未显式传 lang 时统一使用当前用户 user.lang；task_ids 子视图字段从 Priority/State/Title 收口为 优先级/状态/称谓，selection 同步中文。`
- complex_interaction_acceptance: `real browser wutao project.project/771: tabs=11/11, inlineVisible[导入清单/生成工程结构/生成施工任务/工程量清单分析/重建工程量清单层级/校验工程量清单]=1, afterActionUrl=/a/523?action_id=523, addBefore=1, rowLabelsPresent[优先级/状态/称谓/工程状态]=true; artifact=artifacts/browser-real-user-form-structure/project_complex_interactions_final_20260429T180404/summary.json。`
- structure_dedupe_update: `native form tree 模式关闭外层 headerActions/workflowTransitions/bodyActions/searchFilters，避免与 views.form.layout 内 header/button_box/page buttons 双源渲染；不可见字段不再生成空 字段 section，无标题 group/header 不再补造 信息组/头部。`
- title_container_update: `NativeFormTreeRenderer 支持 container/div/span/h1/h2/h3，恢复 oe_title/h1 内标题字段渲染。`
- structure_acceptance: `real browser wutao project.project/771: 快捷筛选=0, 字段=0, 信息组=0, 头部=0, 共享只读/分享可编辑的内容/提交立项 single occurrence, 名称字段可见, tabs=11/11; artifact=artifacts/browser-real-user-form-structure/project_structure_final_1777486542108/summary.json。`
- interaction_regression_after_structure: `工程量清单 6 个按钮仍为 1 次可见；协作/系统 +新增行 可达；新增行 labels=优先级/状态/称谓/工程状态；artifact=artifacts/browser-real-user-form-structure/project_structure_interaction_regression_1777486585531/summary.json。`
- runtime_language_baseline_gap: `模拟生产库重建流程只激活 zh_CN 和设置用户 user.lang，未在模块安装阶段确定性 --load-language=zh_CN，扩展模块后也未刷新已安装模块翻译；因此原生菜单/原生 view/字段 label 可能继续显示英文。`
- runtime_language_baseline_fix: `prod_sim_oneclick.sh 与 fresh_production_history_init.sh 增加 --load-language=${SC_RUNTIME_LANG:-zh_CN}；新增 ensure_runtime_language_baseline.py 通过 base.language.install 刷新已安装模块翻译并统一用户 lang/tz；新增 runtime_language_baseline_probe.py 与 Makefile 门禁。`
- runtime_language_acceptance: `sc_prod_sim runtime.language.ensure PASS; verify.runtime.language.baseline PASS; admin/wutao/chenshuai=zh_CN/Asia-Shanghai; project.project fields=名称/客户/项目管理员/可见性; form strings=提交立项/预算/合同/执行结构/工程量清单; menus=智能施工 2.0/项目台账（试点）。`
- runtime_language_rebuild_rule: `后续新库必须走 prod_sim_oneclick.sh 或 fresh_production_history_init.sh 主流程；若绕过主流程直接安装模块/恢复数据库，必须显式运行 make runtime.language.ensure 和 make verify.runtime.language.baseline，否则不得声明原生中文基线已完成。`
- statusbar_relation_closure_gap: `项目详情页缺少原生 statusbar；many2one 只有有限下拉和新建入口，缺少搜索更多弹窗；同名新建时底层数据库唯一约束错误可能直接暴露给用户。`
- statusbar_relation_closure_fix: `自定义表单按 views.form.statusbar 渲染通用状态条并隐藏 widget=statusbar 普通字段；many2one schema 增加 search token，FormSection 增加 搜索更多 入口，ContractFormPage 增加 relation-dialog 完整搜索/选择/契约允许的新建闭环；api.data create 和前端错误展示屏蔽数据库原始异常。`
- statusbar_relation_acceptance: `real browser wutao project.project/771: native-statusbar=1, labels=草稿/在建/停工/竣工/结算中/保修期/关闭, many2one 搜索更多入口出现, relation-dialog opened=true, rows=120; pnpm typecheck PASS; api_data.py py_compile PASS。`
- statusbar_visual_refinement: `状态条从普通按钮条改为 chevron 箭头推进形态；契约来源仍为 views.form.statusbar。real browser wutao project.project/771: labels=草稿/在建/停工/竣工/结算中/保修期/关闭, activeCount=1, clip-path=polygon(...), barHeight=40px; pnpm typecheck PASS。`
- relation_search_native_list_alignment: `搜索更多弹窗从前端单列候选按钮改为关系模型 ui.contract(view_type=tree) 驱动的 Select/Create 风格列表表格；客户字段 real browser headers=显示名称/完整名称/工作职位/电话/手机/电子邮件, rowCount=120, selectedCount=1, hasSelectButton=true; pnpm typecheck PASS。`
- relation_search_interaction_alignment: `搜索更多弹窗继续对齐原生 Select/Create 结构与交互：header/body/footer 三段式，右上角关闭，footer=选择/新建/取消+记录数；打开后 selectedCount=0 且选择 disabled，点击行后 selectedCount=1 且选择 enabled，双击行后回填 many2one 并关闭；real browser PASS。`
- relation_search_label_boundary_correction: `纠正前端自行命名 relation 弹窗按钮的问题；后端 relation_entry 新增 ui_labels，前端 FormSection/ContractFormPage 只消费 search_more/dialog_title/search/select/create/cancel/close/empty/record_count 等契约文案。Odoo shell 与 real browser 均确认 labels 来自契约；py_compile/typecheck PASS。`
- project_favorite_widget_alignment: `原生 project.project 表单 is_favorite widget=boolean_favorite 不再作为普通布尔字段显示，表单名称字段前渲染星标；星标 label 来自字段契约 在仪表板上显示项目，点击沿用列表页即时 writeRecord + 失败回滚模式。real browser wutao project.project/771: favoriteCount=1, dashboardTextVisible=0, aria-pressed false->true->false, DB final is_favorite=false; pnpm typecheck PASS。`
- native_structure_gap_checklist: `已建立项目详情页差异清单 D1-D8；第一轮补齐 D1-D4：parser 保留容器 text、widget name/title/bg_color/显隐语义、简单 modifier 结构化为 field_compare/field_truthy、action 无 string 时解析 ir.actions.actions.name；NativeFormTreeRenderer 按契约渲染静态提示/web_ribbon 并消费节点显隐。real browser: 投标管理替代 538, draftAlertVisible=true, ribbonVisible=false, numericButtonVisible=false; py_compile/typecheck PASS。剩余 D5 chatter、D6 widget renderer、D7 stat button 形态、D8 复杂 modifier。`
- native_chatter_contract_alignment: `D5 已补齐：parser 将 class=oe_chatter 提升为 type=chatter 节点，保留 label=沟通记录 与 fields=[message_follower_ids,activity_ids,message_ids]，但不再把 chatter 字段作为普通 children；views.form.chatter 同步 label/fields/actions/features。NativeFormTreeRenderer 提供 chatter slot，ContractFormPage 仅消费契约 label/actions。contract probe: chatter_nodes=1, children_len=0, raw_chatter_field_nodes=0；real browser: native-chatter-block=1, buttons=发送消息/记录备注/活动, 普通表单 label 无 关注者/活动/消息；py_compile/typecheck PASS。剩余 D6/D7/D8。`
- native_widget_renderer_alignment: `D6 已补齐首批通用 widget renderer：FormSection schema 透传 widget；selection widget=radio 渲染为 radio 组，readonly 时仍呈现 disabled radio；many2one_avatar_user/employee 渲染 avatar 入口形态；many2many_tags 在 relation fallback 中展示 tag 形态，文案仍走契约/adapter。real browser wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim project.project/771: radioCount=3, radioDisabledCount=3, tagEditorCount=1, avatarCount=1, statusbarCount=7, chatterCount=1, console/page errors=0; screenshot=artifacts/playwright/screenshots/project_771_widget_alignment_d6.png; pnpm typecheck PASS。剩余 D7 stat button 形态、D8 复杂 modifier、daterange 成对日期契约。`
- native_smart_button_shape_alignment: `D7 已补齐首批 smart button 形态：NativeFormTreeRenderer 消费 action.level=smart 与 layout class=oe_button_box，渲染 native-actions--smart/native-action-btn--smart，执行仍走 native-action 契约事件。real browser wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim project.project/771: smartAreaCount=2, smartButtonCount=9, labels=预算/合同/执行结构/工程量清单/预算成本/物资采购/结算财务/投标管理, minHeight=54px, statusbarCount=7, chatterCount=1, console/page errors=0; screenshot=artifacts/playwright/screenshots/project_771_smart_buttons_d7.png; pnpm typecheck PASS。剩余 D8 复杂 modifier、daterange 成对日期契约。`
- native_modifier_daterange_contract_alignment: `D8 已补齐首批复杂 modifier 与 daterange 契约：parser 将 not/and/or/compare/in/not in 与 attrs prefix domain 结构化为 field_truthy/field_compare/not/all/any/static；daterange 输出 widget_semantics={kind:date_range,start_field,end_field}，前端只按该契约渲染双日期输入。contract probe: user_id.readonly=not(field_truthy(active)), date_start.required=any(field_truthy(date_start),field_truthy(date)), date_start end_field=date；real browser wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim project.project/771: dateRangeCount=1, dateRangeInputCount=2, 设置页 not alias_name 生效且电子邮件别名隐藏, radioCount=3, statusbarCount=7, chatterCount=1, console/page errors=0; screenshot=artifacts/playwright/screenshots/project_771_modifier_daterange_d8.png; py_compile/typecheck PASS。`

## 2026-04-30 Batch-Project-Native-List-Alignment-L1

- branch: `codex/frontend-native-business-alignment`
- short_sha: `eaf37c9b`
- Layer Target: `Backend Tree/Search Contract + Frontend Generic List Renderer`
- Module: `addons/smart_core`, `frontend/apps/web`
- Reason: `列表页必须和详情页一样由 Odoo tree/search 契约驱动；前端不能再用字段名/硬编码文案判断收藏列和列语义。`
- completed_step: `tree 契约白名单补齐 columns_schema/capabilities/default_order；parser 输出列 label/string/type/widget/selection/modifier；项目列表治理层保留并补齐 columns_schema，将 is_favorite 纳入首列并定义 widget=boolean_favorite；前端 ListPage 只按 ColumnOption.widget 渲染收藏星标，移除 我的收藏/已收藏/加入我的项目收藏/取消项目收藏 等页面自造文案。`
- verification:
  - `python3 -m py_compile addons/smart_core/utils/contract_governance.py addons/smart_core/app_config_engine/models/app_view_config.py addons/smart_core/app_config_engine/models/contract_mixin.py 'addons/smart_core/app_config_engine/services/view_Parser/parsers Tree Form.py'` -> `PASS`
  - `pnpm --dir frontend/apps/web run typecheck` -> `PASS`
  - `ui.contract action_id=506` -> `PASS; columns_schema_count=8; is_favorite.widget=boolean_favorite; columns[0]=is_favorite`
  - `real browser wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim /a/506` -> `PASS; headers=在仪表板上显示项目/项目名称/...; rows=80; favoriteButtons=80; hardcoded 已收藏 absent; console/page errors=0; screenshot=artifacts/playwright/screenshots/project_list_alignment_l1.png`
- result: `PASS_WITH_KNOWN_LIST_GAPS; L1-L3 已闭环，列表收藏列与列 schema 改为后端契约驱动。`
- remaining_gaps: `L4 row_classes 装饰未消费；L5 搜索/分组/分页工具栏仍需契约化；L6 row_actions 形态与交互仍需原生对比。`
- rollback: `回退 contract_governance 项目列表 schema 补齐、tree 白名单/parser columns_schema 扩展、ListPage ColumnOption.widget 消费改动；将项目列表收藏列回到旧 fallback 状态。`
- list_toolbar_label_contract_alignment: `L5 首批已补齐：项目列表治理层输出 search.ui_labels，前端 ActionSurfaceToolbar 通过 uiLabels 消费搜索占位、菜单标题、空态、自定义筛选控件、收藏/分组/排序/新建等文案；action 506 contract probe: ui_labels keys=24；real browser wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim /a/506: dropdownTitles=筛选/分组方式/收藏夹, customPanel contains 选择字段/添加/取消, create=新建, console/page errors=0, screenshot=artifacts/playwright/screenshots/project_list_toolbar_labels_l5.png。L4 对 action 506 不适用：当前原生树无 decoration-*，row_classes=[]。剩余 L6 row_actions 形态与交互。`
- list_row_action_contract_alignment: `L6 已补齐：parser fallback row action 使用 label=打开，并输出 trigger=row_click/display_mode=row_click；项目列表治理层确保 open_form row action 继承 search.ui_labels.row_open；前端 useActionViewNavigationRuntime 先检查 views.tree.row_actions 中 row/open/row_click 契约，再执行行点击导航，不再无条件前端推断。contract probe action 506: row_actions[0]={name:open_form,label:打开,trigger:row_click,display_mode:row_click,payload.view_mode=form}; real browser wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim first row click /a/506 -> /r/project.project/64?menu_id=0&action_id=506, statusbarCount=7, console/page errors=0, screenshot=artifacts/playwright/screenshots/project_list_row_action_l6.png。`
- list_internal_label_contract_alignment: `L7 已补齐：后端 search.ui_labels 扩展 loading/error、分页、批量选择、分组、列选择与列保存状态文案；ActionView 将 toolbarUiLabels 传入 ListPage，ListPage 统一通过 uiLabel(key,fallback,vars) 消费契约，fallback 仅作兼容。contract probe load_view(tree): missing ui_labels keys=[]；real browser wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim /a/506: 列/上一页/下一页/跳转/第1页/共n条 可见，已收藏 absent，console/page errors=0，screenshot=artifacts/playwright/screenshots/project_list_internal_labels_l7.png。`
- list_status_cell_role_contract_alignment: `L8 已补齐：前端不再用 field name contains state/status/stage 推断状态徽标；后端 columns_schema 输出 lifecycle_state.cell_role=status、is_favorite.cell_role=favorite，并补 search.ui_labels.group_sort_desc/group_sort_asc；ListPage 仅按 column.cellRole 或 list_profile.status_field 渲染 status-badge。contract probe PASS；real browser wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim /a/506: statusBadges=80, firstStatusText=进行中, console/page errors=0, screenshot=artifacts/playwright/screenshots/project_list_status_cell_role_l8.png。`
- list_display_semantics_contract_alignment: `L9 已补齐：前端 ListPage 不再调用 semanticValueByField，也不再按字段名/值推导状态文本、金额、百分比等业务展示；列表单元格显示优先消费 columns_schema.selection，状态色调消费 columns_schema.tone_by_value。contract probe: lifecycle_state.selection[in_progress]=在建, tone_by_value.in_progress=info；real browser wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim /a/506: statusBadges=80, firstStatusText=在建, firstStatusClass=status-badge tone-info, console/page errors=0, screenshot=artifacts/playwright/screenshots/project_list_display_semantics_l9.png。`
- list_grouping_contract_alignment: `L10 已补齐：后端 list_profile.grouping 输出 sample_limits/default_sample_limit/sort(key=count,directions=desc|asc)，前端 ListPage 按 grouping 契约渲染每组条数选项与排序方向；ActionView grouped_table 在 active group_by 且有 grouping 契约时启用；route sync 保留 group_by；api.data group fingerprint 只纳入稳定业务 ctx 白名单，剔除路由游标导致的重载循环。contract/API probe PASS；real browser wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim /a/506?group_by=lifecycle_state: groupBlocks=2, options=每组3/5/8条, sort=按数量降序->按数量升序, uniqueFp=1, console/page errors=0, screenshot=artifacts/playwright/screenshots/project_list_grouping_contract_l10.png。`
- list_group_route_preset_contract_alignment: `L11 已补齐：route preset 恢复分组列表状态时不再使用前端本地 [3,5,8]/desc 默认值，改为消费 list_profile.grouping.sample_limits/default_sample_limit/sort.directions/default_direction；ActionView 将 listProfile 传入 route preset runtime。前端按 prod-sim profile 重启：FRONTEND_PROFILE=prod-sim make frontend.restart，proxy=http://localhost:18069，db=sc_prod_sim；real browser wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim /a/506?group_by=lifecycle_state: options=每组3/5/8条, sort=按数量降序->按数量升序, finalUrl 保留 group_by 并同步 group_sort=asc, group_fp=31ceecc639e63a6b29fa1c155d43ace2a0aab37c 稳定, console/page errors=0, screenshot=artifacts/playwright/screenshots/project_list_grouping_contract_l11.png；pnpm typecheck/py_compile/git diff --check PASS。`
- list_group_route_interaction_contract_alignment: `L12 已补齐：分组列表交互与 URL sync 不再使用前端本地默认省略规则；resolveGroupSampleLimitTransition/resolveGroupSortTransition/buildActionViewListStatePatch 均消费 list_profile.grouping 的 allowed/default 语义。前端按 prod-sim profile 重启后真实浏览器验证：选择 每组5条 -> URL group_sample_limit=5，回到契约默认 每组3条 -> group_sample_limit 删除；排序 asc -> URL group_sort=asc，回到契约默认 desc -> group_sort 删除；options=每组3/5/8条；console/page errors=0；screenshot=artifacts/playwright/screenshots/project_list_group_route_contract_l12.png；pnpm typecheck/git diff --check PASS。`
- list_search_custom_label_contract_alignment: `L13 已补齐：搜索菜单内 添加自定义筛选/添加自定义分组/加入收藏 不再以前端本地文案为主源；后端 search.ui_labels 增加 custom_filter/custom_group/favorite_save，前端 customSearchCapabilities 从 uiLabels 消费。prod-sim Odoo 重启后真实浏览器验证：接口响应含 custom_filter/custom_group/favorite_save，页面渲染 添加自定义筛选/添加自定义分组/加入收藏，console/page errors=0，screenshot=artifacts/playwright/screenshots/project_list_search_custom_labels_l13.png；py_compile/typecheck/git diff --check PASS。`
- list_scoped_metric_contract_alignment: `L14 已补齐：项目列表 scoped metrics 不再由前端扫描 stage_id/state/status/kanban_state/health_state 或中文完成关键词、金额字段名候选；后端 semantic_page.list_semantics 输出 status_field 与 metric_fields，前端 useActionViewProjectMetricRuntime 只消费 list profile/list column options 的 selection/tone_by_value/metric_fields。prod-sim Odoo 重启后真实浏览器验证：status_field=lifecycle_state，metric_fields=contract_income_total/contract_amount/dashboard_invoice_amount/budget_total，页面加载项目行与状态标签，console/page errors=0，screenshot=artifacts/playwright/screenshots/project_list_metric_contract_l14.png；py_compile/typecheck/git diff --check PASS。`
- list_batch_policy_contract_alignment: `L15 已补齐：项目列表 active/assignee/批量范围语义不再由前端从 fields 推断 active/user_id，也不再在范围统计和 active filter 中硬编码 active 字段；后端 list_profile 与 semantic_page.list_semantics 输出 batch_policy(active_field/assignee_field/archive_value/activate_value/assignee_options/delete_mode/available_actions)，前端加载预检、active filter domain、project scope totals 只消费 batch_policy。prod-sim Odoo 与前端重启后真实浏览器验证：active_field=active，assignee_field=user_id，assignee_options.model=res.users，available_actions=archive/activate，delete_mode=none，console/page errors=0，screenshot=artifacts/playwright/screenshots/project_list_batch_policy_l15.png；py_compile/typecheck/git diff --check/source scan PASS。`
- list_batch_action_execution_alignment: `L16 已补齐：列表选择栏批量归档/激活由 list_profile.batch_policy.available_actions 与 permissions.effective.rights.write 驱动，前端执行 api.data.batch 时 idempotency extra 使用 batch_policy.active_field，不再硬编码 active；批量结果反馈提升到 ActionView 顶层，列表刷新为 ok/empty 后用户仍可见。真实浏览器 wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim：选择项目 514 -> 批量归档 succeeded=1 failed=0；按项目名进入 archived -> 批量激活 succeeded=1 failed=0；console/page errors=0；screenshot=artifacts/playwright/screenshots/project_list_batch_action_l16.png。残留：admin 全局 write=true 但部分记录级规则仍可能 PERMISSION_DENIED，当前通过批量结果反馈呈现，后续若要求执行前禁用需补 record-level executability 契约。`
- list_selection_action_bar_correction: `L17 已纠正：行选中后的选择栏不再混入 contractActionButtons 中的记录业务按钮（例如 执行结构），只消费 list_profile.batch_policy.available_actions 生成批量归档/批量激活。真实浏览器 wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim：选中一条项目后 selectionBarText=已选1条/批量归档/批量激活/清空，执行结构 absent，console/page errors=0，screenshot=artifacts/playwright/screenshots/project_list_selection_actions_l17.png；typecheck/git diff --check PASS。`
- list_batch_policy_boundary_correction: `L17 follow-up 已纠正边界错位：撤回前端用 permissions.effective.rights.write 二次裁剪 batch_policy 的逻辑；后端将治理后的 batch_policy 同步下发到 list_profile.batch_policy 与 surface_policies.batch_policy，保证 /a/506 与 /s/projects.list 两个入口一致。结论：permissions.effective.rights 是通用权限事实，batch_policy 是已治理页面动作契约，前端只消费 batch_policy，不从 permissions 重新计算。真实浏览器 wutao/123456 两个入口均显示 已选1条/批量归档/批量激活/清空。`
- same_model_action_list_governance: `L18 已补齐同模型多 action 入口：/a/589 默认 head.view_type=kanban 但契约包含 views.tree/list 时，后端仍按 primary_model=project.project 进入列表治理并输出 list_profile.batch_policy/surface_policies.batch_policy。真实浏览器 wutao/123456 /a/589?menu_id=353&action_id=589&view_mode=list 选中一条后 .batch-bar=已选1条/批量归档/批量激活/清空，执行结构 absent；默认 URL 契约也含 available_actions=archive/activate。权限边界结论保持：permissions.effective.rights 仅为通用权限事实和后端治理输入，前端不得用其创建或删除页面动作。`
- business_fact_entry_dedupe: `业务事实层已收敛项目入口：删除开发期 action_sc_project_kanban_lifecycle 源定义，项目菜单/能力/default scene/scenes 均指向唯一 action_sc_project_list；菜单显示名收口为 项目台账，去除 项目台账（试点）/项目看板（生命周期）/项目看板与概览入口/Hotfix 痕迹。新增 smart_construction_core 17.0.0.4 post-migration 清理旧外部 ID 和旧 act_window；sc_prod_sim 已升级 smart_construction_core,smart_construction_scene 并重启。运行库探针：legacy_imd_count=0, legacy_actions_count=0, canonical action id=506 name=项目台账 view_mode=tree,kanban,form, menu_sc_project_project.action=ir.actions.act_window(506), default tile scene_key=projects.list。`
- list_favorite_mutation_contract_alignment: `L19 已补齐收藏列剩余字段名推导：前端 resolveListColumnOptions 不再因 fields.is_favorite 自动补列，ActionView 不再写死 project.project/is_favorite/vals.is_favorite；后端 columns_schema[is_favorite] 下发 mutation(type=field_toggle,operation=record_write,field=is_favorite,value_type=boolean)，ListPage 将字段传回通用 toggle handler。prod-sim 后端和前端重启后真实浏览器 wutao/123456 /a/506?active_filter=active：rows=80, favoriteButtons=80, favorite toggle round-trip favorite-toggle->active->favorite-toggle, .batch-bar=已选1条/批量归档/批量激活/清空 且执行结构 absent, console/page errors=0, screenshot=artifacts/playwright/screenshots/project_list_contract_favorite_l19.png；py_compile/typecheck PASS。`
- list_business_label_contract_alignment: `L20 已补齐后端业务用语收敛：contract_governance 对字段/columns_schema/list_profile/semantic_page 统一归一 is_favorite=我的收藏、display_name=名称，避免前端暴露 在仪表板上显示项目/显示名称 这类系统文案。prod-sim 后端和前端重启后真实浏览器 wutao/123456：/a/506 表头=我的收藏/项目名称/项目经理/业主单位/当前阶段/项目执行阶段/开始日期/结束日期，页面无 在仪表板上显示项目/显示名称；项目详情 relation 搜索更多弹窗表头=名称/完整名称/工作职位/电话/手机/电子邮件，显示名称 absent；console/page errors=0，screenshot=artifacts/playwright/screenshots/project_list_business_labels_l20.png。py_compile/typecheck/isolated governance probe PASS；unittest 直接运行受 Odoo import 环境限制。`
- relation_inline_create_save_boundary: `L21 已明确 many2one 用户输入语义：输入/回车/失焦只触发搜索或精确匹配已有记录，不创建关联记录；无匹配文本作为待创建关系暂存，只有主表单保存通过前置校验并进入保存链时，才按 relation_entry.inline_create 契约创建关联记录并写回主记录。后端 relation_entry.inline_create 输出 enabled/create_on_no_match/name_field/value_source/reason_code，文案改为 保存时创建“%s”；前端保存按钮把契约允许的待创建关系文本视为表单变更，但不越过后端契约自行判断可创建模型。真实浏览器 wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim project.project/750：输入 保存时创建客户* 后 beforeInputCreates=0、afterInputCreates=0、保存按钮 enabled；点击保存阶段出现且仅出现 res.partner create，createdId=8057，project.partner_id=8057；随后项目 partner_id 已恢复为 false，验收 partner 已通过 odoo.shell.exec sudo unlink + env.cr.commit 清理，remaining_save_time_partners=0。脏历史记录 project.project/771 被 one2many 合同明细校验拦截，未触发 create，结论符合 主表单保存不成立则不得先创建关联记录。py_compile/typecheck PASS；前端按 prod-sim 重启。`
- relation_quick_input_match_correction: `L22 已纠正 many2one 快速输入匹配语义：完整相等不再是唯一自动回填条件；优先完整相等，若无完整相等但搜索结果唯一，则直接回填该唯一记录；若搜索结果多条，则不得静默取第一条，也不得显示 保存时创建 提示或保存时创建新记录，保存时打开 搜索更多 弹窗并提示用户选择具体记录。真实浏览器 wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim project.project/750：临时创建 快速输入唯一客户 1777525200 后输入 快速输入唯一客户 自动回填完整名称且 create=0，验收 partner 8058 已 sudo unlink + commit 清理；输入 四川 后 inlineCreateHint=0，保存打开 relation-dialog rows=120，提示 客户存在多个匹配记录，请选择具体记录，createAfter=0，console errors=0。pnpm typecheck PASS；前端按 prod-sim 重启。`
- relation_input_fill_timing_correction: `L23 已纠正真实用户输入期间回填问题：输入事件只更新 relationKeywords 并异步搜索候选，不再在 setRelationKeyword/queryMany2oneInline 中主动 setMany2oneOption；唯一结果回填收口到 commit（Enter/blur）或保存解析阶段。真实浏览器 wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim project.project/750：输入 快速输入提交回填客户 后等待 1300ms，输入框仍保持用户原文；按 Enter 后回填 快速输入提交回填客户 1777526300；输入 四川 等待/Enter 后输入框保持 四川 并打开 relation-dialog rows=120；create=0，console errors=0。验收 partner 8060 已 sudo unlink + commit 清理；pnpm typecheck PASS；前端按 prod-sim 重启。`
- relation_maintenance_create_surface_convergence: `L24 已收敛 many2one 新建并维护页面的技术面：create profile 下后端契约治理将 active/partner_gid/additional_info/same_vat_partner_id/same_company_registry_partner_id 等维护噪声字段标记为 technical+hidden，将记录依赖 object/server/smart 按钮标记 CREATE_PROFILE_REQUIRES_RECORD，将归档 web_ribbon 标记 CREATE_PROFILE_STATE_WIDGET；NativeFormTreeRenderer 递归子节点只消费 isNodeVisible，不做业务字段推断。真实浏览器 wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim project.project/750 -> res.partner 维护创建页：foundBad=[], visibleButtonTexts=[], ribbonTexts=[], hasArchiveInForm=false, console errors=0；contract probe: active/partner_gid/same_vat 均为 technical+hidden。py_compile/typecheck/git diff --check PASS。`
- supplier_maintenance_account_required_closure: `L25 已打通供应商维护创建：create profile 下后端契约治理将 property_account_receivable_id/property_account_payable_id 作为会计 property 技术字段标记为 technical+hidden，并在隐藏收敛后重建 field_policies/action_policies/validation_rules，避免不可见会计默认字段继续阻断用户提交；前端 collectWritableValues 只提交契约可见可写字段，createRecord 同步透传 head.context 到 intent 顶层与 params，确保 action 默认 default_supplier_rank/default_is_company 生效。真实浏览器 wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim /f/res.partner/new?action_id=314：填写名称后保存成功跳转 /f/res.partner/8065，页面无 应收账款/应付账款 必填错误，api.data.create context 含 default_supplier_rank=1/default_is_company=true；DB 验证 supplier_rank=1,is_company=true,payable=211000 应付账款,receivable=121000 应收账款；验收 partner 8065 已 unlink 清理，remaining=[]。py_compile/typecheck/git diff --check PASS。`
- native_alignment_acceptance_closure: `本轮详情页/列表页/维护创建页对齐迭代已收口。环境：prod-sim Odoo/db/redis/nginx healthy，frontend prod-sim 运行于 127.0.0.1:5174。Code Gate：py_compile contract_governance.py/api_data.py/contract_Parser.py/parsers Tree Form.py/app_view_config.py PASS；pnpm --dir frontend/apps/web run typecheck PASS；git diff --check PASS。Browser Gate：项目详情页 project.project/750 statusbar=7, smartButton=9, chatter=1, 信息组重复=0, 核心页签覆盖 描述/设置/协作/系统；项目列表 /a/506 rows=80,favoriteButtons=80,业务表头 我的收藏/项目名称/项目经理 可见，选择栏 .batch-bar=已选80条/批量归档/批量激活/清空，未泄漏 执行结构；供应商维护 /f/res.partner/new?action_id=314 保存成功，未出现 应收账款/应付账款 必填阻断。DB Gate：验收 partner 8066 已 unlink，leftover_acceptance_partners=[]；供应商 action default_get 返回 receivable=6,payable=14,supplier_rank=1,is_company=true。结论：本轮可进入提交/合并准备；后续新增页面仍按“原生视图 -> 后端契约治理 -> 前端无脑渲染”边界继续推进。`
- fresh_rebuild_legacy_portal_menu_closure: `新库重建后开发期 portal 原生菜单复现的根因是 smart_construction_portal 仍在 manifest 安装 views/portal_menu.xml，安装阶段会确定性创建 工作台/生命周期驾驶舱/能力矩阵 三个旧菜单及 act_url。已将 portal 菜单 XML 从安装源删除并移除文件，smart_construction_portal 升级至 17.0.1.1，新增 post-migration 清理 3 个旧 menu XMLID 与 3 个旧 action XMLID；能力矩阵入口契约从 menu_xmlid/action_xmlid 改为 scene_key=portal.capability_matrix, route=/s/portal.capability_matrix，相关 scene seed/orchestration/tile/service/fallback/config/contract snapshot 同步收口。已有库验证：sc_prod_sim 升级日志确认删除 menu ids 424/425/426 与 act_url ids 643/644/645；运行库探针 legacy_xmlid_count=0, capability_payload={route:/s/portal.capability_matrix,scene_key:portal.capability_matrix}；verify.overview.entry 与 verify.overview.logic PASS。全新库验证：sc_fresh_portal_menu_gate_20260430161005 从 init db 安装生产模块集合 smart_construction_bootstrap,smart_core,smart_scene,smart_construction_core,smart_construction_custom,smart_construction_portal,smart_construction_scene,smart_license_core,smart_owner_core,smart_owner_bundle,smart_construction_bundle,smart_construction_seed，安装日志中 smart_construction_portal 仅加载 portal_params.xml 与 portal_templates.xml，未加载 portal_menu.xml；探针 portal_state=installed, legacy_xmlid_count=0, legacy_xmlids=[], capability_payload={route:/s/portal.capability_matrix,scene_key:portal.capability_matrix}。结论：后续新库重建不会再由模块安装流程生成这批开发期 portal 原生菜单，已有库通过模块升级清理。`
- form_attachment_contract_closure: `P18 已补齐：后端 form parser 将 chatter-enabled form 视为 attachment-capable，输出 views.form.attachments 的 upload/download intent、max_bytes、accepted_types 与 ui_labels；ContractFormPage 仅消费该契约渲染上传/下载，不按模型名或前端 DOM 推导附件能力；form_action_path_acceptance.js 增加真实浏览器附件路径，创建安全 txt fixture -> 页面上传 -> chatter.timeline 回显 -> 下载 -> 内容一致校验。验证：py_compile parsers Tree Form.py/file_upload.py/file_download.py PASS；pnpm typecheck PASS；node --check PASS；sc_prod_sim smart_core 升级并重启 frontend prod-sim；real browser wutao/123456 project.project/771 P15/P16/P17/P18 全 PASS，artifact=artifacts/form-action-path/20260430T103816/summary.json，console_errors=0。数据清理：L4 form chatter/activity/attachment 前缀验收记录已 sudo unlink，cleanup_after messages=0, activities=0, attachments=0。下一步矩阵剩余 L4 P19 body/tab server action buttons，然后进入 P21/P22 role/state coverage。`
- form_body_action_contract_closure: `P19 已补齐验收：form_action_path_acceptance.js 切换原生派生 工程量清单 页签，点击非 smart body action 工程量清单分析，要求发生导航后回到 project.project/771 继续执行后续路径；该路径复用 NativeFormTreeRenderer native-action -> ContractFormPage runAction 链路，未引入前端业务判断。验证：node --check PASS；pnpm typecheck PASS；real browser wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim project.project/771 P15/P16/P19/P17/P18 全 PASS，artifact=artifacts/form-action-path/20260430T104130/summary.json，console_errors=0。数据清理：新增 L4 form chatter/activity/attachment 前缀记录已 sudo unlink，cleanup_after messages=0, activities=0, attachments=0。矩阵下一步进入 P21/P22 role/state/error coverage，再扩到 M2-M5。`
- form_role_state_matrix_closure: `P21/P22 已补齐首轮 L5 验收：新增 scripts/verify/form_role_state_acceptance.js，真实浏览器分别登录 wutao/chenshuai/caisiqi/zhaowei/yangdesheng，读取 system.init.role_surface.role_code 与 load_contract 交付契约，打开 project.project 表单并核对 statusbar/smart/chatter/attachment 入口可达；P21 五个真实用户全部 PASS。P22 覆盖当前 lifecycle_state 全量 selection：draft=771、in_progress=755，并临时创建 paused=873、done=874、closing=875、warranty=876、closed=877 fixture，浏览器核对活动状态条 label 与契约 label 一致，7/7 PASS。artifact=artifacts/form-role-state/20260430T105354/summary.json，console_errors=0。数据清理：L5 State Matrix 临时项目及其 mail.alias/mail.message 已 sudo unlink，remaining_l5_state_matrix_projects=0。下一步：同一矩阵推广到 M2-M5，并补 P20/P24/P25 错误/并发/恢复深水区。`
- form_model_tier_reachability_closure: `L6 首批 M2-M5 代表模型表面可达性已验证：新增 scripts/verify/form_model_tier_acceptance.js，先用 load_contract 读取交付契约，再真实浏览器打开自定义 /r 表单并等待 loading 完成，断言 contractOk/hasRenderableSurface/noVisibleError。样本：M2 payment.request/28489 action=585，M3 purchase.order/9 action=549，M4 sc.legacy.receipt.income.fact/7220 action=561，M5 sc.dictionary/5 action=619。结果：4/4 PASS，artifact=artifacts/form-model-tier/20260430T110612/summary.json，console_errors=0。边界：本批只证明 M2-M5 不再停留在 M1 项目页，已具备契约和表单表面可达性；各模型 create/edit/submit/approve/line-edit/readonly drill-in 仍需后续按矩阵深化。`
- form_model_error_recovery_closure: `M2-M5 P20/P24/P25 已补首轮真实浏览器验收：新增 scripts/verify/form_model_error_recovery_acceptance.js，样本同 M2-M5 代表模型。P20 打开 /f/<model>/new 并点击保存，要求友好必填/创建失败提示且仍停留 new，4/4 PASS；P25 对既有记录执行 reload 与 direct deep link recovery，4/4 PASS；P24 先暴露 CONTRACT_MISSING，随后按契约优先补齐 form edit record_version={strategy:write_date_if_match,token_field:write_date,request_param:if_match}，generic api.data write 支持 stale token 409 RECORD_VERSION_CONFLICT，ContractFormPage 仅在契约存在时读取并提交 if_match，不从 write_date 字段自行推断。prod-sim 注意：前端代理 18069，必须重启 sc-backend-odoo-prod-sim-odoo-1 才能验证新后端代码。最终 artifact=artifacts/form-model-error-recovery/20260430T112735/summary.json，decision=pass，console_errors=0。`
- form_m2_payment_request_business_action_closure: `M2 payment.request/28489 交易表单业务动作契约已补首轮：smart_construction_core 暴露 smart_core_form_business_actions hook，page_assembler 将行业 available_actions 注入 views.form.header_buttons/business_actions，ContractFormPage 仅消费契约 mutation/allowed/reason，不写支付单特例。提交审批当前由后端声明 allowed=false, reason_code=PAYMENT_ATTACHMENTS_REQUIRED, suggested_action=upload_attachment；payment.request.execute 捕获 [SC_GUARD:*] 并返回同一 reason_code/suggested_action。验证：py_compile reason_codes.py/payment_request_approval.py/payment_request_execute.py/core_extension.py/page_assembler.py PASS；pnpm typecheck PASS；node --check form_m2_payment_request_acceptance.js PASS；git diff --check PASS；prod-sim smart_core 与 smart_construction_core 顺序升级并重启 Odoo/frontend；real browser wutao/123456 artifact=artifacts/form-m2-payment-request/20260430T114557/summary.json，pass=true，unexpected_console_errors=0。边界：本轮只关闭 M2 代表支付申请的 submit-blocked 路径，审批成功、驳回原因、附件上传后提交成功、多角色审批矩阵仍为后续 M2 L4/L5。`
- form_m2_payment_attachment_next_blocker_closure: `M2 payment.request/28489 附件前置路径已补齐：payment.request 加入 file.upload/file.download 行业白名单；smart_core_form_business_actions 对支付申请同步下发 views.form.attachments；ContractFormPage 通用协作区支持 attachment-only contract，不再要求 chatter action 存在才显示附件工具。真实浏览器上传 txt 附件、timeline 回显、下载内容一致；上传后提交契约从 PAYMENT_ATTACHMENTS_REQUIRED 推进为 P0_PAYMENT_SETTLEMENT_NOT_READY，execute 同步返回 reason_code=P0_PAYMENT_SETTLEMENT_NOT_READY,suggested_action=complete_settlement_approval。验证：py_compile reason_codes.py/payment_request_available_actions.py/payment_request_approval.py/core_extension.py/page_assembler.py PASS；pnpm typecheck PASS；node --check PASS；git diff --check PASS；artifact=artifacts/form-m2-payment-request/20260430T115623/summary.json，pass=true，unexpected_console_errors=0。数据清理：验收附件 M2 payment request attachment acceptance 1777550191187.txt 已 sudo unlink，remaining=0。边界：成功提交仍未关闭，当前样本被 settlement STO2600005 state=submit 正确阻断，下一轮需要结算已审批样本或受控 fixture。`
- form_m2_payment_funding_guard_closure: `M2 payment.request/28489 继续受控推进提交路径：临时将 settlement STO2600005 从 submit 调整为 approve 后，真实浏览器上传附件并执行提交，暴露下一层资金承载门禁。已将 payment_request._check_project_funding_gate 中普通 UserError 收敛为标准 guard：P0_PAYMENT_FUNDING_NOT_READY/P0_PAYMENT_FUNDING_BASELINE_INVALID/P0_PAYMENT_FUNDING_CAP_EXCEEDED，并补充 reason meta suggested_action=setup_project_funding/fix_project_funding_baseline/adjust_payment_amount_or_funding。available_actions 与 execute 对资金门禁返回一致 reason_code=P0_PAYMENT_FUNDING_NOT_READY,suggested_action=setup_project_funding。验证：py_compile reason_codes.py/payment_request.py/payment_request_available_actions.py/payment_request_approval.py PASS；pnpm typecheck PASS；git diff --check PASS；artifact=artifacts/form-m2-payment-request-funding-guard/20260430T120232/summary.json，pass=true，unexpected_console_errors=0。数据清理：payment.request/28489 恢复 draft/no，settlement STO2600005 恢复 submit，验收附件 M2 payment funding guard fixture 1777550558797.txt 已删除，attachments_remaining=0。边界：成功提交仍未关闭，下一轮需要 funding-ready 项目夹具或真实样本。`
- form_m2_payment_advisory_policy_correction: `已纠正付款申请提交策略边界：附件缺失、结算未审批、资金承载未就绪在当前阶段不再默认强阻断，后端统一输出 warning_message/advisory_warnings/advisory_reason_codes，submit 契约为 allowed=true/reason_code=OK，execute 提交返回 200 并携带 advisory warnings；前端仅展示后端 warning_message，不再自行判断。保留强阻断参数 sc.payment.force_block_all 与 sc.payment.force_block.<reason_code_lowercase>，临时启用 sc.payment.force_block.payment_attachments_required=True 验证 action_submit 会被 PAYMENT_ATTACHMENTS_REQUIRED 阻断，随后恢复 False。原生视图“结算额度不足”文案已从“系统将阻止提交/完成”改为“系统将提示风险，是否继续办理由审批人判断”。验证：py_compile PASS；pnpm typecheck PASS；node --check form_m2_payment_request_acceptance.js PASS；git diff --check PASS；prod-sim smart_construction_core 已升级并重启 Odoo/frontend；真实浏览器 wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim artifact=artifacts/form-m2-payment-request/20260430T123639/summary.json，pass=true，advisory codes=PAYMENT_ATTACHMENTS_REQUIRED/P0_PAYMENT_SETTLEMENT_NOT_READY/P0_PAYMENT_FUNDING_NOT_READY，execute status=200。数据清理：payment.request/28489 恢复 draft/no，验收附件 remaining=0。`
- form_m2_payment_approval_decision_closure: `继续补齐提交后的审批路径：新增 payment.request.action_approval_decision，后端根据 validation_status 分流 waiting/pending=tier 审批通过、validated=最终批准、no 且无 review=审批人直接批准；available_actions 对提交态 approve 输出 allowed=true/reason_code=OK 并携带 advisory_warnings，PaymentRequestApproveHandler 改为调用 action_approval_decision。前端仍只消费 payment.request.execute action=approve，不判断 tier 状态。真实浏览器验收扩展为 wutao 提交后 chenshuai 重新登录审批：artifact=artifacts/form-m2-payment-request/20260430T124532/summary.json，pass=true，submit execute status=200，approve contract allowed=true/OK，approval advisory codes=P0_PAYMENT_SETTLEMENT_NOT_READY/P0_PAYMENT_FUNDING_NOT_READY，approve execute status=200。验证：py_compile PASS；pnpm typecheck PASS；node --check form_m2_payment_request_acceptance.js PASS；git diff --check PASS。数据清理：payment.request/28489 恢复 draft/no，review_count=0，attachments=0。`
- form_m2_payment_done_prerequisite_contract_closure: `修正审批通过后的状态与完成动作契约：无 tier review 的审批人直接通过路径现在落到 state=approved、validation_status=validated；新增 shared reason P0_PAYMENT_NOT_FULLY_PAID/suggested_action=complete_payment_execution，done 动作在未付款时不再返回泛化 BUSINESS_RULE_FAILED。补齐 handlers/reason_codes 导出，修复运行时 intent 注册链因新增 reason 未从 handler facade 导出而丢失 payment.request.execute 的问题。真实浏览器 wutao 提交、chenshuai 审批、wutao 读取 done 契约：artifact=artifacts/form-m2-payment-request/20260430T125319/summary.json，pass=true，approval execute payment_request.state=approved，done allowed=false/reason_code=P0_PAYMENT_NOT_FULLY_PAID/suggested_action=complete_payment_execution，console_errors=0。数据清理：payment.request/28489 恢复 draft/no，review_count=0，attachments=0。`
- form_m2_payment_completion_closure: `继续推进 M2 完整办理链路：done 不再要求用户通过只读 ledger_line_ids 手工登记付款台账，后端 action_done 在未足额付款时输出 P0_PAYMENT_NOT_FULLY_PAID advisory 并自动 _ensure_payment_ledger，然后将申请置为 done；payment.ledger 在 payment_soft_gate 下继承审批人已接受的结算状态风险，同时保留 sc.payment.force_block.p0_payment_settlement_not_ready 强阻断开关。真实浏览器 wutao 提交、chenshuai 审批、wutao 完成：artifact=artifacts/form-m2-payment-request/20260430T125842/summary.json，pass=true，done contract allowed=true/OK，advisory codes=P0_PAYMENT_NOT_FULLY_PAID/P0_PAYMENT_SETTLEMENT_NOT_READY/P0_PAYMENT_FUNDING_NOT_READY，done execute status=200 且 payment_request.state=done，console_errors=0。数据清理：验收生成 payment.ledger/12195 已删除，payment.request/28489 恢复 draft/no，review_count=0，attachments=0。`
- form_m2_payment_reject_reason_closure: `M2 驳回路径已补齐：后端 payment.request business_actions 显式交付 kind=mutation/level=header/required_params=[reason]/requires_reason=true；ContractFormPage 纳入 views.form.business_actions 并在 native form tree 模式下保留 mutation header action，执行前按契约弹出 reason prompt，通过 sceneMutationRuntime.params 传入 payment.request.execute。真实浏览器 wutao 提交、chenshuai 打开表单点击精确 驳回：artifact=artifacts/form-m2-payment-request-reject/20260430T132147/summary.json，pass=true，prompt=驳回原因，读回 state=rejected，console_errors=0。数据清理：payment.request/28489 恢复 draft/no，ledger_count=0，review_count=0，验收驳回消息已清理。注意：prod-sim frontend 必须使用 FRONTEND_PROFILE=prod-sim 默认 proxy=http://localhost:18069；误指 8072 会导致登录链异常。`
- form_m3_purchase_order_confirm_closure: `M3 purchase.order 原生确认路径已补齐：form parser 将 type=object 按钮交付为 kind=object，修复确认订单被误发为 server 导致 execute_button 不支持的根因；layout button 节点同步下发 modifiers，ContractFormPage/NativeFormTreeRenderer 统一消费后端 visible.attrs.invisible/states，非待审状态不再显示 审批通过/审批驳回。当前 sc_prod_sim purchase.order 策略事实为 approval_required=False，因此 RFQ 确认按非强制审批策略直接进入 state=purchase,validation_status=no。真实浏览器 caisiqi purchase.order/34：artifact=artifacts/form-m3-purchase-order/20260430T133803/summary.json，pass=true，RFQ 状态确认订单可执行，确认前后非待审审批按钮隐藏，console_errors=0。数据清理：purchase.order/32/33/34、project.project/878/879/880、res.partner/8067/8068/8069 已删除；product.product/27/28/29 因 stock.move 外键引用已归档 active=False。Layer Target=M3 purchase.order form business/action contract；Module=smart_core parser + ContractFormPage + M3 acceptance script；Reason=真实用户采购确认路径必须可执行且按钮可见性与原生状态一致。`
- form_chatter_activity_schedule_closure: `P17 activity 缺口已关闭：views.form.chatter.actions 交付 execute_intent=chatter.activity.schedule、activity_type_xmlid=mail.mail_activity_data_todo 与 summary/date_deadline/note 字段契约；新增 chatter.activity.schedule intent 在后端 ACL/record rule 下创建 mail.activity，前端只按契约渲染活动 composer 并提交，不自造活动语义。真实浏览器 wutao project.project/771：artifact=artifacts/form-action-path/20260430T134241/summary.json，pass=true，P15/P16/P19/P17/P18 全 PASS，活动摘要回显，console_errors=0。数据清理：验收 mail.message=1、mail.activity=1、ir.attachment=1 已删除，remaining 全 0。Layer Target=L4/P17 collaboration action contract；Module=smart_core chatter activity intent + form parser chatter payload + ContractFormPage + form_action_path_acceptance.js；Reason=活动调度必须由后端契约承载，前端无脑渲染并执行。`
- form_localization_p26_closure: `P26 本地化缺口已关闭：page_assembler._to_fields_map 运行时字段 string/selection 改为优先使用当前用户 lang 的 fields_get，避免语言无关 app.model.config 缓存把采购状态回写成 RFQ/Purchase Order/Locked/Cancelled；form parser statusbar states 支持任意 selection 状态字段，不再只认 state。新增 scripts/verify/form_localization_acceptance.js。真实浏览器 artifact=artifacts/form-localization/20260430T135607/summary.json，pass=true；M1 project.project/771、M2 payment.request/28489、M3 purchase.order/9 状态条契约/DOM 均为中文，english_leak=false，console_errors=0。Layer Target=P26 localization contract/render parity；Module=smart_core page_assembler + form parser + localization acceptance script；Reason=同一真实用户语言下自定义前端必须按后端契约渲染，不得泄漏英文缓存文本。`
- form_accessibility_p27_closure: `P27 控件可达性已补齐：新增 scripts/verify/form_accessibility_acceptance.js，真实浏览器覆盖关键控件可访问名称、Tab 焦点路径、关系搜索弹窗 Escape/关闭/选择按钮语义、chatter 活动 composer 禁用/启用状态。修复 ContractFormPage 关系弹窗打开后焦点进入搜索框，并在弹窗打开期间注册 document-level Escape 监听，避免焦点仍在触发按钮时 Esc 无法关闭。验证：node --check PASS；pnpm --dir frontend/apps/web run typecheck PASS；FRONTEND_PROFILE=prod-sim make frontend.restart PASS；artifact=artifacts/form-accessibility/20260430T140647/summary.json，pass=true，console_errors=0。Layer Target=P27 accessibility/control reachability；Module=frontend/apps/web ContractFormPage + scripts/verify/form_accessibility_acceptance.js；Reason=真实用户办理关键控件必须键盘可达、弹窗可关闭，前端只处理通用可达性，不引入业务判断。branch=codex/next-feature-iteration short_sha=5c685336。`
- form_visual_containment_p28_closure: `P28 视觉容器验收已补齐：新增 scripts/verify/form_visual_containment_acceptance.js，真实浏览器覆盖 desktop 1440x980、tablet 900x1180、mobile 390x844 三套 viewport；每套打开 project.project/771 表单与关系搜索弹窗，生成 *_form.png 与 *_relation_dialog.png 截图，并检查视口级横向溢出、关键控件自身裁剪、无效尺寸、异常重叠、弹窗 viewport 内约束。状态条和关系表格按允许横向滚动容器处理。验证：node --check PASS；artifact=artifacts/form-visual-containment/20260430T141142/summary.json，pass=true，desktop/tablet/mobile 全 PASS。Layer Target=P28 visual containment；Module=scripts/verify/form_visual_containment_acceptance.js + docs；Reason=真实用户在桌面/移动端办理时关键字段、按钮、弹窗不能被裁剪、重叠或隐藏。branch=codex/next-feature-iteration short_sha=5c685336。`
- form_m3_purchase_order_line_lifecycle_closure: `M3 purchase.order 明细行真实办理路径已补齐：api.data one2many 子记录新增时由后端补齐 inverse/company/currency/partner/date_planned/product_uom 等事实，前端不推导隐藏核算字段；ContractFormPage 编辑态只提交脏字段，one2many 已有行按字段级脏提交，避免把 #id 占位值写回 product_id/name；非创建态 required validation 只检查本次 payload 字段。验证：python3 -m py_compile addons/smart_core/handlers/api_data.py PASS；pnpm --dir frontend/apps/web run typecheck PASS；node --check scripts/verify/form_m3_purchase_order_line_acceptance.js PASS；prod-sim Odoo/frontend 已重启；真实浏览器 caisiqi/123456 sc_prod_sim artifact=artifacts/form-m3-purchase-order-line/20260430T144957/summary.json，pass=true，P12/P13/P20/P23 全 PASS，新增读回 product_id=1/product_uom=7，编辑数量单价持久化，删除后 order_line=[]，actionable_console_errors=0。公开 purchase.order unlink 按 DELETE_POLICY_DENIED 拒绝为预期，验收临时 purchase.order/46 已通过 Makefile Odoo shell 删除 remaining=[]。Layer Target=M3 purchase.order one2many line lifecycle；Module=smart_core api_data + frontend ContractFormPage + scripts/verify/form_m3_purchase_order_line_acceptance.js + docs；Reason=采购明细这种行式业务必须真实用户浏览器可新增/编辑/删除/刷新读库，且隐藏必填业务事实由后端契约/运行时承载。branch=codex/next-feature-iteration short_sha=5c685336。`
- form_m5_dictionary_maintenance_closure: `M5 sc.dictionary 配置维护路径已补齐：新增 scripts/verify/form_m5_dictionary_maintenance_acceptance.js，真实浏览器 wutao/123456 打开创建页，创建临时字典、读库确认 name/code/type/active 持久化，打开同记录编辑名称并读库确认；再用相同 code+type 创建重复记录，页面显示友好错误“已有相同记录，请先搜索并选择已有记录；如确需新建，请使用不同名称。”，未暴露 duplicate key/psycopg2/Traceback/DETAIL，且没有产生第二条记录。创建态表单仅显示 字典类型/编码/名称/排序，不显示 ID/创建人/创建时间/最后更新人/最后更新时间；active 由后端默认 True 承载。验证：node --check PASS；artifact=artifacts/form-m5-dictionary-maintenance/20260430T154519/summary.json，pass=true，P03/P04/P05/P20/P23 全 PASS，actionable_console_errors=0。公开 sc.dictionary unlink 按 DELETE_POLICY_DENIED 拒绝为预期，验收临时 sc.dictionary/11 已通过 Makefile Odoo shell 删除 remaining=[]。Layer Target=M5 configuration maintenance form lifecycle；Module=scripts/verify/form_m5_dictionary_maintenance_acceptance.js + docs；Reason=配置维护表单必须真实用户可创建/编辑/重复校验且错误友好，不能把数据库约束原文交付给用户。branch=codex/next-feature-iteration short_sha=5c685336。`
- form_m4_legacy_readonly_projection_closure: `M4 sc.legacy.receipt.income.fact 历史事实投影只读路径已补齐：parser 解析 form 根节点 create/edit/delete 为 views.form.capabilities；app.view.config/contract_mixin 白名单保留 form capabilities；contract_governance 将 can_create/can_write/can_delete 收敛到 permissions.effective.rights 与 render_profile=readonly。真实浏览器 wutao/123456 打开 sc.legacy.receipt.income.fact/7220，显示 document_no=DKQR-20221010-005、project=刘伟零星工程项目、partner=刘伟、import_batch=legacy_receipt_income_asset_v1，无启用编辑/保存控件；刷新和直接深链恢复仍只读；直接创建路由不暴露可用创建流程。验证：py_compile PASS；pnpm typecheck PASS；node --check PASS；prod-sim Odoo/frontend 已重启；artifact=artifacts/form-m4-legacy-readonly/20260430T155818/summary.json，pass=true，console_errors=0。Layer Target=M4 historical projection readonly contract；Module=smart_core parser + app_view_config + contract_mixin + contract_governance + scripts/verify/form_m4_legacy_readonly_acceptance.js + docs；Reason=历史事实投影必须以原生视图能力契约确定只读/禁止创建，前端不得按模型名或字段自行判断。branch=codex/next-feature-iteration short_sha=5c685336。`
- form_p24_concurrency_conflict_browser_closure: `P24 并发冲突从“契约存在”推进到真实浏览器行为闭环：新增 scripts/verify/form_concurrency_conflict_acceptance.js，创建临时 sc.dictionary 记录，两个浏览器上下文同时打开；第二页先保存名称，第一页携带旧 record_version 再保存，被后端 if_match/write_date 策略拒绝并显示“数据已被其他操作更新，请重新加载后再保存。”，读库确认 stale save 未覆盖第二页结果，未暴露 Traceback/psycopg2/Internal Server Error。验证：node --check PASS；pnpm typecheck PASS；artifact=artifacts/form-concurrency-conflict/20260430T171005/summary.json，pass=true，actionable_console_errors=0。数据清理：sc.dictionary/14 已通过 Makefile Odoo shell 删除，remaining=[]。Layer Target=Form L5 concurrency conflict acceptance；Module=scripts/verify/form_concurrency_conflict_acceptance.js + docs；Reason=P24 close rule 必须证明两页/两用户 stale save 不会静默覆盖，而不仅是 form contract 中存在 record_version。branch=codex/next-feature-iteration short_sha=5c685336。`
- form_p06_primitive_fields_batch_a_closure: `P06 基础字段类型首批安全写入验收已补齐：新增 scripts/verify/form_primitive_fields_acceptance.js，真实浏览器在 sc.dictionary 创建页验证 char(name/code)、integer(sequence)、selection(type) 控件形态、创建持久化、编辑持久化与刷新显示；同时在 project.project/771 验证 is_favorite boolean favorite widget 点击后读库变化并恢复原值。artifact=artifacts/form-primitive-fields/20260430T171818/summary.json，pass=true，actionable_console_errors=0。数据清理：sc.dictionary/16 已通过 Makefile Odoo shell 删除 remaining=[]；project.project/771.is_favorite 已恢复执行前状态。边界：本批仅关闭 P06 batch A，text/html/float/monetary/date/datetime 仍需在后续 M2/M3/M4 安全样本中继续补。验证：node --check PASS；pnpm typecheck PASS。Layer Target=P06 primitive field widget acceptance；Module=scripts/verify/form_primitive_fields_acceptance.js + docs；Reason=基础字段类型必须有真实浏览器控件、保存、刷新和读库证据，不能只从其他路径间接推断。branch=codex/next-feature-iteration short_sha=5c685336。`
- form_p06_primitive_fields_batch_b_closure: `P06 基础字段类型第二批安全写入验收已补齐：新增 scripts/verify/form_primitive_numeric_date_acceptance.js，真实浏览器在 project.cost.ledger 表单验证 date(发生日期)、float(数量)、monetary(金额) 控件形态、编辑保存、刷新显示与 api.data 读库一致；artifact=artifacts/form-primitive-numeric-date/20260430T190139/summary.json，pass=true，actionable_console_errors=0。数据清理：project.cost.ledger/2、project.cost.period/4、project.cost.code/4 已通过 Makefile Odoo shell 删除，模型重算生成的自动期间 project.cost.period/5 已确认无引用后删除，早期失败 P06B 残留补充宽域清理并显式 env.cr.commit 后独立确认 remaining=[]；公开 unlink 的 DELETE_POLICY_DENIED 为预期。边界：本批不声明关闭 text/html/datetime。验证：node --check PASS；pnpm typecheck PASS。Layer Target=P06 primitive field widget acceptance batch B；Module=scripts/verify/form_primitive_numeric_date_acceptance.js + docs；Reason=date/float/monetary 必须有真实浏览器控件、保存、刷新和读库证据。branch=codex/next-feature-iteration short_sha=5c685336。`
- form_p06_primitive_fields_batch_c_closure: `P06 基础字段类型第三批安全写入验收已补齐：FormSection 将 text/html 字段从单行 input 收敛为 textarea，新增 scripts/verify/form_primitive_text_datetime_acceptance.js，真实浏览器在 sc.construction.diary 表单验证 datetime(日志日期) 与 text(日志内容/单据说明/备注) 控件形态、编辑保存、刷新显示与 api.data 读库一致；artifact=artifacts/form-primitive-text-datetime/20260430T212650/summary.json，pass=true，actionable_console_errors=0。数据清理：sc.construction.diary/5665 已通过 Makefile Odoo shell 删除并显式 env.cr.commit，独立确认 remaining=[]；公开 unlink 的 DELETE_POLICY_DENIED 为预期。边界：html 尚未在当前业务模型中找到安全可写且原生 form 可见的样本，保留专项。验证：node --check PASS；pnpm typecheck PASS；FRONTEND_PROFILE=prod-sim make frontend.restart PASS。Layer Target=P06 primitive field widget acceptance batch C；Module=frontend FormSection + scripts/verify/form_primitive_text_datetime_acceptance.js + docs；Reason=text/datetime 必须有真实浏览器控件、保存、刷新和读库证据，text 控件形态必须对齐原生多行输入。branch=codex/next-feature-iteration short_sha=5c685336。`
- form_p06_primitive_fields_batch_d_closure: `P06 基础字段类型最后一批 html 验收已补齐：新增 scripts/verify/form_primitive_html_acceptance.js，真实浏览器打开 project.project/771，切换 notebook 到 描述 页签，验证 html 字段 description 按契约渲染为 textarea；写入包含 p/ol/strong 的 HTML 后保存，api.data 读库与刷新重开页签均确认 HTML 持久化。artifact=artifacts/form-primitive-html/20260430T213742/summary.json，pass=true，actionable_console_errors=0。数据卫生：脚本 finally 恢复 project.project/771.description 原值，artifact restored=true，Makefile Odoo shell 独立确认 description='' 且不含 P06D edited project html。P06 收口：char/integer/selection/boolean/date/float/monetary/datetime/text/html 均已有真实浏览器控件形态、保存、刷新和读库证据。验证：node --check PASS；pnpm typecheck PASS。Layer Target=P06 primitive field widget acceptance batch D；Module=scripts/verify/form_primitive_html_acceptance.js + docs；Reason=html 字段必须有真实浏览器控件、保存、刷新和读库证据，且 notebook 页签内字段不能误判为未交付。branch=codex/next-feature-iteration short_sha=5c685336。`
- form_p01_entry_routing_closure: `P01 入口路由验收已补齐：新增 scripts/verify/form_entry_routing_acceptance.js，真实浏览器 wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim 覆盖 project.project 项目台账直接记录 URL、动作列表 /a/506、列表行点击进入 /r/project.project/514、详情页 smart button 投标管理 -> /a/538、项目管理员 搜索更多 关系弹窗加载/选择/回填/关闭。artifact=artifacts/form-entry-routing/20260430T214815/summary.json，pass=true，actionable_console_errors=0。脚本不保存主表单，关系选择只停留在未保存浏览器状态并最终重开原记录，未写入业务数据。验证：node --check PASS；pnpm typecheck PASS。Layer Target=P01 entry routing acceptance；Module=scripts/verify/form_entry_routing_acceptance.js + docs；Reason=业务办理表单必须证明真实用户从常用入口均到达声明 surface，不能只依赖已有表单保存路径间接推断。branch=codex/next-feature-iteration short_sha=5c685336。`
- form_p03_create_entry_surface_closure: `P03 创建入口 surface 验收已补齐：新增 scripts/verify/form_create_entry_acceptance.js，真实浏览器 wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim 覆盖项目台账列表 新建 -> /f/project.project/new?menu_id=353，以及 project.project/771 客户 many2one 新建并维护 -> /f/res.partner/new?action_id=314&view_mode=form，return_field=partner_id/return_model=project.project/return_action_id=506/return_menu_id=353 完整。项目创建页显示 保存、名称 required、业务字段集，且 ID/创建人/创建时间/最后更新人/最后更新时间 未泄漏；关系创建页显示 保存 与 名称，技术字段未泄漏。独立 Odoo shell 确认 res.partner.name required=False，因此关系创建页不显示必填星号符合模型事实。artifact=artifacts/form-create-entry/20260430T215301/summary.json，pass=true，actionable_console_errors=0。脚本不保存创建页，未写入 project.project/res.partner。验证：node --check PASS；make odoo.shell.exec fact probe PASS。Layer Target=P03 create entry acceptance；Module=scripts/verify/form_create_entry_acceptance.js + docs；Reason=创建入口必须证明真实用户能到达契约声明 create surface，并且 required/technical 字段边界与模型事实一致。branch=codex/next-feature-iteration short_sha=5c685336。`
- form_p04_discard_unsaved_edit_closure: `P04 放弃未保存改动路径已补齐：后端 PageAssembler 下发 views.form.ui_labels={save,saving,discard,reload,save_success}，ContractFormPage 仅在已有记录且 hasChanges 时按契约标签渲染 放弃，执行现有 reload 恢复后端记录，不引入前端业务判断。新增 scripts/verify/form_edit_discard_acceptance.js，真实浏览器 wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim 打开 project.project/771，读库 name=Role Smoke User，修改名称为 P04 discard should not persist ... 后出现 保存/放弃，点击 放弃 后输入框恢复 Role Smoke User，api.data 读库仍为 Role Smoke User，放弃按钮消失。artifact=artifacts/form-edit-discard/20260430T215910/summary.json，pass=true，actionable_console_errors=0。验证：py_compile page_assembler.py PASS；pnpm typecheck PASS；node --check PASS；prod-sim Odoo/frontend 已重启。数据卫生：未执行保存，临时值未持久化。Layer Target=P04 edit lifecycle contract/render acceptance；Module=smart_core page_assembler + frontend ContractFormPage + scripts/verify/form_edit_discard_acceptance.js + docs；Reason=真实用户误改后必须能通过契约声明的放弃入口恢复，不能只有保存路径。branch=codex/next-feature-iteration short_sha=5c685336。`
- form_p07_many2one_quick_input_edge_closure: `P07 many2one 快速输入边界已补齐：新增 scripts/verify/form_relation_quick_input_edge_acceptance.js，真实浏览器 wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim 在 project.project/771 客户字段输入多匹配关键词 公司，后端 api.data 确认 res.partner 候选数>1，自定义页不误填任一客户而打开 客户：搜索更多 弹窗，表头=名称/完整名称/工作职位/电话/手机/电子邮件，选择按钮初始 disabled；清空 项目管理员=Demo Project User 后出现 保存/放弃，点击 放弃 后输入框恢复 Demo Project User，api.data 读库 user_id 仍为 [109, Demo Project User]。artifact=artifacts/form-relation-quick-input-edge/20260430T220443/summary.json，pass=true，actionable_console_errors=0。验证：node --check PASS。数据卫生：未保存主表单，清空动作已放弃恢复。Layer Target=P07 relation quick-input edge acceptance；Module=scripts/verify/form_relation_quick_input_edge_acceptance.js + docs；Reason=快速输入不能只证明单匹配成功，多匹配必须显式选择，清空必须可恢复且不落库。branch=codex/next-feature-iteration short_sha=5c685336。`
- form_p08_relation_dialog_create_entry_closure: `P08 搜索更多弹窗 新建 入口已补齐：新增 scripts/verify/form_relation_dialog_create_entry_acceptance.js，并修复 ContractFormPage.createRelationFromSearchDialog 的 create mode 分流。根因：create_mode=page 的弹窗新建被错误绑定到 keyword，空关键词时阻断维护页导航；修复后 page 模式直接按 relation_entry.action_id/menu_id 打开维护页，quick 模式才要求名称。真实浏览器 wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim 打开 project.project/771 客户：搜索更多，footer=选择(disabled)/新建/取消，点击 新建 -> /f/res.partner/new?action_id=314&view_mode=form，return_field=partner_id,return_model=project.project,return_action_id=506,return_menu_id=353，创建页显示 名称/保存 且技术字段未泄漏。artifact=artifacts/form-relation-dialog-create-entry/20260430T220856/summary.json，pass=true，actionable_console_errors=0。验证：pnpm typecheck PASS；node --check PASS；prod-sim frontend 已重启。数据卫生：只进入创建页未保存 partner。Layer Target=P08 relation dialog create-and-edit contract/render acceptance；Module=frontend ContractFormPage + scripts/verify/form_relation_dialog_create_entry_acceptance.js + docs；Reason=搜索更多弹窗必须完整支持原生 Select/Create 的 create-and-edit 路径，不能要求用户先输入关键词。branch=codex/next-feature-iteration short_sha=5c685336。`
- form_p09_deferred_relation_create_save_closure: `P09 保存时创建关联记录闭环已补齐：新增 scripts/verify/form_relation_deferred_create_save_acceptance.js，真实浏览器 wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim 在 project.project/771 客户 many2one 输入唯一无匹配值 P09 Deferred Partner ...，页面显示 保存时创建“...”，输入后后端 res.partner 精确查询仍为空；点击主表单 保存 后创建 res.partner/8070 并将 project.partner_id 指向新记录。finally 通过 api.data 恢复 project.partner_id=false，并通过 api.data.unlink 删除临时 partner，remaining_partners=[]。artifact=artifacts/form-relation-deferred-create-save/20260430T222029/summary.json，pass=true，actionable_console_errors=0。验证：node --check PASS。Layer Target=P09 deferred relation create acceptance；Module=scripts/verify/form_relation_deferred_create_save_acceptance.js + docs；Reason=无匹配 many2one 输入必须证明不提前创建，且只随主表单保存创建并可清理恢复。branch=codex/next-feature-iteration short_sha=5c685336。`
- form_p10_many2many_multi_select_closure: `P10 many2many 多选路径已补齐：新增 scripts/verify/form_many2many_multi_select_acceptance.js，真实浏览器 wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim 创建两个临时 project.tags，在 project.project/771 标签 many2many 控件一次选中两个 option 后保存并刷新，页面显示两个 tag，api.data 读库 project.tag_ids 包含两个 id；随后浏览器恢复原始空 tag 集合并保存，页面和读库均不含临时 tag。finally 再次恢复原始 tag 集合，并通过 api.data.unlink 删除 project.tags/6 与 /7，delete_policy=RELATION_MAINTENANCE_DELETE_ALLOWED，project_tags_after_cleanup=[]。artifact=artifacts/form-many2many-multi-select/20260430T222310/summary.json，pass=true，actionable_console_errors=0。验证：node --check PASS。Layer Target=P10 many2many multi-select acceptance；Module=scripts/verify/form_many2many_multi_select_acceptance.js + docs；Reason=矩阵要求 many2many 支持一次选择多个记录、保存、刷新和移除恢复，不能只以单选间接推断。branch=codex/next-feature-iteration short_sha=5c685336。`
- form_p18_attachment_delete_policy_closure: `P18 附件删除策略证据已补齐：PageAssembler 在 views.form.attachments 下发 delete={intent:api.data.unlink,model:ir.attachment,enabled:false,delete_policy.reason_code=DELETE_POLICY_DENIED}，前端不推断附件删除能力，当前页面不展示 .native-attachment-delete。新增 scripts/verify/form_attachment_delete_policy_acceptance.js，真实浏览器 wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim 打开 project.project/771，确认附件上传块可见、删除按钮数量=0，并对 ir.attachment 执行 api.data.unlink dry_run，返回 403/DELETE_POLICY_DENIED。artifact=artifacts/form-attachment-delete-policy/20260430T222818/summary.json，pass=true，actionable_console_errors=0。验证：py_compile page_assembler.py PASS；node --check PASS；prod-sim Odoo 已重启。数据卫生：dry-run only，未创建/删除附件或业务记录。Layer Target=P18 attachment delete policy contract acceptance；Module=smart_core page_assembler + scripts/verify/form_attachment_delete_policy_acceptance.js + docs；Reason=附件删除 allowed/denied 必须由后端契约明确，前端不得按是否有附件自行决定。branch=codex/next-feature-iteration short_sha=5c685336。`
- form_p17_chatter_note_closure: `P17 记录备注专项路径已补齐：新增 scripts/verify/form_chatter_note_acceptance.js，真实浏览器 wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim 打开 project.project/771，chatter actions=发送消息/记录备注/活动 且 enabled，点击 记录备注 后提交唯一正文 P17 note acceptance ...，时间线回显正文且 typeLabel=备注，console_errors=0。artifact=artifacts/form-chatter-note/20260430T223635/summary.json，pass=true。chatter.timeline 后端解析 mail.mt_note 并返回 typeLabel=备注/subtype=mail.mt_note，普通评论保持 typeLabel=评论，前端只渲染后端 label 不自行推断。数据库独立探针确认验收 mail.message.subtype_id XMLID=mail.mt_note，随后删除全部 P17 note acceptance 验收备注并显式 commit，remaining_note_acceptance_messages=0。验证：py_compile chatter_timeline.py PASS；node --check PASS；prod-sim Odoo restart/health PASS；make odoo.shell.exec subtype probe/cleanup PASS。Layer Target=P17 chatter log note acceptance + timeline display contract；Module=smart_core chatter_timeline + scripts/verify/form_chatter_note_acceptance.js + docs；Reason=详情页沟通区必须覆盖发送消息、记录备注、活动三条真实用户路径，且备注语义和显示标签均必须由后端契约承载。branch=codex/next-feature-iteration short_sha=5c685336。`
- form_p25_navigation_recovery_closure: `P25 M1 项目详情页导航恢复路径已补齐：新增 scripts/verify/form_navigation_recovery_acceptance.js，真实浏览器 wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim 覆盖 project.project/771 表单刷新恢复、项目台账 /a/506 与详情页之间浏览器 Back/Forward 恢复、未登录新上下文直接访问 /r/project.project/771?menu_id=353&action_id=506 后跳转 /login?redirect=... 并在登录后回到原详情页。artifact=artifacts/form-navigation-recovery/20260430T224314/summary.json，pass=true，scenarios=record_form_reload/browser_back_forward/unauthenticated_deep_link_login_return，console_errors=0。数据卫生：只读导航验收，不保存、不创建、不删除业务数据。验证：node --check PASS。Layer Target=P25 navigation/session recovery acceptance；Module=scripts/verify/form_navigation_recovery_acceptance.js + docs；Reason=真实用户刷新、浏览器历史与登录失效后的深链恢复必须可用，不能只验证表单首次打开。branch=codex/next-feature-iteration short_sha=5c685336。`
- form_p15_status_transition_closure: `P15 状态推进从可见性推进到真实办理闭环：新增 scripts/verify/form_status_transition_acceptance.js，真实浏览器 wutao/123456 sc_prod_sim 创建临时 project.project，打开详情页点击状态条 停工，保存成功后重开表单与 api.data 读库均确认 lifecycle_state=paused。artifact=artifacts/form-status-transition/20260430T225703/summary.json，pass=true，console_errors=0。本批暴露并修复 ContractFormPage 契约消费缺口：statusbar 字段由 views.form.statusbar.field 声明，不在普通 layout 字段内；现在该字段在可写时参与 hasChanges 与 collectWritableValues，前端不按模型名/状态名推断。数据卫生：失败与成功临时项目 881/882/883/884 及相关 mail.message/mail.alias 已通过 Makefile Odoo shell 删除，remaining_p15_status_projects=0。验证：pnpm typecheck PASS；node --check PASS；FRONTEND_PROFILE=prod-sim make frontend.restart PASS；git diff --check 待最终收口。Layer Target=P15 statusbar contract consumption + browser operation acceptance；Module=frontend ContractFormPage + scripts/verify/form_status_transition_acceptance.js + docs；Reason=状态条必须能完成真实用户状态推进并持久化，不能只证明显示。branch=codex/next-feature-iteration short_sha=5c685336。`
- form_p24_conflict_recovery_closure: `P24 并发冲突恢复路径已补齐：scripts/verify/form_concurrency_conflict_acceptance.js 从 stale save 拒绝扩展为拒绝后可恢复继续办理。真实浏览器两个上下文打开同一 sc.dictionary 临时记录，第二页先保存，第一页旧 record_version 保存被 RECORD_VERSION_CONFLICT 友好拒绝且未覆盖；第一页点击 放弃 后重新加载第二页最新名称，再修改名称并保存成功，读库确认新值持久化。artifact=artifacts/form-concurrency-conflict/20260430T230226/summary.json，pass=true，checks=stale rejected + discard reload retry save，actionable_console_errors=0。数据卫生：通过 Makefile Odoo shell 删除本次 fixture sc.dictionary/18，并清理早期 P24 残留 13/14/17，remaining_p24_dictionary=0。验证：node --check PASS。Layer Target=P24 concurrency conflict recovery acceptance；Module=scripts/verify/form_concurrency_conflict_acceptance.js + docs；Reason=真实用户遇到并发冲突后必须能通过契约放弃/重载恢复并继续保存，不能只证明后端拒绝 stale write。branch=codex/next-feature-iteration short_sha=5c685336。`
- form_p16_smart_button_overflow_closure: `P16 smart/stat button overflow 形态已补齐：NativeFormTreeRenderer 对后端 layout/action 契约声明的 smart button group 使用通用 overflow 渲染，前 4 个直显，其余进入 更多 菜单；前端不新增业务命名或权限判断，按钮 label/action 仍来自后端契约。新增 scripts/verify/form_smart_button_overflow_acceptance.js，真实浏览器同账号打开 Odoo 原生与自定义 project.project/771：原生直显=执行结构/工程量清单/预算/成本/合同/更多，原生 更多=物资/采购/结算/财务/0投标；自定义直显=执行结构/工程量清单/预算/成本/合同/更多，自定义 更多=物资/采购/结算/财务/投标管理。artifact=artifacts/form-smart-button-overflow/20260430T231612/summary.json，pass=true，native/custom console errors=0。验证：node --check PASS；pnpm typecheck PASS；FRONTEND_PROFILE=prod-sim make frontend.restart PASS。Layer Target=P16 smart/stat button overflow render parity；Module=frontend NativeFormTreeRenderer + scripts/verify/form_smart_button_overflow_acceptance.js + docs；Reason=P16 close rule 要求 overflow/more behavior 对齐，不能只证明某个 smart button 可导航。branch=codex/next-feature-iteration short_sha=5c685336。`
- form_p19_body_action_safety_closure: `P19 body/notebook 按钮安全契约已补齐并验收：后端 form layout button action 下发 action_safety，工程量清单分析=classification safe/requires_confirm false，重建工程量清单层级=classification danger/requires_confirm true/reason_code NATIVE_BUTTON_DANGEROUS_ACTION；ContractFormPage 只消费 action_safety，危险动作取消确认后不发送 execute_button，安全导航继续跳转。首次失败根因是 prod-sim Odoo 运行时未加载 parser 改动，restart/upgrade 后主 ui.contract action_open 正常返回 action_safety。artifact=artifacts/form-body-action-safety/20260430T235942/summary.json，pass=true，console_errors=0。验证：CODEX_DB=sc_prod_sim CODEX_MODULES=smart_core CODEX_NEED_UPGRADE=1 make codex.fast PASS；node P19 browser gate PASS。Layer Target=P19 body/notebook server action safety contract + frontend consumption；Module=smart_core view parser + frontend ContractFormPage + scripts/verify/form_body_action_safety_acceptance.js + docs；Reason=危险对象按钮保护必须由后端契约承载，前端不得按按钮名/方法名自判。branch=codex/next-feature-iteration short_sha=5c685336。`
- form_m4_p26_field_label_localization_closure: `M4 历史事实只读表单 P26 字段标签本地化已补齐：sc.legacy.receipt.income.fact 模型字段补齐中文 string，_description 收口为 历史收款收入事实；前端无翻译逻辑。form_m4_legacy_readonly_acceptance.js 新增 M4-P26 断言，form_localization_acceptance.js 扩展 P26-M4 字段标签用例。prod-sim smart_construction_core 已升级并重启；M4 专项 artifact=artifacts/form-m4-legacy-readonly/20260501T012931/summary.json，pass=true；P26 总体验收 artifact=artifacts/form-localization/20260501T013238/summary.json，P26-M1/M2/M3/M4 全 PASS。验证：py_compile legacy_receipt_income_fact.py PASS；node --check 两个脚本 PASS。Layer Target=M4 readonly projection localization contract；Module=smart_construction_core model metadata + scripts/verify；Reason=历史事实页字段标签必须由后端业务模型/契约承载，前端不得翻译或映射字段名。branch=codex/next-feature-iteration short_sha=5c685336。`
