均落到正式材料档案模型。模块升级：CODEX_NEED_UPGRADE=1 CODEX_MODULES=smart_construction_core make mod.upgrade MODULE=smart_construction_core PASS；随后 make restart PASS，Odoo 容器 healthy。全量投影：fresh_db_material_catalog_projection_write.py PASS，legacy_total=2279734，legacy_carried=2279734，remaining_unprojected=0，with_category=1494612，with_project=1605405，with_promoted_product=56500。刷新 formal_business_data_carrying_matrix_current.json：gap_count=0，gaps=[]，target_without_menu_count=0，target_without_target_tree_menu_count=0。刷新 all_menu_business_operability_matrix_current.json：checked=129，ok=true，blocking_failure_count=0，business_write=123，readonly=6。刷新 all_menu_business_crud_flow_probe_current.json：checked=129，ok=true，pass_count=122，not_applicable_count=7，failure_count=0。formal_menu_model_convergence_current.json：ok=true，checked=8，failures=[]，确认材料档案/材料价格库已收敛到 sc.material.catalog。最终总门禁 business_system_usability_readiness_audit.json：ok=true，decision=ready_for_full_business_use，historical_carrying_gap_count=0，historical_carrying_excluded_count=0，四项 criteria 全 true。结论：本阶段已无历史承载排除项，材料明细全量由正式业务模型承载；“菜单可查看/创建/编辑”与“历史业务数据完整承载”两项同时满足。branch=codex/next-feature-iteration short_sha=3553fd90。`
- material_catalog_action_contract_runtime_fix_v1: `修复用户点击 基础设置/材料档案 出现 System exception / INTERNAL_ERROR。Layer Target=Frontend action contract consumer + Odoo action context；Module=frontend/apps/web/src/app/resolvers/actionResolver.ts + addons/smart_construction_core/views/support/product_extend_views.xml；Reason=材料档案动作已切换到正式业务模型 sc.material.catalog，但前端 mergeMeta 在 menu/currentAction 存在旧 meta 时仍优先保留 product.template，导致 ui.contract 字段来自 sc.material.catalog、api.data 模型却仍发 product.template，后端报 Invalid field 'code' on model 'product.template'。修复：前端 action resolver 在 ui.contract 明确返回 model 时以 contract model 作为执行模型；若 contract model 与旧 menu meta model 不一致，同时使用 contract view_modes/domain/context，保留 menu_id/menu_xmlid/groups 等导航稳定字段。后端动作默认 context 从 {'search_default_group_category': 1} 改为 {}，避免 2279732 条材料档案首屏自动 group_by 分类造成大数据压力；分组能力仍保留在搜索视图中由用户显式触发。升级/重启：CODEX_NEED_UPGRADE=1 CODEX_MODULES=smart_construction_core make mod.upgrade MODULE=smart_construction_core PASS；make restart PASS；FRONTEND_PROFILE=prod-sim make frontend.restart PASS。数据库确认 action_sc_material_product_template：id=856，res_model=sc.material.catalog，view_mode=tree,form，context={}，catalog_count=2279732。真实浏览器验收：wutao/123456 打开 http://127.0.0.1:5174/a/856?menu_id=391，无 System exception/INTERNAL_ERROR，页面显示 材料档案 80 条记录，api.data 请求 model=sc.material.catalog，未再出现 product.template 请求。收敛验证：formal_menu_model_convergence_probe.py PASS，材料价格库(menu_id=463) 与 材料档案(menu_id=391) 均指向 sc.material.catalog，checked=8，failures=[]。结论：本次不是材料正式承载模型缺失，而是前端契约消费优先级错误导致旧模型污染运行态；已按“后端契约为执行真源、前端无脑消费契约”修复。branch=codex/next-feature-iteration short_sha=3553fd90。`
- unified_page_contract_v2_batch_a_schema_freeze: `UnifiedPageContract v2+ 已进入 Batch-A 协议冻结：新增 JSON Schema、枚举注册表、兼容映射、form/list/tree/nested relation 四类示例契约，以及 scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_schema_guard.py 静态门禁；Makefile 新增 verify.unified_page_contract.v2.schema，按仓库执行策略通过 Make target 校验。门禁覆盖 top-level canonical shape、client enum、patch operation allowlist、componentRegistry/capability 引用、stable ID 与 role/client suffix 防漂移、legacy compat 泄漏、frontend private field、Anti-DSL VM forbidden keys、trace/snapshot/etag 必填与样例波动值归一化。验证：make verify.unified_page_contract.v2.schema PASS，examples=4。Layer Target=Contract Governance / Protocol Assets；Module=docs/architecture/unified_page_contract_v2 + scripts/verify + Makefile；Reason=先冻结企业级 UI Runtime Protocol 的机器可读边界，后续 Batch-B 后端 assembler 不再重新讨论顶层协议形态。branch=codex/contract-system-audit short_sha=3553fd90。`
- unified_page_contract_v2_batch_b_backend_assembler: `Batch-B 已新增旁路后端 assembler：addons/smart_core/core/unified_page_contract_v2_assembler.py 以纯 Python 方式将 scene_contract_v1/page_orchestration_v1/ui.contract 映射为完整 UnifiedPageContract v2+，将 api.onchange 映射为 UnifiedPagePatch v2+ partial patch；legacy 只保留在 meta.compat，不改 public intent 名称，不切 login/system.init/ui.contract 默认输出。新增 fixtures 与 assembler_mapping_snapshot_v1.json 基线，scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_assembler_guard.py 校验 top-level canonical shape、compat boundary、Anti-DSL/private field、最小 container/widget/action/dataPatch 指标。Makefile 新增 verify.unified_page_contract.v2.assembler 与 verify.unified_page_contract.v2。验证：make verify.unified_page_contract.v2 PASS；schema examples=4，assembler sources=4。升级评估：未新增 Odoo 字段/view/security/data，-u 不需要；仅 live worker 使用新模块时需进程 reload。Layer Target=Contract Governance / Backend Assembler；Module=addons/smart_core/core + docs/architecture/unified_page_contract_v2 + scripts/verify + Makefile；Reason=在不扰动现有启动链的前提下，为后续 Batch-C/D/E 提供统一 canonical contract 组装入口。branch=codex/contract-system-audit short_sha=3553fd90。`
- unified_page_contract_v2_batch_c_status_contract: `Batch-C 已新增 StatusContract 归一化器 addons/smart_core/core/unified_page_contract_v2_status.py，将 permission_surface/access_policy/permissions 归一到 globalStatus，将 meta_fields/field_policies/validation_surface/modifiers 归一到 widgetStatus，将 action_policies 归一到 buttonStatus，将 container_policies 归一到 containerStatus，将 selector_status 归一到 selectorStatus。新增 status_contract_source fixture 与 status_contract_snapshot_v1 baseline，scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_status_guard.py 校验优先级、reasonCode 归一、auth enum、button disabled 与 selector batch 状态。Makefile 新增 verify.unified_page_contract.v2.status，并纳入 verify.unified_page_contract.v2。验证：make verify.unified_page_contract.v2 PASS；schema examples=4，assembler sources=4，status widgets=4/buttons=2；git diff --check PASS。升级评估：未新增 Odoo 字段/view/security/data，-u 不需要；仅 live worker 使用新模块时需进程 reload。Layer Target=Contract Governance / StatusContract Consolidation；Module=addons/smart_core/core + docs/architecture/unified_page_contract_v2 + scripts/verify + Makefile；Reason=状态语义必须由后端标准化输出，前端不得继续从权限、字段名、modifier 或 action policy 中推导。branch=codex/contract-system-audit short_sha=3553fd90。`
- unified_page_contract_v2_batch_d_action_contract: `Batch-D 已新增 ActionContract 归一化器 addons/smart_core/core/unified_page_contract_v2_action.py，将 onchange_fields/changed_fields 映射为 change actionRule，将 action_schema/actions 与 action_policies 映射为 click actionRule，将 form save/validate/delete 映射为 submit/confirm/delete actionRule，将 chain_actions 映射为 dependencyGraph 边，将 action result 映射为 UnifiedPagePatch v2+ partial envelope。ActionContract 保持 dispatch declaration，不输出 script/function/eval/expression/jsonLogic/workflowDsl/componentCode，不承载前端业务 DSL VM。新增 action_contract_source/action_patch_source fixtures 与 action_contract_snapshot_v1 baseline，scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_action_guard.py 校验 actionId 唯一性、稳定 ID、防 client/role suffix、依赖图、patch shape 与 compat 边界。验证：make verify.unified_page_contract.v2 PASS；schema examples=4，assembler sources=4，status widgets=4/buttons=2，action actions=7；git diff --check PASS。升级评估：未新增 Odoo 字段/view/security/data，-u 不需要；仅 live worker 使用新模块时需进程 reload。Layer Target=Contract Governance / ActionContract Consolidation；Module=addons/smart_core/core + docs/architecture/unified_page_contract_v2 + scripts/verify + Makefile；Reason=所有交互必须上报稳定 actionId，由后端评估后返回 patch，前端不得实现业务联动。branch=codex/contract-system-audit short_sha=3553fd90。`
- unified_semantic_page_contract_lite_all_terminal_coverage_plan_batch_54: `从已同步 main=52c87342 新切 codex/mobile-contract-sync-plan，新增 docs/architecture/unified_page_contract_lite/all_terminal_coverage_plan_batch_54.md，按用户校正将目标从移动端同步升级为全终端覆盖：web_pc 作为现有验收锚点，wx_mini 与 harmony_h5 作为同一 Lite 语义契约的终端适配目标，后续先做三端 Lite 语义签名一致性探针，再做共享终端契约消费骨架，随后分别做 Web 回归锚点、微信小程序 tree/list pilot、鸿蒙 H5 复用验收，最终用 all-terminal coverage matrix 收口。计划明确本批不改后端契约结构、不新增终端专属业务字段、不启用 runtimeContract/selector status/component registry/dependency graph、不改 Web 默认 Lite 行为、不实现终端 renderer。Layer Target=Frontend Layer / Contract Consumer Planning；Module=docs/architecture/unified_page_contract_lite + docs/ops/iterations；Reason=Lite 契约治理已进主线，下一阶段目标是全终端共享一套语义契约，避免移动端或 H5 形成平行契约和前端业务推导。branch=codex/mobile-contract-sync-plan short_sha=6f3d969d。`

- unified_page_contract_v2_batch_e_data_contract: `Batch-E 已新增 DataContract 归一化器 addons/smart_core/core/unified_page_contract_v2_data.py，将 record/values/formData 归一到 mainData，将 rows/list_rows/table_rows/records 归一到 tableRows，将 relation_rows/line_patches 归一到 relationRows，将 tree_data/gantt_data 归一到 treeData/ganttData，将 dict_data/options 归一到 dictData，将 pagination/data_source/data_meta 归一到标准字段。schema 对 DataContract 增加 optional treeData/ganttData 扩展位，保持现有示例兼容。新增 data_contract_source fixture 与 data_contract_snapshot_v1 baseline，scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_data_guard.py 校验 main/table/relation/tree/dict/pagination/dataSource、dataKey 稳定性，以及 dataSource 禁止 sql/domain/permission/acl/record_rule/sudo 等业务执行或权限语义。Makefile 新增 verify.unified_page_contract.v2.data 并纳入总门禁。验证：make verify.unified_page_contract.v2 PASS；schema examples=4，assembler sources=4，status widgets=4/buttons=2，action actions=7，dataSources=2；git diff --check PASS。升级评估：未新增 Odoo 字段/view/security/data，-u 不需要；仅 live worker 使用新模块时需进程 reload。Layer Target=Contract Governance / DataContract Consolidation；Module=addons/smart_core/core + docs/architecture/unified_page_contract_v2 + scripts/verify + Makefile；Reason=可渲染数据与数据源元信息必须标准化，前端不得从业务响应形态临时推导数据语义。branch=codex/contract-system-audit short_sha=3553fd90。`
- unified_page_contract_v2_batch_f_runtime_contract: `Batch-F 已新增 RuntimeContract 控制平面模块 addons/smart_core/core/unified_page_contract_v2_runtime.py，schema 扩展 optional renderStrategy/hydration/patchOperations/tracePolicy/complexityBudget/aiEnvelope。RuntimeContract 仅承载 patch/cache/optimistic/lazy/virtualization/retry/render/hydration/trace/complexity/AI suggestion 策略，不承载业务权限、流程或执行规则。新增 runtime_contract_source fixture 与 runtime_contract_snapshot_v1 baseline，scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_runtime_guard.py 校验固定六种 patch operation、meta etag/snapshotId/traceId/requestId、dependencyGraph 仅边列表、componentRegistry 存在、selectorStatus 可寻址、AI suggestion-only 且 non-executable、复杂度预算可计算、anti-DSL forbidden keys。Makefile 新增 verify.unified_page_contract.v2.runtime 并纳入总门禁。验证：make verify.unified_page_contract.v2 PASS；schema examples=4，assembler sources=4，status widgets=4/buttons=2，action actions=7，dataSources=2，runtime score=6；git diff --check PASS。升级评估：未新增 Odoo 字段/view/security/data，-u 不需要；仅 live worker 使用新模块时需进程 reload。Layer Target=Contract Governance / RuntimeContract Protocol；Module=addons/smart_core/core + docs/architecture/unified_page_contract_v2 + scripts/verify + Makefile；Reason=前端 Patch Engine 需要稳定控制平面，但契约绝不能演化为 DSL VM。branch=codex/contract-system-audit short_sha=3553fd90。`
- unified_page_contract_v2_batch_g_client_trimming: `Batch-G 已新增 Client Trimming 模块 addons/smart_core/core/unified_page_contract_v2_client.py，支持从 X-SC-Client-Type/client_type 解析稳定 clientType，缺失/非法值默认 web_pc；稳定客户端为 web_pc/wx_mini/harmony_h5，mobile_app 保持 reserved，本批请求 mobile_app 会回落 web_pc。裁剪策略仅修改 pageInfo.clientType、layoutContract.adaptMode/layoutHints、移动端 span 与 componentRegistry.selectedAdapter/runtime render hints；不改变 pageId/sceneKey/containerId/widgetId/fieldCode/componentKey/actionId/dataKey/selector。新增 client_trimming_snapshot_v1 baseline，scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_client_guard.py 校验三端矩阵、adapter 选择、reserved mobile_app、跨端语义签名一致。Makefile 新增 verify.unified_page_contract.v2.client 并纳入总门禁。验证：make verify.unified_page_contract.v2 PASS；schema examples=4，assembler sources=4，status widgets=4/buttons=2，action actions=7，dataSources=2，runtime score=6，client clients=3；git diff --check PASS。升级评估：未新增 Odoo 字段/view/security/data，-u 不需要；仅 live worker 使用新模块时需进程 reload。Layer Target=Contract Governance / Client Trimming；Module=addons/smart_core/core + docs/architecture/unified_page_contract_v2 + scripts/verify + Makefile；Reason=多端适配只能改变布局密度和组件适配，不能分裂业务语义。branch=codex/contract-system-audit short_sha=3553fd90。`
- unified_semantic_page_contract_lite_pivot: `方向已按用户意见校正：当前阶段 active path 从 runtime-heavy UnifiedPageContract v2+ 切换为 Unified Semantic Page Contract Lite。新增 docs/architecture/unified_semantic_page_contract_lite_design.md、docs/architecture/unified_page_contract_lite/unified_page_contract_lite.schema.json、project_form_lite.example.json、patch_lite.example.json、scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_lite_guard.py，并新增 make verify.unified_page_contract.lite。Lite 顶层固定为 pageInfo/layoutContract/statusContract/actionContract/dataContract/meta，不包含 runtimeContract；LayoutContract 不包含 componentRegistry/capabilities；StatusContract 仅 widgetStatus/buttonStatus；ActionContract 仅事件声明且 dispatchMode=server；DataContract 仅 mainData/relationData/dictData；Patch 只允许 replace/merge。原 v2+ A-G 保留为探索资产，停止继续 Batch-H runtime-heavy 前端迁移；后续 Phase 1 重心改为 Odoo Semantic Adapter、modifiers/onchange/x2many/ACL record rule 语义收敛与薄 PatchMerge。验证：make verify.unified_page_contract.lite PASS。Layer Target=Contract Governance / Lite Pivot；Module=docs/architecture/unified_page_contract_lite + scripts/verify + Makefile；Reason=Contract 做深、Runtime 做薄、语义做强、实现做轻，避免提前进入 Runtime 深渊。branch=codex/contract-system-audit short_sha=3553fd90。`
- unified_semantic_page_contract_current_state_audit: `已按“先审计、再治理”的校正新增 docs/ops/audits/unified_semantic_page_contract_current_state_audit_v1.md。审计结论：当前仓库不是缺契约，而是契约族过多且 canonical Lite 出口未冻结；已有 ui.contract/native_view/semantic_page/page_orchestration_v1/scene_contract_v1/api.onchange/x2many/frontend mixed consumer 等基础，但尚未统一收敛到 Unified Semantic Page Contract Lite。文档列出 Contract Surface 清单、达标项、未达项、S0 阻塞项、治理步骤与下一批建议：先冻结 Lite active target，再做 Semantic Adapter Mapping Inventory，随后实现纯后端 Lite Adapter、onchange patch mapping 和薄前端边界。验证：make verify.unified_page_contract.lite PASS；make verify.native_view.semantic_page PASS；make verify.frontend.onchange_contract_schema.guard PASS；make verify.frontend.onchange_roundtrip.guard PASS；make verify.frontend.x2many_command_semantic.guard PASS。Layer Target=Contract Governance / Semantic Adapter Audit；Module=docs/ops/audits；Reason=先建立当前契约现状清单和治理顺序，避免在未归档的 v2+/Lite 资产上盲目继续实现。branch=codex/contract-system-audit short_sha=3553fd90。`
- unified_semantic_page_contract_lite_mapping_inventory_batch_1: `Lite Phase 1 / Batch-1 已完成 Semantic Adapter Mapping Inventory：新增 docs/architecture/unified_page_contract_lite/semantic_adapter_mapping_inventory_v1.md 与 semantic_adapter_mapping_inventory_v1.json，冻结当前来源面到 Lite 目标结构的映射关系。来源覆盖 ui.contract、native_view_projection、semantic_page、view_parser、page_assembler、contract_governance、api.onchange、x2many_commands、scene_contract_v1、page_orchestration_v1；目标覆盖 pageInfo/layout/status/action/data/patch/meta。新增 scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_lite_mapping_guard.py 并纳入 make verify.unified_page_contract.lite，校验 Lite 顶层、来源覆盖、mapping area 覆盖、semantic_adapter owner、phase_1、forbidden action DSL、mustNotTouch 边界。仍不实现 adapter，不改 login/system.init/ui.contract 默认输出，不改前端 runtime，不启用 runtimeContract。验证：make verify.unified_page_contract.lite PASS。Layer Target=Contract Governance / Semantic Adapter Mapping；Module=docs/architecture/unified_page_contract_lite + scripts/verify + Makefile；Reason=先冻结现有契约来源到 Lite 目标的映射关系，作为后续纯后端 adapter 的输入，不触碰运行链路。branch=codex/contract-system-audit short_sha=3553fd90。`
- unified_semantic_page_contract_lite_backend_adapter_batch_2: `Lite Phase 1 / Batch-2 已新增纯后端 Lite adapter skeleton：addons/smart_core/core/unified_page_contract_lite_adapter.py 以 side-effect-free 方式将静态 semantic/native source payload 转换为 Lite contract，并将 api.onchange patch/modifiers_patch/line_patches 转换为 Lite partial patch。新增 fixtures/project_form_semantic_source_v1.json、fixtures/onchange_patch_source_v1.json、snapshots/project_form_lite_adapter_snapshot_v1.json、snapshots/onchange_patch_lite_adapter_snapshot_v1.json、docs/architecture/unified_page_contract_lite/backend_adapter_skeleton_batch_2.md，以及 scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_lite_adapter_guard.py；Makefile 将 adapter guard 纳入 verify.unified_page_contract.lite。未注册 Odoo model，未新增字段/view/security/data/controller，未接入 public intent，未改变 login/system.init/ui.contract 默认输出，未改前端 runtime，未启用 runtimeContract。升级评估：-u smart_core 不需要；仅未来 runtime path import 后需 worker reload。验证：make verify.unified_page_contract.lite PASS。Layer Target=Contract Governance / Backend Semantic Adapter；Module=addons/smart_core/core + docs/architecture/unified_page_contract_lite + scripts/verify + Makefile；Reason=在 Batch-1 映射冻结后，提供可快照验证的纯后端 Lite 适配骨架，为后续扩大 source coverage 做准备。branch=codex/contract-system-audit short_sha=3553fd90。`
- unified_semantic_page_contract_lite_adapter_coverage_batch_3: `Lite Phase 1 / Batch-3 已扩展 adapter source coverage：unified_page_contract_lite_adapter.py 支持 search viewType/layoutType，并将 access_policy.blocked_fields/degraded_fields 映射为 widgetStatus.disabled；Lite schema enum 增补 search。新增 fixtures/project_tree_semantic_source_v1.json、fixtures/project_search_semantic_source_v1.json、snapshots/project_tree_lite_adapter_snapshot_v1.json、snapshots/project_search_lite_adapter_snapshot_v1.json，以及 docs/architecture/unified_page_contract_lite/adapter_source_coverage_batch_3.md。adapter guard 支持重复 --contract-case，Makefile 中 verify.unified_page_contract.lite 现在覆盖 form/tree/search contract snapshots + onchange patch snapshot。仍未接入 ui.contract runtime，不改 login/system.init，不改前端 runtime，不启用 runtimeContract。验证：make verify.unified_page_contract.lite PASS。Layer Target=Contract Governance / Backend Semantic Adapter Coverage；Module=addons/smart_core/core + docs/architecture/unified_page_contract_lite + scripts/verify + Makefile；Reason=在接入运行链路前扩大静态 source coverage，证明 Lite adapter 对 tree/search/access-policy/onchange patch 的输出稳定。branch=codex/contract-system-audit short_sha=3553fd90。`
- unified_semantic_page_contract_lite_adapter_governance_batch_4: `Lite Phase 1 / Batch-4 已完成 Adapter Governance Hardening：scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_lite_adapter_guard.py 新增 stable ID 检查，覆盖 pageId/sceneKey/containerId/widgetId/fieldCode/btnId/actionId/sourceWidgetId，阻断 role/client/status suffix 漂移；新增 side-effect-free 扫描，禁止 adapter 出现 BaseIntentHandler/INTENT_TYPE/request/from odoo/env[/.sudo(/.search(/.write(/.create(/.unlink( 等 runtime 或 ORM 副作用 token；新增 patch layering guard，强制 statusPatch 只含 widgetStatus/buttonStatus、dataPatch 只含 mainData/relationData/dictData，并禁止 dataPatch 携带 readonly/required/invisible/disabled/modifiers_patch。adapter 对 line_patches 输出已剥离 row modifiers_patch，保持数据层纯净。Makefile 输出 artifacts/backend/unified_page_contract_lite_adapter_coverage.json，当前 contract_case_count=3、view_types=form/search/tree、patch_has_data=true、patch_has_status=true、side_effect_free=true。仍未接入 ui.contract runtime，不改 login/system.init，不改前端 runtime，不启用 runtimeContract。验证：make verify.unified_page_contract.lite PASS。Layer Target=Contract Governance / Adapter Guard Hardening；Module=addons/smart_core/core + scripts/verify + docs/architecture/unified_page_contract_lite + Makefile；Reason=在 runtime 接入前，把 Lite adapter 的禁止项、ID 稳定性、patch 分层和覆盖计数变成自动门禁。branch=codex/contract-system-audit short_sha=3553fd90。`
- unified_semantic_page_contract_lite_patch_semantics_batch_5: `Lite Phase 1 / Batch-5 已扩展 Adapter Patch Semantics：unified_page_contract_lite_adapter.py 支持 button_status_patch -> statusPatch.buttonStatus，并支持 line_patches[].modifiers_patch -> statusPatch.widgetStatus，行级 widgetId 形如 field.task_ids.row.10.planned_hours；dataPatch.relationData.linePatches 继续只保留 field/row_key/row_id/patch/row_state/command_hint，禁止状态字段混入数据层。新增 fixtures/onchange_patch_complex_source_v1.json 与 snapshots/onchange_patch_complex_lite_adapter_snapshot_v1.json；adapter guard 支持重复 --patch-case，coverage report 增加 patch_case_count、patch_has_button_status、patch_has_relation_status。当前 artifacts/backend/unified_page_contract_lite_adapter_coverage.json 显示 contract_case_count=3、patch_case_count=2、view_types=form/search/tree、patch_has_button_status=true、patch_has_relation_status=true、patch_has_data=true、patch_has_status=true、side_effect_free=true。仍未接入 ui.contract runtime，不改 login/system.init，不改前端 runtime，不启用 runtimeContract。验证：make verify.unified_page_contract.lite PASS。Layer Target=Contract Governance / Patch Semantics Expansion；Module=addons/smart_core/core + docs/architecture/unified_page_contract_lite + scripts/verify + Makefile；Reason=补齐 Lite patch 对按钮状态与 x2many 行级字段状态的旁路适配能力，同时保持状态/数据分层。branch=codex/contract-system-audit short_sha=3553fd90。`
- unified_semantic_page_contract_lite_runtime_readiness_batch_6: `Lite Phase 1 / Batch-6 已完成 Adapter Runtime Readiness Audit：新增 docs/architecture/unified_page_contract_lite/adapter_runtime_readiness_audit_batch_6.md，明确当前 Lite adapter 状态为 not connected，仅允许作为纯后端 transformer、fixture/snapshot generator、guard target 和架构文档对象存在；候选未来插入点限定为 load_contract、ui_contract、api.onchange 的显式后续批次，且必须保持 legacy/default delivery 不漂移。新增 scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_lite_runtime_boundary_guard.py，并纳入 make verify.unified_page_contract.lite，扫描 unified_page_contract_lite_adapter/build_lite_contract/build_lite_patch 引用，禁止出现在 handlers/controllers/models/frontend 等 runtime 路径；报告输出 artifacts/backend/unified_page_contract_lite_runtime_boundary.json。仍未接入 ui.contract runtime，不改 login/system.init，不改前端 runtime，不启用 runtimeContract。Layer Target=Contract Governance / Runtime Readiness Audit；Module=docs/architecture/unified_page_contract_lite + scripts/verify + Makefile；Reason=在正式接入前把 Lite adapter 的运行时边界和禁触规则变成可审计门禁。branch=codex/contract-system-audit short_sha=3553fd90。`

- unified_semantic_page_contract_lite_api_onchange_preview_batch_19: `Lite Phase 1 / Batch-19 已实现 api.onchange Lite opt-in preview runtime validation：addons/smart_core/handlers/api_onchange.py 新增精确 _is_lite_preview_request，只有 contractMode=lite_preview、contractVersion=2.0.0、entryPoint=api_onchange、clientType in web_pc/wx_mini/harmony_h5、fallbackMode=legacy_default 全部命中时才追加 top-level lite_preview envelope；默认请求与不完整 Lite 请求仍直接返回既有 legacy api.onchange response，既有 data/schema_version/patch/modifiers_patch/line_patches/warnings/applied_fields 不变。lite_preview.payload 由 normalize_lite_patch_source + build_lite_patch 生成，payloadType=lite_patch，meta.previewOnly=true，meta.defaultUnchanged=true。新增 docs/architecture/unified_page_contract_lite/api_onchange_lite_preview_runtime_batch_19.md 与 scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_lite_api_onchange_preview_guard.py；runtime boundary 仅允许 api_onchange handler 作为首个显式入口引用 Lite 资产。未改 login/system.init/ui.contract，未改前端 runtime，未启用 runtimeContract。Layer Target=Contract Runtime Preview / api.onchange Opt-in；Module=addons/smart_core/handlers/api_onchange.py + docs/architecture/unified_page_contract_lite + scripts/verify + Makefile；Reason=只为完整 opt-in 请求增加 Lite preview envelope，默认 onchange 输出保持不变。branch=codex/contract-system-audit short_sha=3553fd90。`

- mobile_v2_relation_summary_meta_batch: `timestamp=2026-05-05T05:28:11+08:00。Layer Target=Frontend Mobile Contract Consumer；Module=frontend/apps/mobile/src/pages/contract/index.vue + scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_intent_guard.py；Reason=移动端 relationRows 摘要只按 display_name/name 或任意前三个键展示，未预留 v2 dataMeta 或 widget componentConfig 指定摘要字段的消费路径。完成：ContractWidget 增加 summaryFields；collectWidgets 从 componentConfig.summaryFields/displayFields/columns 提取摘要字段；collectRelationBlocks 读取 currentDataContract.dataMeta；新增 collectSummaryFields/resolveRelationSummaryFields/fieldNamesFromList；formatRelationRow 优先按 summaryFields 输出字段摘要，未配置时保留原兜底；v2 intent guard 增加 relation summary metadata 门禁。验证：python3 scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_intent_guard.py PASS；python3 -m py_compile scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_intent_guard.py PASS；pnpm -C frontend/apps/mobile typecheck PASS；git diff --check PASS；make verify.unified_page_contract.v2 PASS；make verify.docs.all PASS。active_commit=75e5ea5c。next_step=提交 mobile_v2_relation_summary_meta_batch；下一批继续核对移动端 relationRows/tableRows 分页和更多行交互。branch=codex/mobile-contract-sync-plan。`
- mobile_v2_relation_pagination_hint_batch: `timestamp=2026-05-05T05:31:13+08:00。Layer Target=Frontend Mobile Contract Consumer；Module=frontend/apps/mobile/src/pages/contract/index.vue + scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_intent_guard.py；Reason=移动端 relationRows 固定展示前 5 行且只显示已加载行数，没有利用 dataContract.pagination 提示还有更多行，用户会误以为子表已完整展示。完成：RelationBlock 增加 total/moreCount；collectRelationBlocks 读取 currentDataContract.pagination[dataKey/fieldCode/widgetId]，按 total 计算剩余行；模板新增“还有 N 行”提示；新增 relation-block__more 样式；v2 intent guard 增加 relation pagination hint 门禁。验证：python3 scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_intent_guard.py PASS；python3 -m py_compile scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_intent_guard.py PASS；pnpm -C frontend/apps/mobile typecheck PASS；git diff --check PASS；make verify.unified_page_contract.v2 PASS；make verify.docs.all PASS。active_commit=2629e49f。next_step=提交 mobile_v2_relation_pagination_hint_batch；下一批继续核对移动端 relationRows/tableRows 远程加载边界。branch=codex/mobile-contract-sync-plan。`
- mobile_v2_relation_remote_load_batch: `timestamp=2026-05-05T05:37:04+08:00。Layer Target=Frontend Mobile Contract Consumer；Module=frontend/apps/mobile/src/pages/contract/index.vue + scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_intent_guard.py；Reason=移动端 relationRows 只提示 dataContract.pagination 剩余数量，未使用 dataContract.dataSource 的子表数据源继续加载，用户无法查看服务端剩余子表行。完成：RelationBlock 增加 dataKey/canLoadMore；collectRelationBlocks 解析 dataContract.dataSource[dataKey/fieldCode/widgetId] 并按已加载行计算 moreCount；模板在可请求时显示“加载更多”按钮并提供子表加载错误态；新增 loadMoreRelationRows/mergeRelationRowsResponse/extractRelationResponseRows/mergeRowsById，按 dataSource intent/query/provider 请求并把 records/rows/items 或 relationRows/tableRows 响应合并回 contract.dataContract.relationRows 与 pagination；v2 intent guard 增加 relationRows dataSource 远程加载门禁。验证：python3 scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_intent_guard.py PASS；python3 -m py_compile scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_intent_guard.py PASS；pnpm -C frontend/apps/mobile typecheck PASS；git diff --check PASS；make verify.unified_page_contract.v2 PASS；make verify.docs.all PASS。active_commit=175302b7。next_step=提交 mobile_v2_relation_remote_load_batch；下一批继续核对移动端 tableRows 独立数据源与列表内联分页一致性。branch=codex/mobile-contract-sync-plan。`
- mobile_v2_table_rows_source_alignment_batch: `timestamp=2026-05-05T05:40:37+08:00。Layer Target=Frontend Mobile Contract Consumer；Module=frontend/apps/mobile/src/pages/contract/index.vue + scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_intent_guard.py；Reason=移动端主列表只优先识别 dataSource.primary；当 v2 内联 tableRows/treeData 使用自身 dataKey 和分页，并在 dataContract.dataSource[dataKey] 提供后续加载源时，“加载更多”不能按该 dataKey 请求，远程返回也不会同步回 dataContract.tableRows/treeData 与 pagination。完成：新增 InlineRecordSet/firstInlineRecordSet，内联 hydrate 记录 tableRows/treeData 的 dataKey 并优先读取 pagination[dataKey]；resolvePrimaryDataSource 在 primary 缺失时按 inlineSet.key 匹配 dataSource；loadRecords 请求携带 dataKey/data_key，并在远程响应后通过 syncRecordDataContractRows 同步 records 到 tableRows/treeData 与 pagination；保留 fallback api.data 逻辑；v2 intent guard 增加 tableRows/treeData pagination source alignment 门禁。验证：python3 scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_intent_guard.py PASS；python3 -m py_compile scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_intent_guard.py PASS；pnpm -C frontend/apps/mobile typecheck PASS；git diff --check PASS；make verify.unified_page_contract.v2 PASS；make verify.docs.all PASS。active_commit=86dad840。next_step=提交 mobile_v2_table_rows_source_alignment_batch；下一批继续核对移动端 dataPatch tableRows append/replace 语义。branch=codex/mobile-contract-sync-plan。`
- mobile_v2_row_patch_merge_semantics_batch: `timestamp=2026-05-05T05:44:05+08:00。Layer Target=Frontend Mobile Contract Consumer；Module=frontend/apps/mobile/src/pages/contract/index.vue + scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_intent_guard.py；Reason=移动端 dataPatch.tableRows/relationRows/treeData 之前按 dataKey 浅覆盖，增量 patch 或 append 语义会误删已加载分页行；同时命中当前列表 dataKey 的 patch 不会回写 records。完成：新增 isReplaceDataPatch/mergeRowsByDataKey/extractPatchRows/syncRecordsFromDataPatch；默认对 tableRows/relationRows/treeData 按 dataKey 和行 id 合并，patch.updateType=full 或 operation=replace 时才整段替换；支持 patch value 为数组或 {rows/records/items, operation}；patch 命中 activeRecordDataKey 时同步当前 records；v2 intent guard 增加 row patch merge semantics 门禁。验证：python3 scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_intent_guard.py PASS；python3 -m py_compile scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_intent_guard.py PASS；pnpm -C frontend/apps/mobile typecheck PASS；git diff --check PASS；make verify.unified_page_contract.v2 PASS；make verify.docs.all PASS。active_commit=3ba77426。next_step=提交 mobile_v2_row_patch_merge_semantics_batch；下一批继续核对移动端 relationRows line_patches 的 x2many 指令适配。branch=codex/mobile-contract-sync-plan。`

- mobile_v2_diagnostic_error_surface_batch: `timestamp=2026-05-05T06:06:20+08:00。Layer Target=Frontend Mobile Contract Consumer；Module=frontend/apps/mobile/src/pages/contract/index.vue + scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_intent_guard.py；Reason=移动端虽然已传播 trace context，但 requestIntent 在失败时丢弃 body.error.reason_code 与 trace_id，页面/数据/子表/动作失败只显示泛化文案，线上排障仍难关联后端失败原因。完成：新增 intentError/errorDiagnosticLabel/appendErrorDiagnostic；requestIntent 对 HTTP 非 2xx 与 ok=false 保留 code、reason_code、trace_id；normalizeError 支持 fallback 并追加 reason/trace 诊断；业务数据、子表加载、动作执行失败分别使用场景化 fallback；v2 intent guard 增加 diagnostic error surface 门禁。验证：python3 scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_intent_guard.py PASS；python3 -m py_compile scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_intent_guard.py PASS；pnpm -C frontend/apps/mobile typecheck PASS；git diff --check PASS；make verify.unified_page_contract.v2 PASS；make verify.docs.all PASS。active_commit=0f48b0ef。next_step=已提交 mobile_v2_diagnostic_error_surface_batch；下一批继续最终收敛。branch=codex/mobile-contract-sync-plan。`

- mobile_v2_local_many2one_picker_batch: `timestamp=2026-05-05T06:46:22+08:00。Layer Target=Frontend Mobile Contract Consumer；Module=frontend/apps/mobile/src/pages/contract/index.vue + scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_intent_guard.py + docs/ops/audits/mobile_v2_contract_gap_matrix_v1.md；Reason=M2-G02 的 many2one 不应一次跨到远程搜索/domain；本批先在 dictData 已交付时补本地 picker，remote many2one 仍作为后续缺口。完成：新增 isMany2OneField/handleMany2OneChange/many2OneOptions/many2OneIndex；many2one/select.remote 字段在 dictData[dictKey] 存在时渲染 picker；选择后写回 [id,label] 形态并触发 onchange；缺口矩阵新增 local many2one picker closed，同时 M2-G02 仍标 Partial，剩余 remote dataSource/domain。验证：python3 scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_intent_guard.py PASS；python3 -m py_compile scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_intent_guard.py PASS；pnpm -C frontend/apps/mobile typecheck PASS；git diff --check PASS；make verify.unified_page_contract.v2 PASS；make verify.docs.all PASS。active_commit=62340d83。next_step=提交 mobile_v2_local_many2one_picker_batch；下一批继续 M2-G02 remote many2one 或 M2-G01 domain option refresh。branch=codex/mobile-contract-sync-plan。`

- mobile_v2_many2one_domain_refetch_batch: `timestamp=2026-05-05T06:55:50+08:00。Layer Target=Frontend Mobile Contract Consumer；Module=frontend/apps/mobile/src/pages/contract/index.vue + scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_intent_guard.py + docs/ops/audits/mobile_v2_contract_gap_matrix_v1.md；Reason=M2-G01/M2-G02 交叉缺口仍存在：remote many2one 已能加载选项，但 onchange modifiers_patch.domain/domain_raw 不会使旧选项失效，后续加载也不会携带最新 domain/context。完成：ContractWidget 增加 optionDomain/optionDomainRaw/optionContextRaw 并从 widget status/componentConfig/widget 读取；loadMany2OneOptions 通过 fieldOptionDomainParams 注入 domain_raw/context_raw/domain；applyOnchangeModifiersPatch 保留 domain/domain_raw 到 widgetStatus，并对受影响 many2one dictData key 执行失效删除，使 UI 回到加载选项并按新 domain refetch；缺口矩阵新增 domain-aware many2one refetch closed，M2-G01 调整为 Partial，M2-G02 剩余 typeahead/search UI。验证：python3 scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_intent_guard.py PASS；python3 -m py_compile scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_intent_guard.py PASS；pnpm -C frontend/apps/mobile typecheck PASS；git diff --check PASS；make verify.unified_page_contract.v2 PASS；make verify.docs.all PASS。active_commit=pending。next_step=提交 mobile_v2_many2one_domain_refetch_batch；下一批决策 M2-G02 typeahead/search UI 或 M2-G04 标准 form command。branch=codex/mobile-contract-sync-plan。`

- project_list_audit_entry_metadata_closeout: `timestamp=2026-05-13T09:52:00+08:00。Layer Target=Domain / Odoo runtime data recovery + Native list view；Module=addons/smart_construction_core/views/core/project_list_views.xml + scripts/ops/project_legacy_entry_backfill.py + Makefile + addons/smart_construction_demo；Reason=用户反馈项目列表录入人、录入时间一定存在但页面缺失，需要区分列表展示、主档字段、迁移回填和来源事实链。完成：项目台账列表增加原始录入人/录入时间列；新增 project.legacy_entry.backfill Makefile 入口；回填脚本过滤 false/none/null 技术字符串，清理已写入技术脏值，只选择清洗后能实际补缺口的来源记录，并扩展 legacy 来源模型到 scbs fact staging、payment residual、supplier contract pricing、user project scope 等；保留正式运行办理模型不作为项目主档录入人来源，避免把后续办理人误写为项目录入人；demo 模块补用户验收项目清理钩子。sc_demo 运行态结果：项目数 887，with_created_by 从 605 提升到 839，with_created_at 从 764 提升到 831，missing_either 从 282 降到 64，technical_false_count=0，剩余 64 条在当前可靠 legacy 来源中未找到项目级录入事实。验证：python3 -m py_compile scripts/ops/project_legacy_entry_backfill.py addons/smart_construction_demo/models/project_demo_cleanup.py PASS；ENV=dev ENV_FILE=.env.dev DB_NAME=sc_demo MIGRATION_ARTIFACT_ROOT=/tmp/sc_demo_project_entry make project.legacy_entry.backfill PASS；git diff --check PASS。branch=feature/project-list-audit-and-acceptance-cleanup short_sha=ab7f789c。`

- formal_entry_metadata_contract_runtime_alignment_fix: `timestamp=2026-05-13T10:38:00+08:00。Layer Target=Domain / Odoo registry alignment + Browser acceptance；Module=smart_construction_core runtime registry + formal_entry_metadata generated views；Reason=用户点击合同台账出现 System exception / INTERNAL_ERROR，后端日志定位为 ui.contract strict self-check 报 tree.columns 包含未知字段 source_created_by；根因是 formal_entry_metadata.surface.write 已在 DB 里给合同 tree 视图加入 source_created_by/source_created_at，但长驻 Odoo 进程尚未通过模块升级/重启加载新增模型扩展字段。修复：按 Makefile 执行 ENV=dev ENV_FILE=.env.dev DB_NAME=sc_demo CODEX_NEED_UPGRADE=1 CODEX_MODULES=smart_construction_core make mod.upgrade MODULE=smart_construction_core PASS；随后 ENV=dev ENV_FILE=.env.dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make restart PASS，Odoo healthy。验证：BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8070 DB_NAME=sc_demo E2E_LOGIN=wutao E2E_PASSWORD=123456 python3 scripts/verify/unified_page_contract_v2_regression_audit.py PASS，收入合同台账 action_id=578 与支出合同台账 action_id=579 web/mobile contract rows ok=true；使用系统 Chromium 浏览器登录 wutao/123456 打开 http://127.0.0.1:5174/a/578 与 /a/579，hasInternalError=false，responseFailures=[]；make odoo.logs 复查仅见 POST /api/v1/intent 200，未再出现 INTERNAL_ERROR 或 tree.columns 包含未知字段。结论：本次是运行态 registry 与已写入视图不同步，不是前端 contract consumer 缺陷；后续任何 formal_entry_metadata 字段/视图写入后必须跟随 smart_construction_core 升级并重启长驻服务再交付浏览器验收。branch=feature/project-list-audit-and-acceptance-cleanup short_sha=03786e71。`

- list_create_button_visibility_fix: `timestamp=2026-05-14T15:17:52+08:00。Layer Target=Frontend Layer / Generic List Action Rendering；Module=frontend/apps/web/src/views/ActionView.vue；Reason=所有列表页共享的新建按钮缺失，根因是 ActionView 只读取 permissions.effective.rights.create，旧 list contract 或 v2 compat projection 只有 head.permissions.create/缺省可创建时被误判为 false。修复：ActionView 创建权限解析对齐 ContractFormPage，先尊重 v2 pageAuth=read 禁用，再读取 head.permissions.create 与 permissions.effective.rights.create，缺省保持可创建；不改后端契约、不改 login/system.init/ui.contract 启动链、不改页面结构。验证：make verify.frontend.typecheck.strict PASS；make verify.frontend.build PASS；make frontend.restart PASS；browser acceptance with wutao/123456 on sc_demo PASS，/s/projects.list 与 /a/578?action_id=578 的 新建 button createVisible=true/createDisabled=false；make verify.restricted PASS。branch=feature/fix-list-create-button short_sha=894050be。`

- unified_page_contract_v2_form_full_render_fix: `timestamp=2026-05-14T15:46:36+08:00。Layer Target=Frontend Layer / ui.contract.v2 form rendering；Module=frontend/apps/web/src/app/contracts/v2/schema.ts + store.ts + types.ts + frontend/apps/web/src/components/template/NativeFormTreeRenderer.vue + scripts/verify/web_contract_v2_form_shadow_browser_smoke.js；Reason=用户反馈 v2 契约后表单没有完整渲染，定位到前端 v2 decoder/store 只保留并遍历 children，丢失 pages/tabs/nodes/items 等 form layout 子树；同时 widget decoder 对 componentKey/widgetType 过严，store 不能从 type=field 容器节点合成 widget 索引，导致字段状态/值映射断开。修复：ContractV2Container 类型与 decoder 保留 type/name/string/label/widget/attributes/fieldInfo/modifiers/invisible/readonly/required 及 pages/tabs/nodes/items；widget decoder 支持 widget_list/widgets 别名、field_info/component_config 别名和 field 节点默认 componentKey；v2 store 遍历所有子节点列表并从 field container 合成 widgets；NativeFormTreeRenderer 接收 containerType/field_info/modifiers。验证：ENV=dev ENV_FILE=.env.dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.frontend.typecheck.strict PASS；ENV=dev ENV_FILE=.env.dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.frontend.build PASS，入口 index-52PyApvw.js；ENV=dev ENV_FILE=.env.dev DB_NAME=sc_demo FRONTEND_PROFILE=daily make frontend.restart PASS；node --check scripts/verify/web_contract_v2_form_shadow_browser_smoke.js PASS；ENV=dev ENV_FILE=.env.dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.unified_page_contract.v2.web_consumer PASS；FRONTEND_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5174 DB_NAME=sc_demo E2E_LOGIN=wutao E2E_PASSWORD=123456 MVP_MODEL=project.project RECORD_ID=771 ACTION_ID=506 MENU_ID=353 CHROMIUM_EXECUTABLE_PATH=/snap/bin/chromium make verify.unified_page_contract.v2.web_form_shadow_browser.host PASS，artifact=artifacts/playwright/web-contract-v2-form-shadow/20260514T074606/summary.json，v2_shadow_widgets=113，field_codes=113，field_overlap=113，layout_source=v2_store，status_fields=113，value_fields=113，main_data_fields=113，value_source=main_data，error=-。git diff --check PASS。branch=feature/fix-list-create-button short_sha=894050be。`
- unified_page_contract_v2_frontend_alias_metadata_alignment: `timestamp=2026-05-14T15:54:58+08:00。Layer Target=Frontend Layer / ui.contract.v2 consumer alignment；Module=frontend/apps/web/src/app/contracts/v2/schema.ts + store.ts + frontend/apps/web/src/app/contracts/unifiedPageContractV2.ts + frontend/apps/web/src/pages/ContractFormPage.vue；Reason=系统性排除 v2 契约升级后的前端未对齐面，补齐 decoder/store/legacy resolver 对 snake_case 别名、field_info、selection、relationEntry、widgetOptions、status/data/action 别名的统一消费，不改后端契约和启动链。修复：v2 schema 支持 page_info/layout_contract/status_contract/action_contract/data_contract/runtime_contract 及 container_tree/action_rule_list/global_status/widget_status/button_status/container_status/selector_status/data_source/main_data/data_meta 等别名；widget 合成保留 selection/relationEntry/widgetOptions；旧 resolver 保留原 guard token 并兼容 snake_case；ContractFormPage raw native node 统一读取 fieldInfo/field_info。验证：ENV=dev ENV_FILE=.env.dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.frontend.typecheck.strict PASS；ENV=dev ENV_FILE=.env.dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.unified_page_contract.v2.web_consumer PASS；python3 scripts/verify/web_contract_v2_frontend_architecture_guard.py PASS；ENV=dev ENV_FILE=.env.dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.frontend.build PASS，入口 index-CxLIwvcy.js；node --check scripts/verify/web_contract_v2_form_shadow_browser_smoke.js PASS；FRONTEND_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5174 DB_NAME=sc_demo E2E_LOGIN=wutao E2E_PASSWORD=123456 MVP_MODEL=project.project RECORD_ID=771 ACTION_ID=506 MENU_ID=353 CHROMIUM_EXECUTABLE_PATH=/snap/bin/chromium ENV=dev ENV_FILE=.env.dev make verify.unified_page_contract.v2.web_form_shadow_browser.host PASS，artifact=artifacts/playwright/web-contract-v2-form-shadow/20260514T075428/summary.json，v2_shadow_widgets=113，field_overlap=113，layout_source=v2_store，global_source=v2_store，source_context=v2_store，status_fields=113，value_fields=113，main_data_fields=113，value_source=main_data。git diff --check PASS。branch=feature/fix-list-create-button short_sha=894050be。`
- platform_performance_audit_optimize_batch_20260515: `timestamp=2026-05-15T07:32:07+08:00。Layer Target=Platform Runtime / Verification Gate；Module=addons/smart_core/core/ui_base_contract_asset_repository.py + addons/smart_core/models/subscription.py + scripts/verify + docs/ops/audit；Reason=对 daily dev sc_demo 启动链与 intent 性能做一次审计并收敛真实并发写热点。修复：system.init 资产绑定默认不再在启动请求内自动刷新缺失 ui_base_contract_asset，显式刷新保留但用 savepoint 隔离；去掉资产只读查询 _search_one 的 savepoint，避免读路径触发全事务 flush；sc.entitlement.get_effective 改为缺失才创建、plan/flags/limits 变化才写，不再每次读取 updated_at 写库；platform_sla_guard、intent_concurrent_smoke_report、system_stability_stress_regression 的 system.init 性能参数统一到 boot/registry 模式，避免把全量 scene hydration 误计为启动 SLA。验证：python3 -m py_compile 相关 5 个 Python 文件 PASS；ENV=dev ENV_FILE=.env.dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make restart PASS；make verify.platform.performance.smoke PASS，system.init p95=1462.23ms payload=625176；python3 scripts/verify/intent_concurrent_smoke_report.py PASS，12 worker 无 5xx，system.init statuses=200 shape_variants=1；make verify.platform.sla.guard PASS，system.init p95=1469.72ms payload=625176。verify.backend.guard 前置边界守卫 PASS，但 verify.product.delivery.v1.map 因既有 16 个 unassigned scope scenes 失败，非本批性能改动引入，已撤回该 target 生成的 product map 文档改动。branch=codex/performance-audit-optimize short_sha=f5a9c9f1。`
- platform_performance_log_noise_reduce_batch_20260515: `timestamp=2026-05-15T07:38:33+08:00。Layer Target=Platform Runtime / Contract Generation Observability；Module=addons/smart_core/app_config_engine + addons/smart_core/core/intent_router.py + addons/smart_core/handlers/api_data.py + docs/ops/audit；Reason=用户反馈仍然体感偏慢，继续收敛契约生成与 intent 请求路径中的同步日志写入。修复：将 VIEW_PARSE_DEBUG、VIEW_PARSER_DEBUG、TREE_PARSER_DEBUG、FORM_PARSER_DEBUG、NAV_DEBUG、CONTRACT_REQUEST、CONTRACT_PARSED_PAYLOAD、COLUMN_ORDER_DEBUG、intent_router debug、api.data payload debug 等高频调试日志从 INFO/WARNING 降为 DEBUG；不改契约结构、不改业务语义、不改启动链返回字段。验证：python3 -m py_compile 相关 app_config_engine/intent/api_data 文件 PASS；ENV=dev ENV_FILE=.env.dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make restart PASS；make verify.platform.performance.smoke PASS，system.init p95=1630.40ms，ui.contract p95=2048.44ms；make verify.platform.sla.guard PASS，ui.contract p95=976.83ms，system.init payload=625182；python3 scripts/verify/intent_concurrent_smoke_report.py PASS，12 worker 无 5xx，shape_variants=1；日志抽样确认高频 debug marker 不再进入 INFO 日志；git diff --check 初次发现 nav_dispatcher 行尾空格，已修复。branch=codex/performance-audit-optimize short_sha=f5a9c9f1。`
- platform_performance_extension_fact_reuse_batch_20260515: `timestamp=2026-05-15T07:48:42+08:00。Layer Target=Platform Runtime / system.init startup surface；Module=addons/smart_core/handlers/system_init.py + docs/ops/audit；Reason=继续性能优化任务，verify.platform.performance.smoke 在并发验证后出现 system.init p95=5632.97ms > 4000ms，单次 profile 显示同一 system.init 请求内扩展 facts hook 已执行一次后又为 role_entries/home_blocks 再执行一次。修复：finalize_startup_surface 阶段复用 data['ext_facts']，移除第二次 apply_extension_fact_contributions 调用；不改 contract_mode、不改启动链键名、不改 ext_facts 语义。验证：python3 -m py_compile addons/smart_core/handlers/system_init.py addons/smart_core/core/system_init_extension_fact_merger.py PASS；git diff --check PASS；ENV=dev ENV_FILE=.env.dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make restart PASS；单次 startup_profile total_ms=1160ms，finalize_startup_surface=190ms；ENV=dev ENV_FILE=.env.dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.platform.performance.smoke PASS，system.init p95=976.55ms payload=625172；ENV=dev ENV_FILE=.env.dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.platform.sla.guard PASS，system.init p95=1022.79ms；ENV=dev ENV_FILE=.env.dev DB_NAME=sc_demo python3 scripts/verify/intent_concurrent_smoke_report.py PASS，12 worker 无 5xx，system.init p95=3854.26ms shape_variants=1。branch=codex/performance-audit-optimize short_sha=f5a9c9f1。`

- menu_config_delivery_visible_batch: `timestamp=2026-05-19T14:07:42+08:00。Layer Target=Platform Runtime / Delivery Navigation Contract；Module=addons/smart_core/delivery/menu_service.py + docs/ops/iterations/delivery_context_switch_log_v1.md；Reason=菜单配置 action/menu/app.menu.config 均存在且 wutao 具备业务配置权限，但 system.init 交付导航在产品 policy 已有菜单面时丢弃 native 配置菜单，导致前端菜单配置不可见。修复：当 policy 已有正式菜单面时，仅从 native nav 透传已授权的运行期业务配置菜单，例如 ui.menu.config.policy，保持正式业务菜单继续由 release policy 控制；不改 public intent、不改前端、不改业务模型。验证：python3 -m py_compile addons/smart_core/delivery/menu_service.py PASS；ENV=dev ENV_FILE=.env.dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.user_menu.config_policy PASS；ENV=dev ENV_FILE=.env.dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make restart PASS；wutao/123456 浏览器验收 PASS，session menuTree 包含 system.menu_646，/m/646 解析到 /a/841?menu_id=646&action_id=841，页面含 菜单配置，badResponses=[]，consoleErrors=[]，证据 artifacts/playwright/menu-config-visible/summary.json 与 menu-config-page.png。branch=codex/menu-config-visible short_sha=7582e9f2。`
- list_batch_action_closure_batch: `timestamp=2026-05-19T16:59:08+08:00。Layer Target=Platform/Page Orchestration + Frontend generic renderer；Module=addons/smart_core + addons/smart_construction_core + frontend/apps/web + scripts/verify + docs/ops/iterations；Reason=列表批量选择列和批量动作必须只在后端契约声明可执行动作时出现，归档/启用需要模型真实 active 字段承载，删除仍必须受 delete_policy/unlink 权限约束。修复：contract_governance 统一按 active 字段、write 权限、delete_mode 过滤 batch_policy.available_actions，并把不可执行场景置 enabled=false；smart_construction_core 为需要列表归档/启用的业务模型补 active 字段；ListPage 无可执行批量动作时隐藏选择列；FormSection 解除 fieldOrderIndex prop/function 同名 lint 冲突；新增 verify.list_batch_action.closure_guard 固化后端契约、真实 action/model active 字段、前端消费和 api.data batch/unlink 边界。验证：make verify.list_batch_action.closure_guard PASS；python3 -m py_compile 相关 Python 文件 PASS；git diff --check PASS；python3 addons/smart_core/tests/test_request_params.py PASS；python3 addons/smart_core/tests/test_form_field_configuration_params.py PASS；python3 addons/smart_core/tests/test_api_data_unlink_id_boundaries.py PASS；make verify.frontend.typecheck.strict PASS；make verify.frontend.build PASS；make verify.frontend.lint.src PASS；ENV=dev ENV_FILE=.env.dev DB_NAME=sc_demo MODULE=smart_construction_core CODEX_NEED_UPGRADE=1 make mod.upgrade PASS；ENV=dev ENV_FILE=.env.dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make restart PASS；ENV=dev ENV_FILE=.env.dev DB_NAME=sc_demo E2E_LOGIN=wutao E2E_PASSWORD=123456 make verify.system_init.runtime_context.stability PASS；同参数 make verify.scene.ready.strict_gap.full_audit PASS，full_unresolved_count=0、strict_scene_count=1；同参数 make verify.restricted PASS，overall_ok=True，contract_closure_guard=PASS。首次 restricted 曾在 Odoo 重启窗口遇到 system.init 500，服务 healthy 后用 wutao/123456 复跑收口；scene_sample_registry_diff_trend 首次因未跟踪运行态 state 从旧值增长到 63 触发阈值，state 落盘后复跑稳定通过。branch=codex/menu-config-next-iteration short_sha=cd089176。`
- finance_fund_operation_business_category_anchor_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-12T10:31:32+08:00。Layer Target=Domain Layer business classification anchor；Module=addons/smart_construction_core/models/core/fund_account_operation.py + views/core/fund_account_operation_views.xml + views/menu_business_taxonomy.xml + scripts/verify/finance_business_category_* + docs/audit；Reason=账户资金三类入口已进入业务分类字典，但 sc.fund.account.operation 缺记录级 business_category_id，仍依赖 operation_type/action context，和当前分支分类产品化主线不一致。修复：新增 sc.fund.account.operation.business_category_id，按 default_business_category_code/business_category_code/current_business_category_code 或 operation_type 自动解析；init() 回填历史/既有账户操作，transfer_out/transfer_between 归入 finance.fund.transfer，fund_daily_report 归入 finance.fund.daily_report，balance_adjustment 归入 finance.fund.balance_adjustment；账户资金列表/表单/搜索视图展示和分组业务分类；资金划拨/调拨、账户间资金往来、资金日报表、余额调整 action 增加分类默认值和 business_category_id.code 域；静态 action 审计覆盖扩展到 24 个财务分类候选，运行时审计增加账户资金记录级分类绑定校验。验证：python3 -m py_compile scripts/verify/finance_business_category_action_audit.py scripts/verify/finance_business_category_runtime_audit.py PASS；XML parse PASS；python3 scripts/verify/finance_business_category_action_audit.py PASS；git diff --check PASS；CODEX_NEED_UPGRADE=1 CODEX_MODULES=smart_construction_core DB_NAME=sc_demo make mod.upgrade MODULE=smart_construction_core PASS；DB_NAME=sc_demo scripts/ops/validate_finance_business_categories.sh PASS，category_count=24；DB_NAME=sc_demo scripts/ops/validate_finance_business_category_runtime.sh PASS，category_count=30，fund_account_operation_bindings: balance_adjustment=520/daily_report=7454/transfer=396 且 mismatch=0；DB_NAME=sc_demo scripts/ops/validate_business_category_dictionary.sh PASS，category_count=54。branch=feature/business-capability-productization short_sha=3ac24c6d。`

- workflow_state_frontend_method_alias_closeout_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-14T23:31:00+08:00。Layer Target=Frontend contract consumer；Module=frontend/apps/web/src/pages/ContractFormPage.vue；Reason=后端 workflow profiles 的 canonical complete/activate/reopen 会映射到各业务模型具体方法，如 action_paid/action_received/action_register/action_reconcile/action_close/action_set_running/action_reset_draft；前端此前只把 action_done/action_complete/button_done 当作 complete 别名，原生 XML 按钮存在绕过 workflowContract gate 的漏口。修复：workflowActionMethodAliases 补齐 activate/complete/reopen 的业务方法别名；isWorkflowTransitionMethod 优先按 workflowContract.availableActions 的具体 method 命中，确保 profile 中声明的真实后端方法会被统一禁用/提示。验证：pnpm --dir frontend/apps/web run typecheck:strict PASS；VITE_BUILD_OUT_DIR=dist-dev pnpm --dir frontend/apps/web exec vite build --mode development PASS；FRONTEND_URL=http://127.0.0.1:18081 DB_NAME=sc_demo RECORD_ID=273134 MODEL=sc.expense.claim node scripts/verify/workflow_evidence_gate_browser_acceptance.js PASS；git diff --check PASS。active_commit=d38ec929。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- workflow_state_contract_close_browser_gate_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-14T23:35:00+08:00。Layer Target=Browser acceptance + frontend contract consumer；Module=scripts/verify/workflow_evidence_gate_browser_acceptance.js + frontend/apps/web/src/pages/ContractFormPage.vue；Reason=仅用扣款单 submit 验收无法覆盖 complete/action_close 这类模型具体方法别名，前端漏口需要浏览器级回归。修复：workflow_evidence_gate_browser_acceptance.js 增加 TARGET_BUTTON_PATTERN/TARGET_BUTTON_LABEL/WORKFLOW_BUTTON_LABELS，默认仍检查提交按钮，也可指定“完成”等目标按钮；断言范围改为目标按钮必须被 evidence gate 禁用并带后端 title，不要求页面上其他允许动作一并禁用。验证：node --check scripts/verify/workflow_evidence_gate_browser_acceptance.js PASS；创建 wutao 可见项目 71 下 construction.contract#13159，state=confirmed、validation_status=validated、无合同明细，后端 workflow complete/action_close enabled=false reason=CONTRACT_MISSING_LINES_FOR_CLOSE；FRONTEND_URL=http://127.0.0.1:18081 DB_NAME=sc_demo MODEL=construction.contract RECORD_ID=13159 EXPECTED_TEXT='无合同明细的合同不可关闭，请补充明细。' TARGET_BUTTON_PATTERN='完成' TARGET_BUTTON_LABEL='完成' ARTIFACTS_DIR=artifacts/workflow-evidence-gate-browser-contract-close node scripts/verify/workflow_evidence_gate_browser_acceptance.js PASS，页面“完成”按钮 disabled 且 title 为后端证据消息，ui.contract.v2 evidenceReasonCodes=[CONTRACT_MISSING_LINES_FOR_CLOSE]；默认扣款单 RECORD_ID=273134 验收仍 PASS。active_commit=d38ec929。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- workflow_state_native_action_visibility_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-14T23:40:00+08:00。Layer Target=Frontend contract consumer；Module=frontend/apps/web/src/pages/ContractFormPage.vue + scripts/verify/workflow_evidence_gate_browser_acceptance.js；Reason=合同关闭浏览器证据暴露出 confirmed 状态下提交审批/审批通过/审批驳回/重置为草稿仍作为 disabled 原生按钮出现，说明前端只禁用了 workflowContract 未声明动作，没有把 availableActions 当作可见动作权威。修复：新增 hasWorkflowContractActions/shouldShowWorkflowNativeAction；contractActionFromNativeRow 对 workflowContract 已存在且 canonical 工作流方法不在 availableActions 的原生按钮返回 null；isNativeLayoutNodeVisible/evaluateNativeActionVisibility 统一隐藏这些按钮；已声明但 enabled=false 的按钮仍显示并使用后端 evidence title。验收脚本新增 FORBIDDEN_BUTTON_PATTERN，合同关闭场景硬断言 提交审批/审批通过/审批驳回/重置为草稿 不可见。验证：pnpm --dir frontend/apps/web run typecheck:strict PASS；VITE_BUILD_OUT_DIR=dist-dev pnpm --dir frontend/apps/web exec vite build --mode development PASS；node --check scripts/verify/workflow_evidence_gate_browser_acceptance.js PASS；FRONTEND_URL=http://127.0.0.1:18081 DB_NAME=sc_demo MODEL=construction.contract RECORD_ID=13159 EXPECTED_TEXT='无合同明细的合同不可关闭，请补充明细。' TARGET_BUTTON_PATTERN='完成' TARGET_BUTTON_LABEL='完成' FORBIDDEN_BUTTON_PATTERN='提交审批|审批通过|审批驳回|重置为草稿' ARTIFACTS_DIR=artifacts/workflow-evidence-gate-browser-contract-close node scripts/verify/workflow_evidence_gate_browser_acceptance.js PASS，forbiddenButtons=[]，workflowButtons 仅剩 开始执行 enabled 和 完成 disabled；默认扣款单 RECORD_ID=273134 验收仍 PASS。active_commit=d38ec929。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- workflow_state_regression_closeout_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-14T23:47:00+08:00。Layer Target=Regression validation + browser acceptance stability；Module=scripts/verify/workflow_evidence_gate_browser_acceptance.js + workflow contract test suite；Reason=完成原生工作流按钮可见性收敛后，需要补一轮后端契约、前端构建、浏览器验收闭环；并处理浏览器脚本并行重跑时登录后 waitForURL 偶发等待 load 超时的问题。修复：login 等待从 page.waitForURL 改为 page.waitForFunction 检查 pathname 不再包含 /login，减少对 load 事件的依赖。验证：python3 -m py_compile workflow_contract_service.py test_workflow_contract_backend.py workflow_state_inventory.py PASS；node --check workflow_evidence_gate_browser_acceptance.js PASS；pnpm --dir frontend/apps/web run typecheck:strict PASS；TEST_TAGS='/smart_construction_core:TestWorkflowContractBackend' bash scripts/test/test_safe.sh PASS，16 tests；VITE_BUILD_OUT_DIR=dist-dev pnpm --dir frontend/apps/web exec vite build --mode development PASS；合同关闭浏览器验收串行 PASS，forbiddenButtons=[]；扣款单浏览器验收串行 PASS。备注：intentResponses 中偶发 status=200 parseError 来自非 JSON 观测响应，不影响 ui.contract.v2 workflowContract/evidence 断言，脚本最终 ok=true。active_commit=d38ec929。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- workflow_state_action_visibility_consistency_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-14T23:52:00+08:00。Layer Target=Frontend contract consumer consistency；Module=frontend/apps/web/src/pages/ContractFormPage.vue；Reason=代码审阅发现 evaluateNativeActionVisibility 只在 row.type='button' 时套用 workflowContract 可见性，但 header action rows 未必稳定携带 type=button，可能导致 header 和 native layout 对 availableActions 权威的解释不一致。修复：evaluateNativeActionVisibility 改为识别 action-shaped row（type/buttonType/action/payload/name/method），只要能解析为动作就通过 contractActionFromNativeRow 套用 shouldShowWorkflowNativeAction；普通非动作节点不受影响。验证：pnpm --dir frontend/apps/web run typecheck:strict PASS；VITE_BUILD_OUT_DIR=dist-dev pnpm --dir frontend/apps/web exec vite build --mode development PASS；node --check workflow_evidence_gate_browser_acceptance.js PASS；合同关闭 + 扣款单提交浏览器验收串行 PASS；git diff --check PASS。active_commit=d38ec929。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- workflow_state_alias_dedupe_validation_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-14T23:50:14+08:00。Layer Target=Frontend contract consumer + validation evidence；Module=frontend/apps/web/src/pages/ContractFormPage.vue + docs/ops/audit/workflow_state_unification_plan.md；Reason=最新前端 workflowMethods 去重逻辑已把 backend workflow key 的语义别名纳入 Set，需要在最终收口前重跑浏览器验收，确认 canonical key 与模型具体 method 不会造成重复或陈旧原生按钮外露。修复：contractActions 构建 workflowMethods 时同时加入 workflowActionMethodAliases(row.key)，使 workflowContract 发布 approve/complete 等 canonical 动作时，validate_tier/action_close 等 XML 原生方法也被视为同一 workflow 动作来源；文档追加本轮验证快照。验证：python3 -m py_compile workflow_contract_service.py test_workflow_contract_backend.py workflow_state_inventory.py PASS；node --check scripts/verify/workflow_evidence_gate_browser_acceptance.js PASS；git diff --check PASS；pnpm --dir frontend/apps/web run typecheck:strict PASS；VITE_BUILD_OUT_DIR=dist-dev pnpm --dir frontend/apps/web exec vite build --mode development PASS；TEST_TAGS='/smart_construction_core:TestWorkflowContractBackend' bash scripts/test/test_safe.sh PASS，16 tests；TEST_TAGS='/smart_construction_core:TestUserFeedbackBusinessViews.test_deduction_registration_action_creates_deduction_bill_lines' bash scripts/test/test_safe.sh PASS，1 test；sc.expense.claim#273134 浏览器验收 PASS，提交审批 disabled 且 title 为 DEDUCTION_BILL_MISSING_LINES 消息；construction.contract#13159 浏览器验收 PASS，完成 disabled 且 forbiddenButtons=[]，提交审批/审批通过/审批驳回/重置为草稿不可见。备注：frontend/apps/web 当前没有现成单元测试 harness，别名去重未新增专用前端单测；payment.request 审批去重浏览器样本因 wutao 对 #37320 can_review=false 未作为阻塞，合同 action_close 场景已覆盖 canonical complete 到具体 method 的隐藏/禁用链路。active_commit=d38ec929。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- workflow_state_profile_method_guard_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-14T23:53:06+08:00。Layer Target=Backend workflow contract integrity；Module=addons/smart_construction_core/tests/test_workflow_contract_backend.py + docs/ops/audit/workflow_state_unification_plan.md；Reason=继续代码审阅发现 workflow profiles 统一发布 server/object 动作，若后续 profile method 写错，前端会正常展示按钮但运行时 executeButton 才失败，需要在后端契约测试层前置拦截。修复：新增 test_profile_methods_resolve_to_existing_model_methods，遍历 sc.workflow.contract.service.PROFILE_BY_MODEL，校验每个非空 method_by_action 在对应 Odoo model 上存在；同步更新验证快照为 17 tests。验证：python3 -m py_compile workflow_contract_service.py test_workflow_contract_backend.py PASS；TEST_TAGS='/smart_construction_core:TestWorkflowContractBackend' bash scripts/test/test_safe.sh PASS，17 tests；git diff --check PASS。active_commit=d38ec929。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- workflow_state_cancel_action_execution_fix_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-14T23:55:48+08:00。Layer Target=Frontend workflow action execution；Module=frontend/apps/web/src/pages/ContractFormPage.vue + docs/ops/audit/workflow_state_unification_plan.md；Reason=代码审阅发现 runAction 对 key=cancel 的旧本地返回分支会抢在 server/object 执行前触发；workflowContract 发布的 cancel/action_cancel header 动作可能只返回工作台，不调用后端取消方法。修复：将本地 cancel 分支收紧为 actionKey==='cancel' 且没有 methodName 时才返回工作台；带 action_cancel 等后端 method 的 workflow cancel 继续进入 executeButton。验证：pnpm --dir frontend/apps/web run typecheck:strict PASS；VITE_BUILD_OUT_DIR=dist-dev pnpm --dir frontend/apps/web exec vite build --mode development PASS；git diff --check PASS；sc.expense.claim#273134 浏览器验收 PASS；construction.contract#13159 浏览器验收 PASS，完成 disabled 且 forbiddenButtons=[]。active_commit=d38ec929。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- workflow_state_cancel_click_evidence_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-15T00:00:46+08:00。Layer Target=Browser acceptance evidence；Module=scripts/verify/workflow_evidence_gate_browser_acceptance.js + docs/ops/audit/workflow_state_unification_plan.md；Reason=仅靠代码分支收紧仍缺少“点击取消会进入 execute_button 而不是本地导航”的可重复证据，需要扩展浏览器脚本观测点击后的 execute_button 请求。修复：workflow_evidence_gate_browser_acceptance.js 新增 EXPECT_EVIDENCE_BLOCK=0 下允许目标按钮 enabled、CLICK_BUTTON_PATTERN、EXPECT_EXECUTE_METHOD，以及 intentRequests 中 buttonName/buttonType 采集；点击指定按钮后等待 execute_button 请求并记录 model/res_id/button。验证：node --check workflow_evidence_gate_browser_acceptance.js PASS；创建临时 construction.contract#13210，前端点击可见按钮“作废”后脚本捕获 execute_button request button.name=action_cancel、button.type=object、model=construction.contract、resId=13210；后端 shell 直调同一记录 action_cancel 成功 state draft -> cancel。备注：浏览器 execute_button response 为 400，归因到当前登录用户/execute_button 通道层返回；本批证据目标是确认前端不再吞掉 action_cancel 请求。active_commit=d38ec929。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- workflow_state_contract_message_side_effect_fix_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-15T08:43:29+08:00。Layer Target=Domain workflow transition robustness + browser acceptance；Module=addons/smart_construction_core/models/support/contract_center.py + addons/smart_construction_core/tests/test_workflow_contract_backend.py + scripts/verify/workflow_evidence_gate_browser_acceptance.js；Reason=继续追踪 cancel/action_cancel 浏览器 400，定位到 wutao 具备 execute_button 权限，但 construction.contract.action_cancel 在 message_post 阶段因“无法发送消息，请配置发件人的电子邮件地址”抛 UserError，导致业务状态未取消；状态流转不应因 chatter 邮件配置失败回滚。修复：新增 _post_contract_state_message，合同 action_confirm/action_set_running/action_close/action_cancel/action_reset_draft 的状态消息改为 best-effort，发送失败仅 warning 记录 contract/state/error，不回滚状态；后端测试新增无 email 合同业务用户执行 action_cancel 成功；浏览器验收脚本进一步等待 execute_button response 并默认要求 status<400。验证：python3 -m py_compile contract_center.py test_workflow_contract_backend.py workflow_contract_service.py PASS；TEST_TAGS='/smart_construction_core:TestWorkflowContractBackend' bash scripts/test/test_safe.sh PASS，18 tests；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make restart PASS；node --check workflow_evidence_gate_browser_acceptance.js PASS；construction.contract#13249 浏览器点击“作废”捕获 execute_button/action_cancel，response status=200 reasonCode=OK message=后端已执行动作；shell 确认 #13249 state=cancel；git diff --check PASS。active_commit=d38ec929。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- workflow_state_post_fix_regression_closeout_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-15T08:47:34+08:00。Layer Target=Regression validation + served frontend evidence；Module=frontend/apps/web + scripts/verify/workflow_evidence_gate_browser_acceptance.js + docs/ops/audit/workflow_state_unification_plan.md；Reason=合同消息副作用修复和浏览器脚本增强后，需要重新确认既有 deduction/contract close evidence gate 没有回退，并确认 18081 served static bundle 可用。验证：pnpm --dir frontend/apps/web run typecheck:strict PASS；VITE_BUILD_OUT_DIR=dist-dev pnpm --dir frontend/apps/web exec vite build --mode development PASS；首次并行浏览器重跑失败在 login wait，failure artifact 显示 18081 上 index-BF--iTQe.js 预加载 PageRenderer-Dvfaof9H.css 404，归因为静态 asset 短暂不一致；随后 curl /assets/PageRenderer-Dvfaof9H.css 与 /assets/index-BF--iTQe.js 均 HTTP 200，顺序重跑 sc.expense.claim#273134 PASS（DEDUCTION_BILL_MISSING_LINES/EXPENSE_ATTACHMENT_REQUIRED，提交审批 disabled/title 正确），construction.contract#13159 PASS（CONTRACT_MISSING_LINES_FOR_CLOSE，完成 disabled/title 正确，forbiddenButtons=[]）。active_commit=d38ec929。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`

- workflow_state_browser_contract_presence_guard_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-15T09:01:43+08:00。Layer Target=Browser acceptance workflow contract evidence；Module=scripts/verify/workflow_evidence_gate_browser_acceptance.js + docs/ops/audit/workflow_state_unification_plan.md；Reason=浏览器验收此前会记录 workflowContract 是否存在，但 PASS 条件主要依赖页面 evidence 文案和按钮禁用，仍可能在观测层把“后端 workflowContract 注入丢失但页面残留文案”误判为通过。修复：新增 EXPECT_WORKFLOW_CONTRACT 默认开启；脚本从 direct v2 pageInfo、workflowContract.model、workflowContract.record_id 识别目标响应，要求目标 MODEL/RECORD_ID 的 ui.contract.v2 响应必须带 workflowContract；artifact 增加 targetWorkflowResponses、workflowModel、workflowRecordId、availableActionKeys。验证：node --check workflow_evidence_gate_browser_acceptance.js PASS；sc.expense.claim#273134 浏览器验收 PASS，targetWorkflowResponses[0].hasWorkflowContract=true，evidenceReasonCodes=DEDUCTION_BILL_MISSING_LINES/EXPENSE_ATTACHMENT_REQUIRED，availableActionKeys=save_draft/submit/cancel；construction.contract#13159 浏览器验收 PASS，targetWorkflowResponses[0].hasWorkflowContract=true，evidenceReasonCodes=CONTRACT_MISSING_LINES_FOR_CLOSE，availableActionKeys=activate/complete/cancel，forbiddenButtons=[]。artifacts=artifacts/workflow-evidence-gate-browser-workflow-contract-required + artifacts/workflow-evidence-gate-browser-contract-close-workflow-contract-required。active_commit=d38ec929。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- workflow_state_browser_make_target_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-15T09:04:43+08:00。Layer Target=Verification ergonomics / browser acceptance repeatability；Module=Makefile + docs/ops/audit/workflow_state_unification_plan.md；Reason=workflow evidence browser 验收已成为 workflowContract 交付闭环，但仍依赖手工拼两条长命令，后续容易漏掉合同关闭样本或忘记 EXPECT_WORKFLOW_CONTRACT 默认门禁。修复：新增 verify.workflow_contract.browser.syntax、verify.workflow_contract.browser.expense_claim.host、verify.workflow_contract.browser.contract_close.host、verify.workflow_contract.browser.host；默认样本为 sc.expense.claim#273134 与 construction.contract#13159，支持 WORKFLOW_CONTRACT_FRONTEND_URL/WORKFLOW_CONTRACT_DB_NAME/WORKFLOW_CONTRACT_EXPENSE_RECORD_ID/WORKFLOW_CONTRACT_CLOSE_RECORD_ID 覆盖；审计计划 Last verified commands 改为 Make target。验证：ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.workflow_contract.browser.syntax PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.workflow_contract.browser.host PASS，两个样本均 targetWorkflowResponses[0].hasWorkflowContract=true。active_commit=d38ec929。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`

- workflow_state_inventory_method_alignment_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-15T09:19:40+08:00。Layer Target=Workflow state inventory accuracy；Module=scripts/audit/workflow_state_inventory.py + docs/ops/audit/workflow_state_inventory_sc_demo.md + Makefile；Reason=继续审阅发现 workflow_state_inventory.py 的 WORKFLOW_METHOD_NAMES 未覆盖本批 profiles 实际使用的 action_confirm/action_close/action_paid/action_received/action_register/action_reconcile/action_set_running/action_reset_draft 等业务方法，导致 inventory 低估合同和资金类工作流表面。修复：扩展审计脚本工作流方法枚举；新增 audit.workflow_state.inventory Make target，复用 RUN_ENV 生成 docs/ops/audit/workflow_state_inventory_sc_demo.md，避免手工拼 compose project；刷新 sc_demo inventory。验证：python3 -m py_compile scripts/audit/workflow_state_inventory.py PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make audit.workflow_state.inventory PASS；刷新后的 inventory 中 construction.contract 包含 action_confirm/action_close/action_set_running/action_reset_draft，sc.payment.execution 包含 action_paid，sc.receipt.income 包含 action_received，sc.treasury.reconciliation 包含 action_reconcile。active_commit=d38ec929。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`

- workflow_state_browser_reason_code_assertion_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-15T09:31:01+08:00。Layer Target=Browser workflow evidence reason-code acceptance；Module=scripts/verify/workflow_evidence_gate_browser_acceptance.js + Makefile；Reason=浏览器验收此前校验 evidence 文案和按钮禁用，但没有硬断言后端 workflowContract.evidenceGate.reasonCode，可能在文案残留或错误 gate 原因下误判通过。修复：workflow_evidence_gate_browser_acceptance.js 新增 EXPECTED_REASON_CODE/EXPECTED_REASON_CODES，聚合目标会从目标 MODEL/RECORD_ID 的 workflowContract 响应中收集 evidenceReasonCodes 并要求包含预期值；Make 的扣款单样本传 DEDUCTION_BILL_MISSING_LINES，合同关闭样本传 CONTRACT_MISSING_LINES_FOR_CLOSE；artifact 增加 expectedReasonCodes 与 targetEvidenceReasonCodes。验证：node --check workflow_evidence_gate_browser_acceptance.js PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.workflow_contract.browser.host PASS，扣款单 targetEvidenceReasonCodes=DEDUCTION_BILL_MISSING_LINES/EXPENSE_ATTACHMENT_REQUIRED，合同 targetEvidenceReasonCodes=CONTRACT_MISSING_LINES_FOR_CLOSE，两个样本均 uniqueButtons 和 workflowContract presence 断言通过。active_commit=d38ec929。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
