- workflow_state_closeout_consistency_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-15T09:36:25+08:00。Layer Target=Workflow state unification closeout consistency；Module=docs/ops/audit/workflow_state_unification_plan.md + docs/ops/iterations/delivery_context_switch_log_v1.md；Reason=收口审查发现计划文档仍写 first three high-risk models，但当前 baseline/profile/tests/Make gate 已覆盖 10 个模型，交接文档需要与实际范围一致。修复：将 Implementation Order 中 profile 描述调整为 first covered high-risk models，避免后续误读为仅 3 个模型；保留 remaining domains by profile 的后续原则。验证：ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.workflow_contract PASS；make verify.docs.all PASS；git diff --check PASS。active_commit=d38ec929。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- workflow_state_custom_form_full_coverage_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-15T10:06:59+08:00。Layer Target=Workflow contract custom business form coverage；Module=addons/smart_construction_core/models/support/workflow_contract_service.py + scripts/audit/workflow_state_inventory.py + scripts/verify/workflow_inventory_profile_method_guard.py + scripts/verify/workflow_contract_custom_coverage_guard.py + Makefile + addons/smart_construction_core/tests/test_workflow_contract_backend.py + docs/ops/audit/workflow_state_inventory_sc_demo.md；Reason=用户明确本轮目标是“全覆盖表单”，此前 10 个高风险 profile 不能作为收口范围，需要把自定义业务工作流表单纳入 workflowContract 覆盖并用门禁防止回退。修复：扩展 workflowContract profiles 到 71 个自定义业务模型，覆盖合同/结算/计划/请购/使用/价格/安全质量/招采/遗留映射/导入复核等工作流形态；inventory 修正 service 检测逻辑，过滤 abstract/transient，输出 covered/uncovered 统计与 workflowContract coverage；profile-method guard 支持 helper 批量 profile 展开；新增 custom coverage guard，仅允许 account.move、purchase.order、stock.picking 三个标准 Odoo 模型作为显式例外。验证：ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.workflow_contract.backend PASS，workflow_inventory_profile_method_guard PASS profile_methods=34 inventory_methods=40，workflow_contract_custom_coverage_guard PASS allowed_standard_uncovered=account.move,purchase.order,stock.picking，TestWorkflowContractBackend 19 tests 0 failed/0 errors，扣款单业务视图单测 1 test 0 failed/0 errors；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.workflow_contract.frontend PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make restart PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.workflow_contract PASS，浏览器扣款单/合同关闭样本均 workflowContract presence、reasonCode、unique button 断言通过。active_commit=d38ec929。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- workflow_contract_governance_rule_alignment_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-15T10:11:35+08:00。Layer Target=Contract governance / workflowContract rule alignment；Module=docs/ops/audit/workflow_state_unification_plan.md + docs/architecture/unified_page_contract_v2_design.zh.md + docs/ops/iterations/delivery_context_switch_log_v1.md；Reason=全覆盖表单收口后，如果契约体系不定义覆盖口径、例外口径和权威边界，后续容易把“自定义业务工作流表单全覆盖”误解为所有 Odoo 模型都必须接入，或把 workflow 状态重新交给前端/通用 assembler 推导。修复：workflow plan 新增 Contract Governance Rule，明确 workflowContract 是后端业务 workflow service 投影、前端 state-dumb、backend action method 仍是最终 enforcement、coverage 按自定义业务工作流表单计算，标准 Odoo 例外必须显式列入 guard；Unified Page Contract v2 设计把 workflowContract 纳入受控可选顶层扩展，固定 availableActions/evidenceGate/runtime mirror 的冻结边界，并把 profile-method guard 与 custom business coverage guard 加入最小 guard 集。验证：make verify.docs.all PASS；git diff --check PASS。active_commit=d38ec929。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- partner_user_preference_boundary_alignment_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-16T00:47:53+08:00。Layer Target=Platform Core Mechanism + Customer Custom User Preference；Module=AGENTS.md + addons/smart_core/core/view_orchestrator.py + addons/smart_core/model/ui_business_config_contract.py + addons/smart_core/tests/test_view_orchestrator.py + addons/smart_core/tests/test_business_config_contract_schema.py + addons/smart_construction_custom/models/user_preferences.py + addons/smart_construction_custom/data/user_preferences.xml + addons/smart_construction_custom/hooks.py + addons/smart_construction_custom/security/ir.model.access.csv；Reason=客户/供应商表单三栏平铺和字段顺序属于保盛用户偏好，不能长期依赖临时脚本或写入行业标准；同时契约体系缺少 form layout 覆盖机制，导致用户偏好只能绕到平台核心或前端。修复：AGENTS 增加每次迭代必须先回答边界的规则；smart_core 仅新增 view_orchestration.views.form.layout 的通用 schema 校验、未知字段扫描、编排覆盖和无效字段清洗；smart_construction_custom 新增 sc.user.preference.initialization，将客户/供应商表单字段、三栏 layout 和按钮作为用户偏好配置发布到 ui.business.config.contract，并通过 post_init_hook 与 data XML 在安装/升级时可重放。验证：ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo CODEX_MODE=gate CODEX_NEED_UPGRADE=1 make mod.upgrade MODULE=smart_construction_custom PASS；客户 action 786 契约 261 published version=7，供应商 action 787 契约 262 published version=6，layout group=sc_custom_partner_flat_fields columns=3；ViewOrchestrator compose 两个 action 均 applied=True 且输出新 layout；python3 addons/smart_core/tests/test_business_config_contract_schema.py PASS；python3 addons/smart_core/tests/test_view_orchestrator.py PASS。active_commit=pending。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- partner_form_v2_layout_overlay_precedence_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-16T01:14:28+08:00。Layer Target=Platform Contract V2 Projection + Customer Custom User Preference；Module=addons/smart_core/core/view_orchestrator.py + addons/smart_core/core/unified_page_contract_v2_assembler.py + addons/smart_core/handlers/ui_contract_v2.py + addons/smart_core/tests/test_unified_page_contract_v2_mobile_compact.py + addons/smart_construction_custom/models/user_preferences.py；Reason=浏览器验收发现客户/供应商表单虽已发布三栏用户偏好 layout，但 Unified Page Contract V2 仍优先用 formStructureContract 重建“业务识别/业务关系/其他事实”，导致标签、行业、付款条件压到统一社会信用代码等核心字段前面。修复：ViewOrchestrator 在实际应用 form layout 覆盖时写入 form_layout_overlay 标记；ui_contract_v2 handler 识别业务配置 layout 覆盖后不再生成会重排字段的 form_structure_contract；V2 assembler 对带 form_layout_overlay 的治理 layout 保持原样投影；客户/供应商用户偏好清单移除新建态无意义的 sc_source_* 来源字段和重复供应商类型只读字段。验证：python3 addons/smart_core/tests/test_unified_page_contract_v2_mobile_compact.py PASS，新增 governed form layout precedence 测试；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo CODEX_MODE=gate CODEX_NEED_UPGRADE=1 make mod.upgrade MODULE=smart_core PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo CODEX_MODE=gate CODEX_NEED_UPGRADE=1 make mod.upgrade MODULE=smart_construction_custom PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make restart PASS；浏览器验收 customer-form-final-optimized/supplier-form-final-optimized 均 formStructure=false，首屏顺序为名称、类型、统一社会信用代码、法定代表人、联系人、电话/手机/邮箱、注册资本、成立日期、营业期限、所属地区、工商注册号、行业、账户信息、付款条件等。artifacts=artifacts/playwright/partner-form-review/customer-form-final-optimized.png + supplier-form-final-optimized.png。active_commit=pending。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- partner_form_hidden_field_preference_contract_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-16T01:50:11+08:00。Layer Target=Customer Custom User Preference Contract；Module=addons/smart_construction_custom/models/user_preferences.py + docs/ops/iterations/delivery_context_switch_log_v1.md；Reason=客户/供应商基础维护表单中，应收/应付账款科目、业务身份、业务依据、默认税率、主税率、来源字段等不属于普通办理阶段字段；仅从三栏 layout 省略不足以防止配置界面或后续投影误解为可操作字段。修复：在保盛用户偏好契约中将上述字段以 view_orchestration.views.form.fields.visible=false 显式排除，同时从默认三栏 layout 移除，不在前端增加兜底逻辑；保留底层 Odoo 字段和技术配置能力，业务默认办理面与同一用户偏好配置面不展示这些字段。验证：ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo CODEX_MODE=gate CODEX_NEED_UPGRADE=1 make mod.upgrade MODULE=smart_construction_custom PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make restart 后容器 healthy；数据库契约检查客户 action 786/供应商 action 787 均 published，hidden_subset 包含 property_account_receivable_id/property_account_payable_id/sc_business_role_label/sc_business_fact_basis/sc_default_tax_rate/sc_default_tax_rate_text/sc_supplier_type_label，visible_has_excluded=[]；浏览器验收客户/供应商新建表单均不出现 默认税率/主税率/应收账款科目/应付账款科目/业务身份/业务依据，artifacts=artifacts/playwright/partner-form-review/customer-hidden-fields-accepted.png + supplier-hidden-fields-fresh.png；python3 -m py_compile 相关 smart_core/smart_construction_custom 文件 PASS；python3 addons/smart_core/tests/test_business_config_contract_schema.py PASS；python3 addons/smart_core/tests/test_view_orchestrator.py PASS；python3 addons/smart_core/tests/test_unified_page_contract_v2_mobile_compact.py PASS；git diff --check PASS。active_commit=pending。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- partner_form_payment_term_hidden_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-16T01:57:49+08:00。Layer Target=Customer Custom User Preference Contract；Module=addons/smart_construction_custom/models/user_preferences.py + docs/ops/iterations/delivery_context_switch_log_v1.md；Reason=客户付款条件/供应商付款条件属于合同、采购、结算阶段约束，不应在客户/供应商基础资料维护阶段办理。修复：从客户/供应商三栏 layout 清单移除 property_payment_term_id/property_supplier_payment_term_id，并在同一用户偏好契约中显式 visible=false，避免配置面误认为可操作字段。验证：python3 -m py_compile addons/smart_construction_custom/models/user_preferences.py PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo CODEX_MODE=gate CODEX_NEED_UPGRADE=1 make mod.upgrade MODULE=smart_construction_custom PASS；数据库契约检查客户 action 786/供应商 action 787 均 hidden_payment_terms=[property_payment_term_id, property_supplier_payment_term_id]、visible_has_payment_terms=[]、layout_has_payment_terms=False；浏览器验收客户/供应商新建页均不出现 客户付款条件/客户付款条款/供应商付款条件/供应商付款条款，artifacts=artifacts/playwright/partner-form-review/payment-term-hidden.json + customer-payment-term-hidden.png + supplier-payment-term-hidden.png。active_commit=pending。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- partner_form_country_region_preference_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-16T02:09:20+08:00。Layer Target=Customer Custom User Preference Contract；Module=addons/smart_construction_custom/models/user_preferences.py + docs/ops/iterations/delivery_context_switch_log_v1.md；Reason=客户/供应商基础维护中“国家/地区”与“所属地区/省市地址”重复，保盛场景默认限定中国；国家不应作为普通办理字段，省份候选必须限定中国省份。修复：从客户/供应商三栏 layout 清单移除 country_id 并显式 visible=false；state_id 标签改为“省份”；用户偏好契约为 state_id 写入 relation_entry/domain=[['country_id','=',中国ID]]；初始化同步更新客户/供应商 action context，增加 default_country_id=中国ID，使 V2 sourceContext、创建上下文和后端默认一致。验证：python3 -m py_compile addons/smart_construction_custom/models/user_preferences.py PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo CODEX_MODE=gate CODEX_NEED_UPGRADE=1 make mod.upgrade MODULE=smart_construction_custom PASS；数据库检查两个 action context 均 default_country_id=48，契约 country_hidden=True、state_label=省份、state_domain=[['country_id','=',48]]；浏览器验收客户/供应商新建页均不出现 国家/地区，出现 省份，不出现 省/州，res.country.state 请求 domain=[['country_id','=',48]]，artifacts=artifacts/playwright/partner-form-review/country-hidden-state-cn.json + customer-country-hidden-state-cn.png + supplier-country-hidden-state-cn.png。active_commit=pending。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- partner_form_city_scope_preference_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-16T02:20:23+08:00。Layer Target=Customer Custom User Preference + Custom User Data Dictionary；Module=addons/smart_construction_custom/models/partner_location.py + addons/smart_construction_custom/models/user_preferences.py + addons/smart_construction_custom/models/__init__.py + addons/smart_construction_custom/security/ir.model.access.csv + docs/ops/iterations/delivery_context_switch_log_v1.md；Reason=原 res.partner.city 是普通 char 字段，无法按已选省份约束城市选择范围；用户要求省份选定后城市也锁定范围。修复：在用户模块新增 sc.partner.city 城市字典与 res.partner.sc_city_id 选择字段；初始化灌入中国 305 条地级市/直辖市/特别行政区城市数据；客户/供应商表单显示 sc_city_id，隐藏原 city 文本字段；sc_city_id 选择后同步写回原 city/state_id/country_id，省份 onchange 清空不匹配城市并返回 sc_city_id domain。验证：python3 -m py_compile addons/smart_construction_custom/models/partner_location.py addons/smart_construction_custom/models/user_preferences.py PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo CODEX_MODE=gate CODEX_NEED_UPGRADE=1 make mod.upgrade MODULE=smart_construction_custom PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make restart PASS；数据库检查 city_count=305、四川省 18 条城市、res.partner.sc_city_id 存在、客户/供应商契约 city_hidden=True 且 visible_city_id=True；创建临时 partner 选择 成都市 后 city=成都市、state=四川省、country=CN；浏览器验收客户新建页出现 城市 不出现 国家/地区，选择 四川省 后 sc.partner.city 请求 domain=[['state_id','=',894]]，artifacts=artifacts/playwright/partner-form-review/customer-city-after-state-select.json + customer-city-after-state-select.png。active_commit=pending。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- partner_form_sichuan_city_data_correction_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-16T02:24:22+08:00。Layer Target=Customer Custom User Data Dictionary；Module=addons/smart_construction_custom/models/partner_location.py + docs/ops/iterations/delivery_context_switch_log_v1.md；Reason=浏览器反馈四川城市锁定不正确，根因不是省市联动 domain，而是用户模块城市字典中四川省只含 18 个地级市，漏掉阿坝藏族羌族自治州、甘孜藏族自治州、凉山彝族自治州。修复：补齐四川省 21 个地级行政区。验证：python3 -m py_compile addons/smart_construction_custom/models/partner_location.py PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo CODEX_MODE=gate CODEX_NEED_UPGRADE=1 make mod.upgrade MODULE=smart_construction_custom PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make restart PASS；数据库检查四川 city_count=21；浏览器选择 四川省 后 sc.partner.city 返回 21 条，包含阿坝/甘孜/凉山，artifacts=artifacts/playwright/partner-form-review/customer-sichuan-city-complete.json + customer-sichuan-city-complete.png。active_commit=pending。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- partner_form_city_dynamic_domain_closeout_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-16T02:31:29+08:00。Layer Target=Frontend Generic Dynamic Domain Consumer + Customer Custom User Preference Contract；Module=frontend/apps/web/src/pages/ContractFormPage.vue + addons/smart_construction_custom/models/user_preferences.py + addons/smart_construction_custom/models/partner_location.py + docs/ops/iterations/delivery_context_switch_log_v1.md；Reason=用户反馈两个现象：不选择省份时城市仍有数据，选择省份后城市未严格按省锁定。根因是表单 relation_entry 的动态 domain 依赖 state_id，但前端在依赖值为空时把动态 domain 解析为“无 domain”，从而退化为全量候选；省份 onchange 返回运行态 domain 后，又与初始阻断 domain 合并，可能保留旧的宽泛候选感知。修复：用户偏好契约将 sc_city_id 初始 relation_entry domain 设为 [['id','=',-1]]，保证无省份时不出城市；前端通用 dynamicDomainFromDescriptor 对存在动态依赖但依赖缺失的场景返回 [['id','=',-1]]；mergedRelationDomain 在运行态 onchange domain 已存在时丢弃初始 id=-1 阻断，让 state_id 精确接管候选范围。验证：python3 -m py_compile addons/smart_construction_custom/models/user_preferences.py PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo CODEX_MODE=gate CODEX_NEED_UPGRADE=1 make mod.upgrade MODULE=smart_construction_custom PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.frontend.build PASS，static rebuilt to frontend/apps/web/dist-dev；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make restart PASS；浏览器验收 artifacts/playwright/partner-form-review/customer-city-lock-final.json 显示未选省份城市请求 domain=[['id','=',-1]] 且无返回行，选择四川省后 sc.partner.city 请求 domain=[['state_id','=',894]]，唯一城市 21 条且包含阿坝藏族羌族自治州/甘孜藏族自治州/凉山彝族自治州；git diff --check PASS。已知非本次阻断：pnpm -C frontend/apps/web typecheck 仍失败于既有 workflowContract/runtimeContract 类型漂移，verify.frontend.build 已通过。active_commit=pending。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- partner_form_city_dynamic_domain_merge_fix_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-16T02:31:29+08:00。Layer Target=Frontend Generic Dynamic Domain Consumer；Module=frontend/apps/web/src/pages/ContractFormPage.vue + docs/ops/iterations/delivery_context_switch_log_v1.md；Reason=用户继续反馈选定省份后城市直接无数据。复核发现上一版只处理了运行态 onchange 覆盖初始阻断，但 relation_entry.domain=[['id','=',-1]] 与 fieldInfo.domain 解析出的 [['state_id','=',894]] 会先在 relationDomain 内合并，形成 id=-1 AND state_id=894，导致选省后仍空。修复：新增 isBlockAllDomain；当动态 domain 已解析出有效依赖值时，relationDomain 自动丢弃 entry 里的初始 id=-1 阻断；runtime 合并继续复用同一阻断识别逻辑。验证：ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.frontend.build PASS；浏览器真实路径 http://127.0.0.1:18081/a/786 登录 wutao 后进入客户列表，点击新建，未选省份初始 sc.partner.city 请求 domain=[['id','=',-1]] records=0；输入并选择 四川省 (CN)，城市请求 domain=[['state_id','=',894]]，后端返回 21 条四川城市，包含成都市/自贡市/阿坝藏族羌族自治州/甘孜藏族自治州/凉山彝族自治州，artifact=artifacts/playwright/partner-form-review/customer-city-after-state-fixed.json + customer-city-after-state-fixed.png。active_commit=pending。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- partner_form_tag_hidden_edit_city_alignment_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-16T02:54:38+08:00。Layer Target=Customer Custom User Preference + Custom User Data Alignment + Frontend Generic Dynamic Domain Consumer；Module=addons/smart_construction_custom/models/user_preferences.py + addons/smart_construction_custom/models/partner_location.py + frontend/apps/web/src/pages/ContractFormPage.vue + docs/ops/iterations/delivery_context_switch_log_v1.md；Reason=用户确认 res.partner.category/category_id“标签”不是客户/供应商基础资料办理字段，应直接隐藏；同时指出省市编辑态还未对齐，需要兼容历史/编辑记录已有标准 city/state_id 或当前 sc_city_id 值但动态依赖尚未就绪的加载阶段。修复：客户/供应商用户偏好字段清单移除 category_id，并在 PARTNER_EXCLUDED_FORM_FIELDS 显式 visible=false；res.partner 写入 state_id+city 时自动反推 sc_city_id，用户偏好初始化后幂等回填已有可匹配记录；前端动态 domain 在依赖未就绪但当前 many2one 字段已有值时先按当前 id 查询，避免编辑态当前值被初始 id=-1 阻断。验证：python3 -m py_compile addons/smart_construction_custom/models/user_preferences.py addons/smart_construction_custom/models/partner_location.py PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo CODEX_MODE=gate CODEX_NEED_UPGRADE=1 make mod.upgrade MODULE=smart_construction_custom PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make restart PASS；契约检查客户 action 786 version=16、供应商 action 787 version=15 均 category_id visible=false 且 category_in_layout=false、sc_city_id 在 layout；后端写入探针用 state_id=四川省/city=成都市 创建临时客户后 sc_city_id 自动为 成都市；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.frontend.build PASS；浏览器 http://127.0.0.1:18081/a/786 新建客户表单 hasTagBefore=false/hasTagAfter=false，选择 四川省 (CN) 后 sc.partner.city 请求 domain=[['state_id','=',894]] 并返回四川 21 条城市，artifact=artifacts/playwright/partner-form-review/customer-tag-hidden-city-ok.json + customer-tag-hidden-city-ok.png。active_commit=pending。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- partner_form_edit_state_city_dependency_closeout_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-16T03:14:41+08:00。Layer Target=Frontend Generic Dynamic Domain Consumer + Custom User Data Alignment；Module=frontend/apps/web/src/pages/ContractFormPage.vue + addons/smart_construction_custom/models/partner_location.py + docs/ops/iterations/delivery_context_switch_log_v1.md；Reason=用户反馈编辑态选定省份后城市仍有问题。根因是 many2one 输入匹配/option 选择与 blur/commit 事件存在顺序差异：省份变化后城市字段虽会被后端 onchange 清空，但旧城市输入词（如 成都市）可能迟到提交，形成新省份 domain + 旧搜索词的空候选。修复：通用动态 domain 消费规则补齐 setMany2oneOption 依赖清理，依赖字段变化时清空下游关系字段、取消防抖查询、记录失效旧关键词；后端 onchange 在标准 city 文本不匹配新省份时清空 city/sc_city_id；关系查询层对动态依赖或 runtime domain 下“带搜索无结果”的场景自动用当前 domain 空搜索回查，保证候选恢复到当前省份。验证：python3 -m py_compile addons/smart_construction_custom/models/partner_location.py PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo CODEX_MODE=gate CODEX_NEED_UPGRADE=1 make mod.upgrade MODULE=smart_construction_custom PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make restart PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.frontend.build PASS；浏览器 http://127.0.0.1:18081/a/786 真实流程：先选 四川省 (CN)+成都市，再改省份为 重庆市 (CN)，城市输入值清空；旧搜索请求 state_id=881/search_term=成都市 返回空后，立即回退 state_id=881 无 search_term 并返回 重庆市，artifact=artifacts/playwright/partner-form-review/customer-edit-like-state-change-city-cleared-final10.json + customer-edit-like-state-change-city-cleared-final10.png。active_commit=pending。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- partner_form_exact_8331_dynamic_domain_regex_fix: `timestamp=2026-06-16T03:59:47+08:00。Layer Target=Frontend Generic Dynamic Domain Consumer；Module=frontend/apps/web/src/pages/ContractFormPage.vue + docs/ops/iterations/delivery_context_switch_log_v1.md；Reason=用户在精确编辑态 URL http://localhost:18081/r/res.partner/8331?menu_id=598&action_id=786 验收发现选择省份后城市仍未对齐。事实核对：8331 记录初始 state_id/city/sc_city_id/country_id 均为空；ui.contract.v2 layoutContract 中 state_id 与 sc_city_id 字段契约已包含正确 domain/relation_entry；浏览器选择 四川省 后 formData.state_id 已为 894。根因是通用动态 domain 解析器正则误写为匹配反斜杠括号，无法识别契约字符串 [('state_id', '=', state_id)]，导致 dependencyFields 为空并始终保留初始 id=-1 阻断域。修复：修正 dynamicDomainFromDescriptor/dynamicDomainDependencyFields 的 tuple 正则；保留 v2 layout fieldInfo 合并到 runtime fields 的通用机制；many2one commit 在当前 ID 与显示文本一致时不重复远程解析，避免 blur/click 竞态；未解析依赖值 false 时保持 id=-1 阻断，并去重 entry/dynamic 双重 id=-1。验证：ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.frontend.build PASS，static bundle=ContractFormPage-BjoQYnbQ.js；浏览器真实 URL /r/res.partner/8331?menu_id=598&action_id=786&db=sc_demo：未选省份时城市请求 domain=[['id','=',-1]] 且 beforeCityOptions=[]；选择 四川省 (CN) 后 sc.partner.city 请求 domain=[['state_id','=',894]]，城市候选包含 成都市/德阳市；artifact=artifacts/playwright/partner-form-review/exact-8331-after-state-city-final.json + exact-8331-after-state-city-final.png；git diff --check PASS。active_commit=pending。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- partner_supplier_customer_user_module_closeout: `timestamp=2026-06-16T07:56:08+08:00。Layer Target=Customer Custom User Preference Module；Module=addons/smart_construction_custom/__manifest__.py + hooks.py + models/user_preferences.py + models/partner_location.py + data/user_preferences.xml + security/ir.model.access.csv；Reason=按用户要求先收口供应商/客户表单用户模块边界，确保三栏平铺、字段隐藏、默认中国、省市选择、城市字典与历史回填均由 smart_construction_custom 用户偏好模块承载，而不是平台核心或临时脚本。结论：用户模块通过 sc.user.preference.initialization 幂等发布客户 action 786/供应商 action 787 的 res.partner form view_orchestration 合同；新增 sc.partner.city 字典与 res.partner.sc_city_id，保持 city/state_id/country_id 同步；data/user_preferences.xml 在模块安装/升级时重放偏好；base.group_user 只读城市字典，base.group_system 管理。验证：python3 -m py_compile addons/smart_construction_custom/models/user_preferences.py addons/smart_construction_custom/models/partner_location.py addons/smart_construction_custom/hooks.py PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo CODEX_MODE=gate CODEX_NEED_UPGRADE=1 make mod.upgrade MODULE=smart_construction_custom PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make restart PASS；运行态 DB 检查：city_count=308、四川 city_count=21，客户 contract_id=261 version_no=17 status=published，供应商 contract_id=262 version_no=16 status=published，二者 layout_columns=3、state_domain=[['country_id','=',48]]、city_domain=[('state_id', '=', state_id)]、city_entry_domain=[['id','=',-1]]、layout_has_sc_city_id=True、layout_has_city=False、layout_has_country_id=False、excluded_visible=[]、action_context 均含 default_country_id=48；git diff --check PASS。active_commit=pending。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- activity_tabs_route_cache_title_closeout: `timestamp=2026-06-16T08:19:22+08:00。Layer Target=Frontend Shell/Session Generic Activity Tabs；Module=frontend/apps/web/src/App.vue + frontend/apps/web/src/layouts/AppShell.vue + frontend/apps/web/src/pages/ContractFormPage.vue + frontend/apps/web/src/router/index.ts + frontend/apps/web/src/stores/session.ts + docs/ops/iterations/delivery_context_switch_log_v1.md；Reason=用户反馈活动页签功能没有彻底解决，切换页签出现 order 无效 BAD_REQUEST，表单页签名称变技术名，新建表单不缓存，切换后标题和数据漂移。根因：KeepAlive key 与 session activity key 不一致，action/scene key 未包含项目隔离策略；新建表单缺少稳定 activity_page_id；活动页关闭缓存 epoch 未持久化；router 标题解析误用过期 currentAction；activateActivityPage 先标记 active 再跳转，旧页面 watcher 可把标题写入新 active key；title 更新缺少跨页异步竞态保护。修复：action/scene/new form 的 route cache key 与 session key 统一并纳入 project scope；新建表单路由自动补 activity_page_id；持久化 activityPageCacheEpochs；router 仅在 action 匹配时使用 currentAction，优先从 action/menu metadata 解析标题；切换页签改为 push 成功后再 mark active；session 阻断泛化标题和其他页标题覆盖已有非泛化标题；新建表单标题统一为 新建客户 等业务标题。验证：ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.frontend.build PASS，static rebuilt；浏览器验收打开项目台账、客户列表、新建客户并反复切换，tabsAfterTwo=[项目台账, 客户]，tabsFinal=[项目台账, 客户, 新建客户]，newFormUrl 含 activity_page_id，badRequests=[]，pageErrors=[]，bodyHasCustomerName=true；order=__bad_order__ 不再触发 BAD_REQUEST；artifact=artifacts/playwright/activity-tabs-fix/activity-tabs-final.json + activity-tabs-final.png；git diff --check PASS。active_commit=pending。branch=feature/business-capability-productization。`
- lowcode_form_cross_group_drag_acceptance_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-21T00:00:00+08:00。Layer Target=Frontend Layer / P3 low-code runtime configuration acceptance；Module=frontend/apps/web/src/pages/ContractFormPage.vue + frontend/apps/web/src/components/template/NativeFormTreeRenderer.vue + frontend/apps/web/scripts/low_code_business_config_acceptance.mjs；Reason=把表单字段跨分组移动从已修复交互提升为固定回归，并让保存后的正式 view_orchestration 带 group_title、sections 和分组 layout，避免跨组归属只停留在兼容 policy。验证：node --check frontend/apps/web/scripts/low_code_business_config_acceptance.mjs PASS；pnpm --dir frontend/apps/web run typecheck PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.frontend.build PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.business_config.low_code_acceptance PASS，crossGroupDrop persistedInTarget=true persistedInSource=false，artifact=artifacts/playwright/low-code-business-config/report.json + form-designer.png；git diff --check PASS。active_commit=pending。branch=feature/lowcode-config-function-fixes short_sha=4a9aa8da。`
- lowcode_form_old_system_habit_alignment_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-21T00:00:00+08:00。Layer Target=Frontend UX wording / P3 low-code runtime configuration acceptance；Module=frontend/apps/web/src/views/BusinessConfigSurfaceView.vue + frontend/apps/web/src/pages/ContractFormPage.vue + frontend/apps/web/scripts/low_code_business_config_acceptance.mjs；Reason=按用户要求重新登录旧系统核对低代码表单配置操作习惯。旧系统证据：登录后先进入项目列表，使用“查询/重置/进入”的表格行操作；工作台左侧为模块/二级菜单；系统配置集中在“系统/菜单及首页/审批流程/高级设置”等后台入口；施工合同表单配置按“基本信息/工程概况/合同工期/签约合同价与合同价格形式/项目经理/签订时间”等业务分区组织，业务页习惯是列表按钮“添加/编辑/删除/提交/更多”、状态页签和右侧搜索。结论：当前分支跨分组拖拽持久化有必要保留；进一步优化不应引入更多技术概念，而应把入口词从“拖拽设计”对齐为“配置表单字段”，强调按旧表单分区调整字段显示、顺序和分组。修复：业务配置工作台入口、流程卡片、表单内标题与说明文案统一改为“配置表单字段/当前页面字段配置/字段配置”，验收脚本同步定位第一个入口。证据 artifacts=artifacts/playwright/old-system-lowcode-review/*.png/*.json + artifacts/migration/scbs_55_old_system_form_surface_login_probe_result_v1.json + artifacts/playwright/low-code-business-config/report.json。验证：node --check frontend/apps/web/scripts/low_code_business_config_acceptance.mjs PASS；pnpm --dir frontend/apps/web run typecheck PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.frontend.build PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.business_config.low_code_acceptance PASS，designTitle=当前页面字段配置，crossGroupDrop persistedInTarget=true persistedInSource=false；git diff --check PASS。active_commit=pending。branch=feature/lowcode-config-function-fixes。`
- lowcode_form_old_system_operation_path_alignment_batch: `timestamp=2026-06-21T00:00:00+08:00。Layer Target=Frontend UX operation path / P3 low-code runtime configuration acceptance；Module=frontend/apps/web/src/views/BusinessConfigSurfaceView.vue + docs/ops/iterations/delivery_context_switch_log_v1.md；Reason=用户强调重点不是名称，而是旧系统配置操作习惯。追加登录旧系统配置页取证：报表配置为顶部“预览/保存”、页签“数据源条件和标题配置/表格/图表配置/其他”、表格内“添加列/配置”；报表管理为“查询/添加报表”的配置列表；弹窗管理为“添加电脑端/添加移动端/拉取所有配置/查询/重置”，行内“删除/编辑/同步至线下/拉取线下配置/查看已关联业务”；审批业务设置为“添加/编辑/删除/更多/设置/历史配置/查询/重置”的表格配置。结论：旧系统用户认可的是“列表定位配置对象 -> 选中 -> 顶部工具栏编辑/配置/保存/预览”的操作链，而不是只靠每行直接进入设计。修复：业务配置扫描列表增加“已选页面”操作条，集中提供 编辑表单字段/配置列表与搜索/设置审批/预览页面；业务页面行支持点击和键盘选中；行内按钮保留为快捷入口并改“设计表单”为“编辑表单”，降低与旧系统选择-编辑路径的差异。验证：pnpm --dir frontend/apps/web run typecheck PASS；node --check frontend/apps/web/scripts/low_code_business_config_acceptance.mjs PASS；git diff --check PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.frontend.build PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.business_config.low_code_acceptance PASS，mobile scrollWidth=390 innerWidth=390，crossGroupDrop persistedInTarget=true persistedInSource=false。active_commit=pending。branch=feature/lowcode-config-function-fixes。`
- lowcode_general_contract_cross_group_disappear_fix: `timestamp=2026-06-21T11:00:48+08:00。Layer Target=Frontend low-code form grouping preview / User operation habit；Module=frontend/apps/web/src/pages/ContractFormPage.vue + frontend/apps/web/src/components/template/NativeFormTreeRenderer.vue + docs/ops/iterations/delivery_context_switch_log_v1.md；Reason=用户反馈“一般合同（公司）”从最后分组向中间分组拖动字段后字段不见。复现确认根因是匿名分组/结构分组映射不一致，加上跨组预览排序只按原 children 长度回填，追加到目标分组的字段会被截断，导致页面上可选字段从 31 个变 30 个。修复：字段配置分组选项改为读取实际 V2 容器树并过滤非业务“主表区域”；选中字段后提供旧系统习惯更稳的“移动到分组”显式入口；跨分组预览只注入真实字段分组容器，排序保留追加字段；目标组锚点按结构基线优先，避免旧草稿污染。验证：pnpm --dir frontend/apps/web run typecheck PASS；git diff --check PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.frontend.build PASS；Playwright 定向打开 sc.general.contract/action_id=669/page_label=一般合同（公司），将“备注”从“办理信息”移动到“合同方”，结果 sourceContainsAfter=false、targetContainsAfter=true、saveState.disabled=false，artifact=artifacts/playwright/general-contract-cross-group-regression/result-fixed-select-move.json + 27-final-select-move-after.png；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.business_config.low_code_acceptance PASS，crossGroupDrop movedToTargetBeforeSave=true removedFromSourceBeforeSave=true persistedInTarget=true persistedInSource=false。active_commit=pending。branch=feature/lowcode-config-function-fixes。`
- lowcode_cross_group_sweep_closeout: `timestamp=2026-06-21T11:09:24+08:00。Layer Target=Frontend low-code form grouping preview / Regression sweep；Module=frontend/apps/web/src/pages/ContractFormPage.vue + frontend/apps/web/scripts/low_code_business_config_acceptance.mjs + docs/ops/iterations/delivery_context_switch_log_v1.md；Reason=继续排查是否还有同类“跨分组移动后字段消失/重复”问题。新增多入口不保存抽样，覆盖客户、供应商、投标报名管理、一般合同（公司）、补充合同、收入合同执行、支出合同结算、施工日志、材料计划、入库单、出库单、到款确认表、支付申请。发现到款确认表为嵌套分组统计误报：父分组口径会把子分组字段重复计入；同时代码层补齐拖拽到目标字段前时的目标分组归属优先读取结构基线，避免旧草稿污染。修复：验收 helper `formDesignerFieldGroups` 改为最近 `.native-container--group` 口径，嵌套分组不重复计数字段；`onFieldOrderDrop` 目标分组归属结构基线优先。验证：pnpm --dir frontend/apps/web run typecheck PASS；node --check frontend/apps/web/scripts/low_code_business_config_acceptance.mjs PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.frontend.build PASS；多入口抽样 PASS，8 个多分组页面 passed、5 个单分组页面 skipped、failed=0，artifact=artifacts/playwright/lowcode-cross-group-sweep/cross-group-sweep.json；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.business_config.low_code_acceptance PASS；git diff --check PASS。active_commit=pending。branch=feature/lowcode-config-function-fixes。`
- lowcode_general_contract_group_persistence_fix: `timestamp=2026-06-21T11:29:12+08:00。Layer Target=Backend low-code view_orchestration persistence / Form layout runtime；Module=addons/smart_core/handlers/form_field_configuration.py + addons/smart_core/tests/test_form_field_configuration_params.py + docs/ops/iterations/delivery_context_switch_log_v1.md；Reason=用户反馈“一般合同（公司）”把“合同分包类型”移动到最前面的“合同基本信息”分组并保存后没有生效。复现确认 `ui.business_config.lowcode.apply` 已把 field row 的 group_title 写成“合同基本信息”，但 `view_orchestration.views.form.layout` 仍保留旧分组“合同方”，运行时按 layout 渲染导致刷新后回到旧位置。修复：`_upsert_view_orchestration_field_rows` 从既有 layout 回填字段分组，并在字段顺序/分组变更时同步重建 `sections` 与 `layout`，确保低代码 apply 单步就能影响运行态布局；新增单测覆盖字段从旧分组移动到新分组时 form layout 同步重建。验证：python3 addons/smart_core/tests/test_form_field_configuration_params.py PASS，43 tests；python3 addons/smart_core/tests/test_backend_contract_boundaries.py PASS；python3 -m py_compile addons/smart_core/handlers/form_field_configuration.py addons/smart_core/tests/test_form_field_configuration_params.py PASS；Odoo shell 真实 sc_demo/action_id=669 复现 PASS，subcontract_mode main_layout_paths=[合同基本信息] effective_paths_after_apply=[合同基本信息]；pnpm --dir frontend/apps/web run typecheck PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.frontend.build PASS；ENV=dev DB_NAME=sc_demo make verify.business_config.low_code_acceptance PASS；git diff --check PASS。active_commit=pending。branch=feature/lowcode-config-function-fixes。`

- daily_dev_shell_startup_noise_closeout_batch: `timestamp=2026-07-08T01:18:38+08:00。Layer Target=Ops / Daily Dev Release Automation；Module=日常开发服务器 /etc/bash.bashrc + docs/ops/dev_acceptance_release_runbook_v1.md；Reason=日常开发服务器在非交互 SSH 且发布命令启用 set -u 时反复输出 /etc/bash.bashrc: PS1 unbound variable，虽然不阻断 Make guard，但污染正式发布和验收日志，容易掩盖真实失败。修复：服务器侧备份 /etc/bash.bashrc 到 /etc/bash.bashrc.codex-bak-20260708011809，并将非交互 guard 从 [ -z "$PS1" ] 改为 [ -z "${PS1:-}" ]；runbook 固化非交互 shell 必须兼容 set -u，shell-startup error 进入 stop condition。验证：ssh sc-root set -euo pipefail 模式下 make verify.release.v2_0_0.governance.guard PASS；make verify.dev.acceptance.release.schema.guard PASS；dev_acceptance_release_probe status=PASS login_status=PASS role_code=business_config_admin nav_node_count=84 nav_action_count=62 nav_required_path_misses=[] nav_required_action_mismatches=[] nav_forbidden_label_hits=[]；日常仓库 HEAD=e541f4d81 且工作区干净。active_commit=e541f4d81。branch=main。`
- daily_dev_root_shell_startup_noise_closeout_batch: `timestamp=2026-07-08T01:21:22+08:00。Layer Target=Ops / Daily Dev Release Automation；Module=日常开发服务器 /root/.bashrc + docs/ops/dev_acceptance_release_runbook_v1.md；Reason=上一轮消除了 /etc/bash.bashrc 的 set -u 噪音后，复测发现 make verify.dev.acceptance.release.schema.guard 触发的子 shell 仍输出 /root/.bashrc: PS1 unbound variable，说明 release 用户自己的 shell 启动文件也必须纳入边界。修复：服务器侧备份 /root/.bashrc 到 /root/.bashrc.codex-bak-20260708012110，并将非交互 guard 从 [ -z "$PS1" ] 改为 [ -z "${PS1:-}" ]；runbook 明确 /etc/bash.bashrc 和 release 用户 ~/.bashrc 都必须兼容 set -u。验证：ssh sc-root set -euo pipefail 模式下 make verify.release.v2_0_0.governance.guard PASS；make verify.dev.acceptance.release.schema.guard PASS；grep 复核 /root/.bashrc、/root/.profile、/etc/profile、/etc/bash.bashrc 中已无 [ -z "$PS1" ] 非兼容写法；命令输出无 shell-startup error。active_commit=189e2275。branch=main。`
- release_v2_prod_sim_schema_evidence_path_closeout_batch: `timestamp=2026-07-08T01:25:36+08:00。Layer Target=Release Governance / Formal Evidence；Module=docs/ops/releases/v2.0.0/evidence_manifest.md + scripts/verify/release_v2_0_0_evidence_manifest_guard.py；Reason=v2.0.0 evidence manifest 仍将 Prod-sim acceptance artifact 写成 path to be recorded，且 guard 反而把占位文本固化为必需项，不利于正式证据闭环。复核发现 artifacts/migration/fresh_replay_validity_20260508T1720 已入库且通过当前 prod-sim evidence schema。修复：manifest 将 Prod-sim acceptance 记录到 artifacts/migration/fresh_replay_validity_20260508T1720；guard 改为要求该记录路径并禁止占位文本回退；manifest 明确这是 recorded prod-sim schema evidence path，最终 v2.0.0 候选仍需按当次 run dir 重跑 formal evidence guard。验证：PROD_SIM_ACCEPTANCE_ARTIFACT_DIR=artifacts/migration/fresh_replay_validity_20260508T1720 make verify.release.v2_0_0.formal_evidence.schema.guard PASS；strict status=PASS database=sc_prod_sim checks 包含 contract_closed/fund_daily_closed/payment_closed/stock_policy_closed；no-legacy replay status=PASS database=sc_prod_sim。active_commit=28a70e685。branch=main。`

- production_record_open_token_flow_docs_guard_batch: `timestamp=2026-07-08T01:43:53+08:00。Layer Target=Release Governance / Production Release Flow；Module=docs/ops/production_release_flow_standard_v1.md + docs/ops/production_upgrade_standard_v1.md + docs/ops/verify/README.md + scripts/verify/production_release_flow_guard.py；Reason=production_deployment_record_guard 已禁止具体生产部署记录保留开放占位，但生产发布流程、升级标准和验证索引尚未明确这条规则，容易形成“guard 有、流程文档没写”的断层。修复：流程文档和升级标准明确常见三字母占位、待填写、| open |、| open-code | 会被 guard 拒绝，未执行事项必须使用 planned/retained/tracked 等可解释状态；验证索引补充该 guard 行为；production_release_flow_guard 同步 token 固化。验证：python3 -m py_compile production_release_flow_guard.py production_deployment_record_guard.py PASS；make verify.production_release.flow.guard PASS；make verify.production_deployment.record.guard PASS；make verify.release.v2_0_0.governance.guard PASS；git diff --check PASS。active_commit=8e0758d8f。branch=main。`

- production_full_tree_git_authority_record_guard_batch: `timestamp=2026-07-08T02:07:20+08:00。Layer Target=Release Governance / Production Full-tree Authority Evidence；Module=scripts/verify/production_deployment_record_guard.py；Reason=生产发布流程要求全量主线对齐发布通过 verify.production_git.authority.guard，并证明 HEAD=origin/main、工作区干净、.env.prod 作为 skip-worktree 环境例外，但生产部署记录 guard 尚未按 full tree 发布类型强制这些证据。修复：当部署记录声明 发布类型 | full tree 时，guard 要求 production_git_authority_guard: PASS、HEAD=origin/main=、git status --short: clean 和 skip-worktree 证据。验证：python3 -m py_compile scripts/verify/production_deployment_record_guard.py PASS；make verify.production_deployment.record.guard PASS records=4；make verify.production_release.flow.guard PASS；make verify.release.v2_0_0.governance.guard PASS。active_commit=current HEAD containing this entry。branch=main。`

- production_record_template_guard_alignment_batch: `timestamp=2026-07-08T02:13:34+08:00。Layer Target=Release Governance / Production Record Template Alignment；Module=docs/ops/releases/templates/production_deployment_record_TEMPLATE.zh.md + docs/ops/verify/README.md + scripts/verify/production_deployment_record_guard.py + scripts/verify/production_release_flow_guard.py；Reason=生产部署记录模板仍提示后续事项使用 open/done，验证索引也未描述 full-tree Git 权威证据、全量一致声明和 planned/retained/tracked 解释规则；同时生产升级标准允许 hotfix 发布类型，但 record guard 尚未接受 hotfix。修复：模板后续事项改为 planned/retained/tracked/closed 解释型状态；record guard 接受 hotfix 发布类型；production_release_flow_guard 锁定模板状态口径和 record guard 新规则 token；验证索引同步说明 release type、full-tree Git authority、全量一致声明和 follow-up 解释要求。验证：python3 -m py_compile scripts/verify/production_deployment_record_guard.py scripts/verify/production_release_flow_guard.py PASS；make verify.production_deployment.record.guard PASS records=4；make verify.production_release.flow.guard PASS；make verify.release.v2_0_0.governance.guard PASS。active_commit=current HEAD containing this entry。branch=main。`

- production_git_authority_boundary_docs_guard_batch: `timestamp=2026-07-08T02:19:30+08:00。Layer Target=Release Governance / Production Git Authority Boundary；Module=docs/ops/production_upgrade_standard_v1.md + docs/ops/verify/README.md + scripts/verify/production_release_flow_guard.py；Reason=verify.production_git.authority.guard 是生产 Git 工作区权威校验，必须能在生产主机直接运行；它不同于 Odoo/Compose 只读业务校验，不应被误加 PROD_READONLY_VERIFY 或 DB/compose 前置条件。修复：升级标准和验证索引明确该检查不连接 Odoo 或 Docker Compose、不使用 PROD_READONLY_VERIFY，边界由 PRODUCTION_GIT_AUTHORITY_* 环境变量控制；production_release_flow_guard 锁定验证索引说明。验证：python3 -m py_compile scripts/verify/production_release_flow_guard.py PASS；make verify.production_release.flow.guard PASS；make verify.production_deployment.record.guard PASS records=4；make verify.release.v2_0_0.governance.guard PASS。active_commit=current HEAD containing this entry。branch=main。`
- production_git_authority_upgrade_standard_guard_batch: `timestamp=2026-07-08T02:22:54+08:00。Layer Target=Release Governance / Production Upgrade Standard Drift Guard；Module=scripts/verify/production_release_flow_guard.py；Reason=上一轮已在生产升级标准中明确 verify.production_git.authority.guard 不连接 Odoo/Docker Compose、不使用 PROD_READONLY_VERIFY 且由 PRODUCTION_GIT_AUTHORITY_* 控制，但 production_release_flow_guard 只锁定了验证索引说明，未锁升级标准本身。修复：UPGRADE_STANDARD_TOKENS 增加 Git authority host-only boundary 和 PRODUCTION_GIT_AUTHORITY_* token，防止升级标准回退。验证：python3 -m py_compile scripts/verify/production_release_flow_guard.py PASS；make verify.production_release.flow.guard PASS；make verify.production_deployment.record.guard PASS records=4；make verify.release.v2_0_0.governance.guard PASS。active_commit=current HEAD containing this entry。branch=main。`

- frontend_pilot_release_candidate_rehearsal_batch: `timestamp=2026-07-15T17:30:00+08:00。Formal Product Layer=P4 release engineering and delivery governance；Layer Target=isolated release rehearsal, read-only compatibility, paired recovery, rollback, production-build acceptance and pilot decision；Module=make/release.mk + scripts/release + docker-compose.release-rehearsal.yml + config/release + docs/release；Standard vs User-Specific=通用发布候选与恢复治理，不包含客户业务功能或生产数据；Why Here=P4 owns deploy/recover/observe evidence and fail-closed lifecycle operations；Why Not Elsewhere=不修改 P0-P3 产品语义、ACL、角色、导航、金额或状态机，不以 acceptance fixture 冒充历史兼容；Blast Radius=仅 sc_release_rehearsal/restored/rollback 隔离库、独立端口 18086/18087、ignored release artifacts 和 production static acceptance tooling。验证：guard 拒绝危险库和 demo；no-demo formal install/upgrade PASS；pre/post fingerprint equal；compatibility structural PASS；paired backup and checksum restore/rollback PASS；production bundle hash 固定；70/70 与 J02-J11 发布级验收。因未获得授权历史副本、真实 TLS、生产规模 RTO 和外部监控接入，最终结论上限为 CONDITIONAL_GO。branch=feature/frontend-pilot-readiness-v1。`
- repository_online_capture_fail_closed_batch: `timestamp=2026-07-15T20:00:00+08:00。Formal Product Layer=P4 ops delivery tool；Layer Target=legacy online capture credential boundary + repository secret guard；Module=scripts/verify/online_capture_security.py/js + live SCBS/SCBSLY entrypoints + scripts/ci/secret_scan.py + make/runtime_ops.mk + make/ci.mk + docs/security；Standard vs User-Specific=通用交付安全机制，不包含业务数据或客户产品语义；Why Here=P4 owns capture/replay/verification entry safety and repository governance；Why Not Elsewhere=不修改 P0-P3 产品、数据库、迁移锁或历史基线，不把 secret 处理放进业务运行时；Blast Radius=在线 strict gate 和直接 SCBS/SCBSLY 采集入口在 DNS/socket/HTTP 前强制 offline/secret/confirm/allowlist 校验，普通离线验证不受网络依赖。当前树已清理六处非占位赋值；用户决定旧凭据保留至旧系统下线，因此事件文档明确记录未撤销残余风险。branch=fix/repository-credential-exposure-remediation short_sha=5c41a434c。`
- fe_pro_01_role_home_ia_start: `timestamp=2026-07-16T22:00:00+08:00。Formal Product Layer=P0/P1 frontend product orchestration consumer；Layer Target=Frontend Layer / shared Shell and role-home presentation；Module=frontend/apps/web；Standard vs User-Specific=通用岗位工作平台的产品呈现，不在前端固化行业、客户或业务模型语义；Why Here=本次只把现有权威导航、角色、公司、项目与工作项契约组织成一致的岗位入口；Why Not Elsewhere=权限、导航分组名称、业务指标与状态事实继续由后端正式契约负责，禁止在前端新增推断或平行业务字典；Blast Radius=AppShell/HomeView、直接组合式函数、共享展示组件和验收脚本，使用70叶节点、四角色隔离、action 876/menu 606拒绝及J02-J11验证边界。baseline=b861c0280；branch=feature/frontend-role-home-information-architecture。`
- fe_pro_03_core_record_form_start: `timestamp=2026-07-17T03:08:01+08:00。Formal Product Layer=P0 generic contract rendering mechanism + P1 construction industry standard contract + P4 acceptance evidence；Layer Target=Contract Governance / Scene Orchestration / Frontend generic record-form rendering；Module=addons/smart_core generic presentation carriers + addons/smart_construction_core industry presentation contract + frontend/apps/web shared record/form components + scripts/verify；Standard vs User-Specific=通用渲染机制与施工行业标准语义，不包含客户偏好或低代码覆盖；Why Here=业务状态、金额、关系和可执行动作由P1事实及契约声明，P0与共享前端只承载和渲染通用presentation协议；Why Not Elsewhere=不在共享Vue按model/XML-ID/字段名/中文标签推断语义，不在P2客户模块固化行业标准，不用P4脚本成为长期页面事实；Blast Radius=project.project、construction.contract、sc.settlement.order、payment.request、sc.payment.execution五类详情，合同与付款申请表单，My Work动作presentation债务；不修改ACL、record rule、70叶导航、状态机、金额公式或生产环境。baseline=c43f5d980；branch=feature/frontend-core-record-form-productization。`
- fe_pro_04_design_system_convergence_continue: `timestamp=2026-07-17T09:26:04+08:00。Formal Product Layer=P0 platform kernel product + P4 acceptance evidence；Layer Target=generic frontend renderer and product design-system governance；Module=frontend/apps/web + scripts/verify + docs/frontend_productization；Standard vs User-Specific=平台通用页面结构、组件语义、可访问性与视觉验收，不含行业或客户特例；Why Here=共享前端负责消费正式契约并统一渲染，P4 验收脚本负责隔离浏览器证据；Why Not Elsewhere=不修改P1/P2业务默认、P3运行时配置、ACL、record rule、状态机或金额公式，也不在共享组件按模型推断业务；Blast Radius=AppShell、通用列表、契约表单、设计系统组件和FE-PRO-04矩阵。修复验收脚本的异步列表就绪条件、空列表搜索同步点和陈旧截图复用，确保只采正式页面状态；同步治理守卫到拆分后的实际责任文件，并移除已退役RecordView/ModelFormPage代理的基线依赖；重建拆分后的no-new-any精确文件基线，显式any总预算由57降至55。验证：style/legacy/no-new-any guard、lint、strict typecheck、build、git diff --check、make ci.local.quick、make ci PASS；FE-PRO-04 final PASS，18 surfaces、72 light rows、7 dark rows、horizontal overflow=0、axe critical/serious=0、h1/main failures=0、technical term rows=0、runtime error rows=0。baseline=86f9b29eb；branch=feature/frontend-product-design-system-convergence。`
- fe_pro_04w_unified_page_width_contract_start: `timestamp=2026-07-17T14:00:00+08:00。Formal Product Layer=P0 platform kernel product + P4 acceptance evidence；Layer Target=Frontend Layer / generic page-frame width contract and visual layout governance；Module=frontend/apps/web shared design-system page frame + ListPage/LayoutShell consumers + scripts/verify + make targets；Standard vs User-Specific=所有产品页面可复用的通用宽度模式和验收机制，不包含施工模型、客户、角色或字段特例；Why Here=页面宽度属于共享前端渲染与设计系统机制，页面编排只选择data/standard/focused/fluid语义，P4脚本负责宽屏利用率和溢出证据；Why Not Elsewhere=不修改P1/P2/P3业务契约事实、ACL、record rule、导航、查询、业务列、金额或状态机，也不按model/XML-ID/角色/账号推断宽度；Blast Radius=ScPage、LayoutShell、正式列表/详情/编辑/创建/My Work页面frame，表格局部overflow和1440/1920/2560/390视觉矩阵；验证边界为J02-J13、70叶、axe/runtime/HTTP/page overflow及单PR完整CI。baseline=8408a2f90；branch=fix/frontend-unified-page-width-contract。`
- fe_pro_04w_unified_page_width_contract_complete: `timestamp=2026-07-17T14:45:00+08:00。统一PageWidthMode=data/standard/focused/fluid，解析优先级为正式layout contract→通用page kind→standard；ScPage/LayoutShell共享同一frame、token、padding、居中与overflow责任，不按模型、角色、XML-ID或字段推断。1920 data利用率100%，2560 data上限1920且留白对称，standard/focused上限1440/1080，390全部模式利用可用宽度；40 light+5 dark截图、axe critical/serious=0、page overflow=0、console/pageerror/unexpected HTTP=0。J02-J13、70/70及finance42/project member9/PM14/owner5 PASS；required金额探针真实PASS；delivery hardening 72响应式场景及原性能预算PASS；ci.local.quick及唯一一次make ci PASS；CI后generated reports stale守卫单独PASS。AppShell1293不变、ListPage2085(-1)、ActionView3684不变、ContractFormPage1778(-1)、MyWorkApprovalWorkspace323不变。branch=fix/frontend-unified-page-width-contract。`
